name: Adam Schiff
subject: Happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I’ve been standing up for California’s workers and working families for my whole life — they’ve always had my back, and I will always have theirs.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3725%2E5257348%2E7NDi8z)
Happy Labor Day, Derek.
I’ve been standing up for California’s workers and working families for my whole life — **they’ve always had my back, and I will always have theirs.**
That’s why I kicked off my U.S. Senate campaign at the IATSE Local 80 union hall in Burbank — which is also where I kicked off my first Congressional campaign.
It’s why I’ve stood on the picket line alongside SEIU, WGA, UNITE HERE, SAG-AFTRA, and other labor unions just this year alone.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20230904_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3725%2E5257348%2E7NDi8z)
It’s why I’m so proud to have the support of the California International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, California Nevada International Union of Operating Engineers, California Amalgamated Transit Union, as well as California’s IATSE council. Not to mention another dozen local unions.
It’s why I’ve been a vocal champion of the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act_ , which helps unionizing workers, providing them protections when bargaining for better wages, benefits, and safer workplaces. In the Senate, I’ll do everything I can to pass this legislation — including abolishing the filibuster.
**Unions built the middle class and deserve a fighter in California’s next U.S. Senator. That’s how we create an economy that works for everyone.**
I’m a loud and proud supporter of the labor movement, and I’ll leave you with this thought as you enjoy Labor Day:
If you appreciate weekends, paid leave and vacation, health benefits, overtime pay, minimum wage, sick leave, lunch hours, and more, **take some time this Labor Day and thank a union**. Their fight for workers made it possible. And their fight continues.
Once again, happy Labor Day.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20230904_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3725%2E5257348%2E7NDi8z)
| | [DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20230904_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=3725%2E5257348%2E7NDi8z)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=3725%2E5257348%2E7NDi8z) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=3725%2E5257348%2E7NDi8z)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It's clear that the establishment is worried about the campaign we're running. | | Fellow American - the DC Establishment is coming after me. FIRST: Chris Christie was on MSNBC to attack me and then went on Fox News calling me "dangerous." THEN: Nikki Haley attacked me, mischaracterizing my stance on Israel. NOW: Mike Pence (after swinging and missing on the debate stage) is fundraising using a video of me as an 18-year-old questioning Al Sharpton. It's clear that the establishment is worried about the campaign we're running, Fellow American. "Vivek Ramaswamy quickly emerged Wednesday night as the punching bag in the first Republican presidential debate, finding himself in the midst of nearly all of the most fiery clashes." - Politico 8/24/23 Fellow American, I don't have a Super PAC making massive TV buys in New Hampshire or Iowa. My campaign is run by YOU. | | | ---|---|--- | | I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media or establishment political class. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Border Patrol uncovers alarming situation that has Biden sick to his stomach
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 05, 2023

Border Patrol
uncovers alarming situation that has Biden sick to his stomach

Biden's border crisis is a
complete catastrophe. But it's far more serious than anyone ever
thought.

And Border Patrol just uncovered
an alarming situation that has Biden sick to his stomach.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden may be in deep
trouble after this troubling report surfaced

The heat of a
presidential election is no time for panic. But for President
Biden, that's all he's doing.
➞ Continue Reading

Massachusetts' Governor
makes a surprising decision that leaves many Democrats speechless

The state of
Massachusetts seems to be in a state of panic. Many are wondering
what will happen next.
➞ Continue Reading

President Biden just left a
key Democrat fighting for their life

Joe Biden's
disastrous policies have left leaders across the country begging
him for help. The problem is, that he refuses to answer the call.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

With less than 9 hours before I step on stage for my town hall, I have an important question for you. Momentum surging for my campaign and your support has never been more important. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d9d733ce20e9f6544e1a3d66bb262395d8d039465399b62c3b1dd65f6dd148ccaef4437da9c5d94dfaef1c4554da1d641caed06ff59a23ab5 Can you take a moment to contribute to my campaign with a donation of $7 or more? Every donation, no matter the amount, will play an important part in helping us cover the costs of putting on town halls and events in key states like New Hampshire. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d9d733ce20e9f6544e1a3d66bb262395d8d039465399b62c3b1dd65f6dd148ccaef4437da9c5d94dfaef1c4554da1d641caed06ff59a23ab5 RUSH IN A DONATION https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d9d733ce20e9f6544e1a3d66bb262395d8d039465399b62c3b1dd65f6dd148ccaef4437da9c5d94dfaef1c4554da1d641caed06ff59a23ab5 The energy coming off our first debate is still strong but there’s a lot more work to do. Which means we need to hold more town halls, ramp up our voter outreach efforts, and continue to amplify my message even further than ever before. But, as you can imagine, each of these efforts comes with its own costs. Here’s a glimpse of how your donation will have a direct impact in New Hampshire: - Cover transportation costs - Help cover lodging expenses - Rent sound equipment for town halls - Rent chairs for town hall guests https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d9d733ce20e9f6544e1a3d66bb262395d8d039465399b62c3b1dd65f6dd148ccaef4437da9c5d94dfaef1c4554da1d641caed06ff59a23ab5 That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Can you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5, $10, or $15 before my town hall starts in 9 hours? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d9d733ce20e9f6544e1a3d66bb262395d8d039465399b62c3b1dd65f6dd148ccaef4437da9c5d94dfaef1c4554da1d641caed06ff59a23ab5 HELP FUEL MY FIGHT Each contribution you make directly supports crucial aspects of our campaign – from event logistics and travel to important states like New Hampshire and Iowa, to expanding our grassroots efforts. While the momentum is on our side, achieving our goals requires unwavering commitment day in and day out! That’s why I’m so thankful for people like you who are by my side in this fight. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d9d733ce20e9f6544e1a3d66bb262395d8d039465399b62c3b1dd65f6dd148ccaef4437da9c5d94dfaef1c4554da1d641caed06ff59a23ab5 Could you take a moment to contribute and help us fuel our campaign for this week’s events? Thank you for your continued support. My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d9d733ce20e9f6544e1a3d66bb262395d8d039465399b62c3b1dd65f6dd148ccaef4437da9c5d94dfaef1c4554da1d641caed06ff59a23ab5 Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d44db87b9f621a4fd1c145480aee92c051cbfec1f489ab80d95ca7c1f26b004d7a26044c71d7ba15e27216900914c4e2fe1103a409b2945a4 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d44db87b9f621a4fd1c145480aee92c051cbfec1f489ab80d95ca7c1f26b004d7a26044c71d7ba15e27216900914c4e2fe1103a409b2945a4 GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d5a2188c51c5c423ec5991ff97e031b0d610767f06d38f9c1962a863c5e06d5302d5591f0429e984cea4e87957ca62d42ef8206a4a5a7e70a https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641d5a2188c51c5c423ec5991ff97e031b0d610767f06d38f9c1962a863c5e06d5302d5591f0429e984cea4e87957ca62d42ef8206a4a5a7e70a VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641dd0f4496458206234dbc3ddad5c9fa773a062ac21b4cd4f90712bb8759a6dbd6e1e14a5392ae9814233c09dd6c996217f0a75e1dabfa7dde6 My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641dd0f4496458206234dbc3ddad5c9fa773a062ac21b4cd4f90712bb8759a6dbd6e1e14a5392ae9814233c09dd6c996217f0a75e1dabfa7dde6 Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641dd0f4496458206234dbc3ddad5c9fa773a062ac21b4cd4f90712bb8759a6dbd6e1e14a5392ae9814233c09dd6c996217f0a75e1dabfa7dde6 DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6dca9a48c81f641db016cb63a22f28a3e1c65905d228cc4d74f25e83d35a5f688533422e446d2131bc1c23cf8fcd72ce57ccc3ea00d52e119e9072a37e193ca0 www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Biden’s resignation rumors just set Washington, D.C. on fire
body:
Biden's resignation rumors just set Washington, D.C. on fire
The ailing president is only getting worse
with every passing day. His time could be coming up soon.

And Biden's resignation rumors just set

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is what I’m debating for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b157d3f033e17cde55463a10151ce7039a5e6e8f5f9dc5e4da9a2a0f7c301b7017562a4d30f2b94a71858ebfbc7bafce80fb45023f43f999996b4241231ab5be5c9774b7e343a9c864df36dfef364989

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc7f568afcbc9a002b0a16d5097fdc89aefaf64b2a6c7a30e2dcbb4594c4d79e6e6b6798a79c60652dcf0bc781f72dc58b

Peter,

I am running for President to lead our nation out of decline. It is time to usher in a reckoning for the elites in Washington, DC and revival across our country, and that is why I am taking the stage tonight at the first GOP presidential primary debate. I am writing you this message today to make sure you know what I’m fighting for.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc7f568afcbc9a002b0a16d5097fdc89aefaf64b2a6c7a30e2dcbb4594c4d79e6e6b6798a79c60652dcf0bc781f72dc58b

In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom.

Over the years, I’ve watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won’t let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. I will NEVER back down from defending and preserving our American freedom.

That’s exactly what I’m doing. I am standing up against the Left’s radical indoctrination of your children, Biden’s disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder Americans.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc7f568afcbc9a002b0a16d5097fdc89aefaf64b2a6c7a30e2dcbb4594c4d79e6e6b6798a79c60652dcf0bc781f72dc58b
Help me win this critical election by donating today

It’s time to get this country to start working again—not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent. When I am President, that will be ALL Americans. Not just the elites. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed, and I cannot wait to take this message to millions of Americans this week.

Peter – we will get it done. No excuses.

I am running a fully transparent campaign—meaning you’re involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like a member of my team, NOT my personal piggy bank—and I want you to be a part of it. If you’re ready to join me in fighting for freedom, I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out. You will see the difference you’re making when I get up on that stage.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc22308b1e3e3bccedf577a9482d609683a7b484907c762d6badba8852057bf237b21bee28d9d4d193ef368545f8a9cc8d
DONATE $10

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43ccf4d0cb42453c3beb75e2e320ad2a3fbc18694ceb827da1d622d0f19350312f13514f488f36816d1db652c4e17971e92f
DONATE $20.24

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43ccf26d7cd7f7746d2ec2026a5e3dfa75dffe5f863b0896903b5c97d7b097020d5ba03ef6277182c65d851d76be48b68bc9
DONATE $47

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc8192915cde040b3a56c30f6702a58c383112c5dd9cffcba7abe093febc818eeb62ce6e0c13c938d571fb7fb86d5d64c9
DONATE $75

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc5157792d44f3c6c632ddc168cf51b758578c6e006d787ac74f42bf18dc029dfac2b876a5e02eb5266a0c40b79c166e3f
DONATE $100

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc0bb6833148ff13f79a9dc78b9d5db22495671f28b62562fd32720e66681584da6a22d5f4fe483bd73bd7c180d8ff20f0
DONATE $250

We will get it done, Peter. I promise you that, and I have the track record to back it up. Please, if you can,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc7f568afcbc9a002b0a16d5097fdc89aefaf64b2a6c7a30e2dcbb4594c4d79e6e6b6798a79c60652dcf0bc781f72dc58b
chip in before September 30.

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc7f568afcbc9a002b0a16d5097fdc89aefaf64b2a6c7a30e2dcbb4594c4d79e6e6b6798a79c60652dcf0bc781f72dc58b

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43ccda9b75bf9e21df5c464bd963a99f0f5aa937fead4e7a1ce0666b4dc3db12e722eda44b8818b32a0e711401037688aed9
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1b176cf47169de575265da54b9005314860007fbf9a66072b52ee2d52cceb8300e45c071783de0d62e6a5e4d5c8627729c5f69f8b8e0e3cf
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3029afd21e1f43cc7f568afcbc9a002b0a16d5097fdc89aefaf64b2a6c7a30e2dcbb4594c4d79e6e6b6798a79c60652dcf0bc781f72dc58b

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 05, 2023

This impeachment
trial has put President Biden on notice
The process of impeachment
should be used sparingly. But always used when a politician is
caught red-handed.

And now this impeachment trial
has put President Biden on notice in a big way.

alarming situation that has Biden sick to his stomach

is a complete catastrophe. But it's far more serious than anyone
ever thought.

The heat of a
presidential election is no time for panic. But for President
Biden, that's all he's doing.

subject: Vivek vs the Establishment

body:
It’s clear that the establishment is worried about the campaign we’re running.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlrpbnabdfc3ctfodqg2ho8c5tb1km6rheat2e8g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s37cji3cpr0shrb8srmclh63djke9pm0t3gmipb5d5jcir3fdtketi79pb66aoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj35cljcjg7co36epjjbcr7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm9pj4shge1ob3c8iv0)

| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqdmhhmg31082fa98o8p9h5rknknpfq0noarstco_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)
**Fellow American– the DC Establishment is coming after me.**

> _**FIRST:**_ Chris Christie was on MSNBC to attack me and then went on Fox News calling me "dangerous."
>
> _**THEN:**_ Nikki Haley attacked me, mischaracterizing my stance on Israel.
>
> _**NOW:**_ Mike Pence (after swinging and missing on the debate stage) is fundraising using a video of me as an 18-year-old questioning Al Sharpton.
It’s clear that the establishment is worried about the campaign we’re running, Fellow American.

> _"Vivek Ramaswamy quickly emerged Wednesday night as the punching bag in the first Republican presidential debate, finding himself in the midst of nearly all of the most fiery clashes."_
> – Politico 8/24/23
Fellow American, I don’t have a Super PAC making massive TV buys in New Hampshire or Iowa. My campaign is run by YOU.

**[Will you help us fight back?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk0ljn2rq2060t1a9tk2prbqivs7ntaqfpobt0f8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)**

| [Chip in $5 ➔](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5cqloe784u2s8msvmiagh5cg6rt8r73pgfvn3co_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $10 ➔](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqusaa839tfdsjjm3gf54gpcugeo8p56r6ikgqio_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $24 ➔](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr8d9dddc432m6pv195upa4vblnitggpp2m3gdfg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs) | | [Chip in $50 ➔](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zru7fv7g7h6c1groaartd7usoljnfl2e245inuu8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)

I won’t ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it’s not popular with the mainstream media or establishment political class.

**[Help me stand up to the DC Establishment today!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zccfvqqh5j53i0oh2855k5gdm6esh26vt0amt5kg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjitudr12pcvavmjarbgfh6qp8rj6kts93t31i70_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT →**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7mhn0le5i7049p22p94r69o188mtkv80ho2imso_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ziqpqd5qb969o1njed2144b4praf5aiqfv5qdk8g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cji61o71cdh2bs)

## Chinese Sneaking onto U.S. Bases
Chinese nationals have snuck onto U.S. military bases and other sensitive sites [more than 100 times](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAURb8Gb0TwAAcGhi7e0rWjheGRvAoby5BU-fvKnbvc5UpHR-frNt8CFdrun2FF33OdQ-z0wlk4bjioGYbkMyKgGtDL0SkntRrV8PDZgnbZmjEZZWQQMi3WgDRSLjbb4AbyIEAJJ4xwBrS9JGNjvJocg9OLS5lpgYl6PS7flbb-wFze9YXHJdZ1KP7R-96Y-mAwMZi2915bPy8G0wlmMAl3jmYwPXnjNWeKFErjsW4Rjw0TD0t9do5tp7qFO_LQ-UqFejjefAkNG4NpOHzaf6gUauOVaXFfA5U_h_5vkd8AAAD__-T7YVY) in recent years, often posing as tourists who are lost. Federal agencies, including the FBI and the Defense Department, [held a review last year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGumCAUANCvwQ2DF1AZHJombq9rR4Nw1duiGC7vGf--S8f3Byfn98fy4SnRtf_yJ051y4sPlb5wUU5aCXqBJk4bIqBucOp6p11ndK-bYxo7AKvH1cZx3Xo0sBoVPTjjB-d61zc0gQKtnLLKWTBjG-0YwmC34J1ZXdyEURip5tL-yXTVA7f05i8sbchnk6aj1puF_iFgFjA_z9NGT-k9PaU25Pbzr4D5wocFzL5UCgllB2YYFVgB88-DLmSUfBOy3D1dGKUPAZnlSYmqL69cPSPLOzNdu6z5sxBXlgXvXKpk_3J71DM1ZYr3QykR94Mwav9POJv6bdm_AAAA__9yM2-L) on how to limit the attempts, which are viewed as espionage. New legislation to toughen security is being considered. Chinese efforts include a scuba diver swimming off Cape Kennedy, a man wandering onto a missile site in New Mexico, and another who claimed he was staying at an army base in Alaska.
## Supersonic Passenger Jets Set to Return
New supersonic jets with technology that [quiets the loud sonic boom](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwZstfBjHNzB08ZauHS0CR3wVhghonL591c6d_-GXvo_rdrUcOd3f7UGmhbxZ1_hJm8Re96A26LwJRECqIzPOqHCc1Ky63YxgZ-VwVH52kw44L3BDrRdvlRwV-o4NSFASpZaoYVoGrxfnLjo4i9MNfRCTJM8tl-Ezc2o7hfidn1QGl48umr21RxXqTcAqYD3Pc3Ap_TYBayv2SVHAaktjF0nAmmy1ff16UKk5setD5Pveav_S2FeXBKycPL2GvR2xK8Y_To6R63wRk7wfluPftv2L8BMAAP__229eng) to more of a sonic thump could be carrying passengers at tremendous speeds within a few years: A New York-London flight could take 90 minutes. NASA is developing its X-59, and a company called Boom is readying its XB-1 for its [first faster-than-sound flight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79yrCAUgPGngQ4H-bNKQXEbu71tSgfhoGcHxZGTdfL2maRO_RXf_D6e8zNgwWP9H3bwlOscIuEbZumEFUrPiiefARRoDr5_OO16ox-abz7F1MNgYxoGGBewclHGjQDaOqNN33P0SiotnbTSWWXGLtkxxsHmGJxZXMrMSEhI9epeFQ_aIJev-oari3XnxW9EZ2P6H1MTU9N93107Q4SfytS01LqL9nnC1eqBUbyAxI4FGtUDmjgDbSLj1UjkgutG_PLpvLEUbI-BGbnuAcvvif50fwcAAP__AWJb3Q) at Mach 2.2, or around 1,700 mph. It will test over the Mojave, where Chuck Yeager first broke the sound barrier. The original supersonic passenger plane, the Concorde, was [banned by the U.S. government](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfY29Y5ADHDAzfki3f2tEicNgXYZPCxVb_fdXO3V_plZ6P-3z3lGlf_vsNHacy-8B04CytMALUDH10CRFQ9eguo1X2otWo-tWBl5MJqOXlMQWpNeAYg02ggwV1BejJgQQlrTTSGtDTEM0UwtWk4K1-2Jg6LTESlzo8C-28Yspf5cA6hLL12a3Mr9apfx3cOrid5zl4rEVsfvkJOrjtvvkmPt-ELNr7hbWVnYJ4IoutHNhEyKVhFVxEotpYpEzLyn118XVSztTGa6flsnnKv0_-U-A7AAD__z0ZXvU) 50 years ago because of powerful sonic booms that rattled windows. The new jets drastically reduce that noise.
## Retailers Deploy Heavy Fog to Deter Thieves
Retailers are testing a new crime-fighting measure that releases a disorienting and blinding fog ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1upDAUxfGnMZ2R8QfgwsU2dLPtlsiYa7grg5F9Z0jePpqkTf-TztH_32N-eEx4bn_9AY5inn0gfMEsLDdcqlk2q4sAElQDruutsp1WvWp2B9F7HbtulUaPvVnUKAdth6jsIofYqwadFFIJK4ywRuqxXc0YwmBi8FYvdo1MC1iRcmn_Zzxph5g-8wtKG_LRJLcTXZWpP0xOTE73fbcxfyzPiifU-jZMTgXIY2JyCgUP4BG3nfDceMwb35Eqr3u-EkaCUvkP5u8h4vXC4lPl-Uk85JNKTk1x63VjSlj7gWmxHR7T9xn6Nc1XAAAA__97amj9)) throughout the store when the alarm goes off. The technology, created by Density USA, is already in use in Europe and Australia and is now rolling out in larger cities across the U.S. by retailers who have seen profits cut by waves of organized shoplifting. The thick fog is non-toxic, but [it temporarily blinds thieves](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAURb8GNiz8ABMGhi7e0rWjheFhU2ETAY2Vv6_Sueu9OjrS-bovd5dyOrdPd6DtsSzO9_TEhRumGIgFaLAREVBQtONkhBmlmATdrYvRSw1ajUKtxgWYnEYduRy1EFP0NFngILjhihsF8jYEdfNeq-idkasJkUiOIfVSh--Szr5jzK_yxDr4ctBs994fjYgPAjOB-bquwa_txKu9fwKz35N3WyEwv0cC8-H8nk5kAR-5vBqLZWMVu0uZtV4qNhawY2XrT92yq2-EVhseV8o5tUkTybfDpfzn7__W-A0AAP___yFi-A), says Density's CEO Mike Eger. "They literally can't see it to steal it," he said.

Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Chinese Sneaking onto U.S. Bases Chinese nationals have snuck onto U.S. military bases and other sensitive sites in recent years, often posing as tourists who are lost. Federal agencies, including the FBI and the Defense Department, on how to limit the attempts, which are viewed as espionage. New legislation to toughen security is being considered. Chinese efforts include a scuba diver swimming off Cape Kennedy, a man wandering onto a missile site in New Mexico, and another who claimed he was staying at an army base in Alaska. Supersonic Passenger Jets Set to Return New supersonic jets with technology that to more of a sonic thump could be carrying passengers at tremendous speeds within a few years: A New York-London flight could take 90 minutes. NASA is developing its X-59, and a company called Boom is readying its XB-1 for its at Mach 2.2, or around 1,700 mph. It will test over the Mojave, where Chuck Yeager first broke the sound barrier. The original supersonic passenger plane, the Concorde, was 50 years ago because of powerful sonic booms that rattled windows. The new jets drastically reduce that noise. Retailers Deploy Heavy Fog to Deter Thieves Retailers are testing a new crime-fighting measure that releases a disorienting and blinding fog () throughout the store when the alarm goes off. The technology, created by Density USA, is already in use in Europe and Australia and is now rolling out in larger cities across the U.S. by retailers who have seen profits cut by waves of organized shoplifting. The thick fog is non-toxic, but , says Density's CEO Mike Eger. "They literally can't see it to steal it," he said. name: Daniel Cameron
subject: We’re Going to Unleash Kentucky’s Economic Potential
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniel Cameron for Kentucky
body:
Let’s make it happen.
To view this email as a web page, go [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/ed62d915db0b35b5/40933/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933)

---
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/4eaf2e1357f6da42c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
Friends, **_Andy Beshear_**** _is the WELFARE governor. _** **_I will be the WORKFORCE governor. _** That’s why this week, I unveiled my **[Vision for Prosperity](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/74378bb3e2f6118ec3d6b838967d376c/40933)** which will reward hard work and expand economic opportunity **FOR ALL** Kentuckians.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/3e435a90626f2ba2c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
**_Here are some facts: _** **⇨** _Fewer Kentuckians are working today compared to the day_** _Andy Beshear_** _took office. _ **⇨** _Kentucky ranks at the_** _BOTTOM_** _of workforce participation in the entire country. _ **⇨** __**_Andy Beshear_** _wants to use your tax dollars to keep people dependent on government handouts. _ _**[I will be the WORKFORCE governor.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/3883b53ca9f4d4b0c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ I grew up working in my parents' coffee shop, so believe me when I say I know the value of work and the right of Kentuckians to enjoy the fruits of their labor. Under a Cameron administration, we’re going to reward a culture that respects work, not one that settles for government dependence. _**[I will be the WORKFORCE governor.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/b4db2a864c56aec3c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ **Andy Beshear’s** economic philosophy has mirrored that of his party’s leader **Joe Biden** : soaring inflation, skyrocketing gas prices, and an ever-growing welfare state. This race is about two contrasting visions for Kentucky and my _**[Vision for Prosperity](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/a72571231cfcae20c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ makes the choice clear. Take a moment to read the full plan _**[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/5f33d274395cd9a6c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_. **[Let’s get our people working again, and our economy back on track.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/ed62d915db0b35b5/06e5440114a6c633c3d6b838967d376c/40933) ** For Kentucky, Daniel Cameron

name: Gabe Amo for Congress
subject: Today is the Day!
body:
https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Hi Friend,

Thank you to each and every one of you for all that you have done to get us here – it’s Election Day!

🗳 If you live in the First Congressional District , make sure that you check your polling place before going to vote. You can go to vote.ri.gov [http://vote.ri.gov] or call 401-222-2340 to find your polling location.
📞 If you’d like to sign-up to make phone calls today, sign-up here [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/565884/] . These calls will help us ensure that we turn out every last voter we can.
🎉 Join us this evening after polls close at The Guild in Pawtucket to watch as results roll in. Doors open at 8 PM. Address is 461 Main St, Pawtucket, 02860.

[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/73666D6A6564677A51364156704E52736334336573757779785333714E76496E30542B6C744843703841624550753641447A66326F746C694244515767507144/editor_images/GAFC%20Election%20Night%20Watch%20Party%20Invitation.png]

Please RSVP to kate@gabeamo.com [kate@gabeamo.com] or 401-545-0788.

Regardless of what happens today, it is impossible to convey how grateful I am. Thank you, and I hope to see you at The Guild tonight for our Election Night Watch Party!

With gratitude,
Gabe

subject: Say no to toxic pesticides this fall
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **It’s time to get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system for good. Help protect bees and the planet and donate $27 today!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965540?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965542?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965543?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This fall harvest season, we have a lot to thank bees for. Rows of pumpkins and squash are ripening on the vine. Trees of plums and apples are growing heavy with fruit -- all thanks to bees!
But it’s no secret that bees are dying at alarming rates. And toxic pesticides like **Bayer-Monsanto’s neonics are playing a huge role in their decline.** Alternative methods like organic farming would help save them. But the pesticide industry has our farming system hooked on these bee-killing pesticides. [**This fall, it’s never been more important to STOP dangerous pesticides from harming more bees. Donate $27 today and help us reach our $2,130 goal to stand up to the pesticide industry and protect pollinators and the planet! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965544?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
I can’t overstate how damaging Bayer-Monsanto’s neonics are for insects. Since the 1990s, U.S. agriculture has become 48x more toxic to insect life. That’s primarily due to neonic usage. And we’re seeing the impacts. In the same time span, **we’ve lost a staggering 90% of the Western Bumblebee population.** The pesticide industry is contaminating our food system. And bees are paying the price.
The truth is that these deaths could be avoidable, Friend. With organic farming practices, we could protect pollinators and the future of our food supply. But pesticide companies spend **MILLIONS** on misinformation campaigns. All to **deny and distract** from the real damage they’re doing and to undermine consumer confidence in organic. Enough is enough: it’s time to stand up for pollinators and secure a future for vulnerable bees and our planet.
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965545?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Help get bee-killing neonics OUT of our food system and protect our planet. Donate $27 today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965540?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965541?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965542?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965543?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We need bees for a healthy and functioning planet. In fact, we have bees and other pollinators to thank for 1 in every 3 bites of food we eat. That’s right: from strawberries to melons to tomatoes, these little pollinators help bring food to our table. Almonds wouldn’t even exist without them!
_**But neonics are poisoning bees as you read this -- endangering our food system.**_ These harmful pesticides attack bees’ nervous systems. They can harm their ability to navigate, find food, fight pests and diseases, and even reproduce. Not to mention, _they can KILL BEES ON CONTACT!_
To make matters worse, neonics are the most widely used insecticide in the WORLD. That means countless bees are being subjected to their impacts. In fact, 2022 was one of the deadliest years on record for honeybee colonies in the U.S. We lost nearly 40% of them.
Things can’t go on like this much longer, Friend. But there’s still hope to turn things around. The EPA has the chance to ban bee-killing neonics. But there’s a possibility they could instead approve them for another 15 years. If that happens, there could be devastating consequences for pollinators AND our food system. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Without action, _**we could lose hundreds of wild bee species forever.**_ There’s too much at stake to let the pesticide industry keep its death grip on our food system.
**Stand up to the pesticide industry before many species of wild bees go extinct. Donate $27 today and help us reach our $2,130 goal for pollinators and the planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965540?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965541?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965542?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965543?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I hate to say it, but it gets worse. Neonics don’t just harm pollinators. They impact people, too. **Residues of these chemicals are found inside the food you eat.** This means you can’t wash or peel them off!
Neonics have been linked to **autism, hormone disruption, and even birth defects of the heart and brain.** And according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, about HALF of the U.S. population is exposed to them on a regular basis! Friend, how long will we let the pesticide industry cover up their destructive impacts? All the while, pollinators and people are being _poisoned_ on a daily basis.
Even the EPA has acknowledged that neonics cause serious harm to pollinators. But the pesticide industry is fighting tooth and nail to keep its control over our food system. All for the sake of profit. That’s why Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to stop the pesticide industry and save our pollinators and the planet. But we can’t make a difference without help from generous supporters like you, Friend.
Your membership gift today will help fuel our work to protect pollinators and stand up to greedy corporations that are destroying our planet. **If just 13 more activists from your area donate today, we can give pollinators and the planet a fighting chance against the powerful pesticide industry.** But we’re facing intense pushback, and we’re falling short of our goal. Will you rush your $27 membership contribution before midnight tonight to help us reach our $2,130 goal before it’s too late?
**Greedy corporations are putting profit over pollinators and the planet. Donate $27 and take a stand today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1965540?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

subject: Can we chat?
body:
we have a real chance to win this thing

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td556f0b9-d814-4098-a90d-d13e3688f9e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

| |

| | | | | Peter, do you have a minute to chat? Fundraising this summer has been really tough, and I need to raise $45,000 per day to keep my campaign operations running to plan. But as of today, we're $15,908 short of our goal. [Can you chip in $5 to my campaign and Blue Amp Action to defeat Ted Cruz and bring real leadership to Texas before my fundraising deadline? I'd be so incredibly thankful for your help → ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6d5c881-74d5-4b39-80ad-d0196cc954b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0d02ad7-f7a5-4f28-b399-cfd2407ab6cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Donate $5 now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16c42af2-1c34-42b7-8e72-4719494481d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Look, a lot of politicians (Ted Cruz) spend their time in office lining their own pockets, selling books, and saying whatever it takes to get as much TV air time as possible. But me? I ran for office because I wanted to be a voice for the people from all over my district – my community deserves someone who would fight for the issues affecting us most. And I'm running for Senate to be that voice for folks all over Texas, and all over the country. My team and I are in the middle of a road trip across Texas, where I've met with folks from El Paso to Houston to Ft. Worth. It's been incredible getting to know so many people because I really do want to be a senator for all Texans. [But I digress. I can only keep doing this work and fighting for Texans if I hit my fundraising goals to power this campaign. So I’m personally asking for you to chip in $5, $10, or any amount you can spare to me and Blue Amp Action. It is truly appreciated. Please, donate now. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d9956b2-9b01-439e-810a-56d0dcdf7b60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T508cdf7c-5c0b-4f0e-9ab0-ae8287e26866/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Greater Georgia
subject: Private Movie Screening with Greater Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
Join us for a FREE showing of Sound of Freedom
| | | | Good morning,
Last month, Greater Georgia held a private screening of Sound of Freedom - and by popular demand, we're hosting a second, FREE private screening on September 12th.
If you were unable to attend the first event, we invite you to join us next week. This is a powerful movie that we're encouraging every Georgian to see - especially in light of our state's leading role in the fight to end human trafficking.
To attend, please reserve your tickets by Friday, September 8th. Tickets, along with food and beverage, will be provided free of charge.
Please note that tickets are extremely limited and will be allocated on a first-come, first-serve basis.

subject: The False Fear: Asymptomatic Spread
body:
Another critical piece of information | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/simon-says-8857415?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

“If you’re sick, stay at home!” is a more sensible approach than intrusive draconian mandates, born from fear of asymptomatic transmission and fueled by flawed testing programs. But here we are again. The same talking points being rolled out, slowly, and with the same justifications as 2020. What is going on?

[Please click the thumbnail below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=1003a56ba3&e=9828080a05) and watch this [critical video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=773824a387&e=9828080a05) about what they're trying to do again:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f81b4a1e80&e=9828080a05 "Another Round of Fear: Asymptomatic Spread")
---
| This is one of the reasons I think it's so important you attend the [Global Health Freedom Summi](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=65e3ae0772&e=9828080a05)[t](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=049c0f620d&e=9828080a05) on September 30th. You can get your tickets here and use my coupon code HEALTH for 15% off [tickets](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=42f49131a0&e=9828080a05) in person or virtually.

If big tech, big pharma, and big government aren't met with the unified spirit of "Never Again", they will continue to consolidate power and try what they did in 2020 again. We must be vigilant in the face of these powerful forces.

This is a battle that's just begun. I am proud to stand beside you in it.
[See you at the Summit.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=eec9bb3493&e=9828080a05)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Trump smacked Joe Biden across the face with this big reality check
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 05, 2023

Trump smacked Joe
Biden across the face with this big reality check
Former President Donald
Trump is done playing the nice guy. He's on a mission to clear
his name.

That's when Trump smacked Joe
Biden across the face with this stunning reality check.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This impeachment trial has
put President Biden on notice

The process of
impeachment should be used sparingly. But always used when a
politician is caught red-handed.
➞ Continue Reading

Border Patrol uncovers
alarming situation that has Biden sick to his stomach

Biden's border crisis
is a complete catastrophe. But it's far more serious than anyone
ever thought.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden may be in deep
trouble after this troubling report surfaced

The heat of a
presidential election is no time for panic. But for President
Biden, that's all he's doing.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

body:
Grab your no cost 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun now, before it’s handed off to another winner.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3770/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/fb9491478259febfb57fda9b5f271cb5cb0a3a65) here at any time. September 5th, 2023 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | Awesome news, !

Your email address -- dpwillis67@gmail.com -- just got **chosen to receive a 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun FREE.**

[You just have to click here to claim it.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3770/6374453/dabcd956fbb1e05daa404591ebf432cb7bc3ae58/fb9491478259febfb57fda9b5f271cb5cb0a3a65)

**_Here’s why you got chosen to get this Free:_**

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ had an overstock of these pocket stun guns in their warehouse... so they decided to give some of them away as a little “guerrilla marketing” campaign.

So to give everyone a **fair shot** to get one... we shuffled everyone’s email addresses and _chose a handful of winners at random._

**And dpwillis67@gmail.com got chosen!**

That’s a pretty big deal, since these pocket stun guns ** _sell for $69+_** on Amazon.

Over 132,000 other Americans have **gladly paid full price** for this... since it can turn a 260lb thug into a whimpering pile in two seconds flat.

But luckily for you...

[You can get it FREE](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3770/6374453/dabcd956fbb1e05daa404591ebf432cb7bc3ae58/fb9491478259febfb57fda9b5f271cb5cb0a3a65) since your email got chosen today.

Just **one small catch** here...

You’ll need to [claim your Free Pocket Stun Guns IMMEDIATELY](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3770/6374453/dabcd956fbb1e05daa404591ebf432cb7bc3ae58/fb9491478259febfb57fda9b5f271cb5cb0a3a65) if you want it.

If you don’t claim it within 4 hours...

We’ll simply take that to mean you **weren’t interested** \-- and then select another eligible winner to receive it Free.

So don’t dilly dally.

**Grab your FREE 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun now** , before it’s handed off to another winner.

Thank You.

name: Kristin Davis
subject: Lara Trump and Kash Patel to Ignite Passion for Faith & Country at Ignite 2023 Event Hosted by Pastors For Trump
body:
| | | [](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=dn89dxc9920rouxnem&linkid=0&link=5a7ce9875b6d4e62b20b3670beed262c)
---
**Lara Trump and Kash Patel to Ignite Passion for Faith and Country at Ignite 2023 Event Hosted by Pastors For Trump**
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE September 5, 2023 -- Tulsa, Oklahoma - Pastors For Trump is set to create waves of inspiration by hosting the [Ignite 2023](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=dn89dxc9920rouxnem&linkid=1&link=be102bf5acd14f23aaae0178c6c48d1c) event, featuring speakers Lara Trump and Kash Patel. This event will take place on September 10th at Sheridan Church, situated at 7901 E. 41st Street in Tulsa, Oklahoma. Ignite 2023 isn't just an event; it's a powerful catalyst aimed at fueling the spirits of individuals who share a profound connection to both God and country. Starting at 6:00 PM, this electrifying occasion will feature speeches from dynamic personalities renowned for their steadfast dedication to faith, family values, and America. Entry to this remarkable event is absolutely free, ensuring that anyone who cares about their country and wants a faith-based evening can attend. Lara Trump, celebrated for her unwavering advocacy of conservative principles and her role as a staunch supporter of American families, will grace the stage with her insights. Joining her is Kash Patel, a compelling voice in the realm of politics, who will provide valuable perspectives on the vital issues our country is facing while trying to preserve the bedrock values of our nation. Pastors For Trump founder, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer, will also share his vision, delivering a message that calls for unity, unwavering faith, and active participation in shaping the trajectory of the nation. As the event draws to a close, attendees can opt to continue their meaningful engagement by attending the post-event dinner at 7:30 PM. This gathering promises vibrant discussions and an opportunity to connect with kindred spirits who share a passion for the themes highlighted during the event. Pastors For Trump extends a heartfelt invitation to all to partake in an evening that promises to reignite fervor for faith and patriotism. Ignite 2023 is poised to be an exceptional affair that kindles the flames of unwavering devotion to both God and our beloved nation. With ongoing developments, including continued indictments, this event takes on an added significance, providing a platform to discuss unwavering support for President Trump and his vision for the country. To secure a seat at this captivating event and to gain insights into the speakers' perspectives, please visit. Given the anticipated demand, prompt registration is recommended. Event Details - Tickets [here](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=dn89dxc9920rouxnem&linkid=2&link=5804f15f7f96463a8f500a4e0da65dcc): Date: September 10, 2023 Time: Event commences at 6:00 PM Location: Sheridan Church, 7901 E. 41st Street, Tulsa, Oklahoma
[Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=dn89dxc9920rouxnem&linkid=3&link=7dc24e889b774aa980069bda99273ad6)Sheridan.Church Tulsa, OK[Pastors For Trump](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=dn89dxc9920rouxnem&linkid=4&link=8df0ea97ffa3453e87def87a47752a61)
| [Click to RSVP](https://100090.io.directiq10.com/hit?sid=dn89dxc9920rouxnem&linkid=5&link=5a1a6718a71743a7bfab0508d8c5024f)
