name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2avcg2eforlkfpp4lm9s8re8dp2podgb50glhso_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z87ettuojrjovveopv0bou42m0iptg0q6978nc2g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlepvfl28u94jmafsuu2e0atdhhqs3s5gdceu7eg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv27t4nu2u2he258gt7mb1o8142absu04tcg6318_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2o66o47nd1fvo6j7podah172aui9lf44dftgso0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvemh4ahe5efhfpap12sm94j6jjavbqj23gh35h8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsj2rd62rtgtqeo4duv9veb00s0uskn012ri1fso_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z62lsiogsrr6oqmqqiqb9k0fhsjt2reqi5dnkcjg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkch15u8po2q62gd25udtqhllj5hu12jh0d4geq0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z09e4sttf09p9ja992679hrjmdhrhernos5afoqg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znkb4g5veklsgsajjf9o7n4n58bq9p1m75t4diug_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. _**[Please, join me in fighting for the future--because freedom is always worth fighting for.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z92et17f6b4ddhiamsj20d9snnj75vink74481ko_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs "Please, join me in fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdu9c390qemjeh0isjabtuhglnr5g27tbhkro8q0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmbp0dnh05te7jo9lbdoqe5c6ca6ciea6d4q316g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj68pr4chh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

clean_body: Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support. Here 's my story: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1. | Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey. | As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now: Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC; Ranks number one for new business formations; Ranks number one for net in-migration; Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states; Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York; Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report; Has NO state income tax; Has a crime rate at a 50-year low. I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom. | But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. clean_body: Every one of us deserves access to health care. | Peter — Roy’s spent his entire tenure as governor fighting to make health care more affordable and accessible because he knows that every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy. But in rural areas of NC, hospitals have been struggling to keep their doors open. When they’re forced to close, communities suffer. That’s just one of the reasons why getting Medicaid Expansion enacted is so important; it’ll provide critical federal funding to keep rural hospitals and health centers open for business. Peter, 11 rural hospitals have had to shut down or make changes to their services just this year. But Republicans have refused to enact the Medicaid Expansion plan they agreed to that would help save our rural health care options. | Thank you, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAGOxHxpx%2fvAPMmQl4m8rg&sysid=1)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you’ve been with me from the start or this is the first time you’re hearing about me, I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it’s important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22151%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V2XrwR2b1cWctsgZIMCE%2bA&sysid=1 "Once
youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution
of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAGOxHxpx%2fvAPMmQl4m8rg&sysid=1)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _“Don’t complain. Do something about it.” _

---
| | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAGOxHxpx%2fvAPMmQl4m8rg&sysid=1)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick-me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAGOxHxpx%2fvAPMmQl4m8rg&sysid=1)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22152%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D%2fW8JVbKepse7Z%2b%2f8InP4A&sysid=1 "It would mean a lot to
me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show
the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> ")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22153%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N%2bP8w%2fl6E9PsfYXucR92Ww&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22154%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rISgCNkIE4wS5nFt66LaMg&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22165%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=csk1vYUjq%2f4%2fcSev%2foDsqw&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22166%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=19Q%2bIlfffb0o6nJGsDZReA&sysid=1)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22167%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b44C5h4zO5yD8Nogh27Ucw&sysid=1)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22168%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vcDdePwFvEtqzbEUxRdiDA&sysid=1 " I need your help
â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAGOxHxpx%2fvAPMmQl4m8rg&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22169%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a66LjA%2b578sW5P4agO6YFw&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22160%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eICPCCgoPH8%2bns9o1wLpDQ&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22161%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=73u3XFigec%2f8ErhFx6HTcg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I7ERaZXtyyQL0MAJe1Pq6A&sysid=1 "Will you join me today
and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22163%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dYssRyiokxFb1AQ5Z24uCg&sysid=1 "DONATE")
---
| Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22164%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RpAWn1klRjtLbKOwtyInzw&sysid=1)
---

name: Tim Scott for America
subject: 35 words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That’s up to us
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztfr3jahofkm52bukum0rj7h7ftfo4n5qm5gh50g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3gsdom3dj56uq70tbkeppr2c5je2p70phkm5pb4d3kskonecdje9p63cjm6ljjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm6phimapmcdtim1j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9pj4spj64o33c8iv0)
On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us

|
---
| | | _" I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."_
Friend,

On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us, the American people.

We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction.

If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years.

Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American.

**We need Tim Scott as our next president!_[If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjs2kamoe3299aar0sh61a3bjcl4irgpsbi0ad8g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj6coj0cdh2bs "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?")_**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuf0o7d46g5of6snvao5ut0of43hba75k8r1cc40_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj6coj0cdh2bs "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

On Tim's first day in office, he will:
* Restart the Keystone Pipeline
* Secure the Border
* Stand up to China
* Restore Parental Rights

You can count on him to **FIRE** Attorney General Merrick Garland, **FIRE** FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government.

**Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4s0ml9hdqdok01eq60hhiv0qbnng9g7a6g403lo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj6coj0cdh2bs "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. **But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from.**

Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn't have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future.

Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He's going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream.

America's future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won't become reality unless we help Tim win!

**_[Can you please make a contribution of any amount to support Tim Scott's campaign?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj7kokcd0ekpdm9hmg6vt54k9k7hngdglq0euhd0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj6coj0cdh2bs "Can you please make a contribution of any amount to support Tim Scott’s campaign?")_**

---

Thank You,

Tim Scott for America

---

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.
And if you're a man, you should play sports against men.

America needs more victors and less victims._

These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**_[If you agree, will you join my team?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb2uqs4gdlc8i8rg1j06j2blj7b0q798sdr1km58_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj6coj0cdh2bs "If you agree, will you join my team?")_**

Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. **We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country.**

I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy.

**_[I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America's future?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zce5i2ao8i2j8gg7hcq96k3bqj3duckce4v8vdto_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj6coj0cdh2bs "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?")_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Action Plan to Solve Election Corruption!!!
body:
Announcing MIGOP's Election Security Operations Program (ESOP) | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
My Fellow Michigander,
Thanks to the efforts of our NEW Michigan Republican Party, new revelations are exposing a Democratic cover-up involving the 2020 and 2022 election on a near-weekly basis.
The Democrat AG suppressed the shocking investigation and hid it from voters and election clerks. The Gateway Pundit's exposés ignited a media firestorm that still rages.
**WHY is this all being revealed right now?**
The Michigan Republican Party now has a new chair.
Kristina Karamo witnessed election fraud as a poll challenger in 2020 and has zero tolerance for systemic corruption.
**Kristina has a plan to eradicate it.**
**ANNOUNCING!!!!**
The MIGOP Election Security Operations Program (ESOP)
A comprehensive plan called "18 Areas of Responsibility" aims to ensure the security of our elections.
Our ESOP team has identified 18 areas of responsibility that affect election security. Citizen volunteers will form task forces to address each of these areas, with guidance from a paid project manager.
**What will my donation money be used for?**
Your generous donation will directly fund staff, IT, lawyers, equipment, marketing, and FOIA requests for election fraud.
Your donations will provide the necessary personnel and resources to quickly establish a program with two main goals:
* Ensure a just and transparent 2024 general election.
* Develop a sustainable and comprehensive election security plan for future MIGOP administrations.

**Here are some of the 18 areas of intense focus mentioned above:**
* **Clean up** the voter rolls using software and citizen volunteers to root out ineligible registrations and prevent voter manipulation like what happened in Muskegon.
* **Litigation Team** will conduct research, prepare, and file lawsuits to support operations aimed at ensuring election security and winning them.
* **Investigations Team** is currently investigating violations of Michigan election law in MUSKEGON, while gathering evidence for the Litigation Team.
* **Election Data Collection** and Analysis Team will gather and analyze all election data from across the state.
* **Drop Box Monitoring** Task Force
* **EXPANDED GOP challenger** and Poll worker Program and Training curriculum.
* **Research Team** will conduct high-level research on secure and effective voting systems, with a special focus on machine-free elections.
* **Recruitment and Training teams** will recruit, onboard, and train volunteers in specialized areas.

That’s just a sampling of our 18 areas of intense focus that your donations will fund through this election cycle!
**Your assistance is crucial for our progress.**
Please consider making a donation today, whether it is a one-time or monthly contribution of any amount from $25 to $500 or more through 2024.
In the past, Michigan Republicans could simply vote and trust in the process. However, this is no longer the case. In order to ensure secure elections, two crucial elements are necessary: your financial support and your active involvement.
| [YES, I WANT TO DONATE TO ESOP](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6a3ce1e7dc&e=a2af77507c)
---
If you want to **volunteer** for one of the 18 critical projects, please reply or email your name and cell number to [communication@migop.org](mailto:communication@migop.org).
Thank you for your generous donation to support the Election Security Operations of the NEW Michigan Republican Party.
God Bless Michigan and America!
Paid for with regulated funds by the Michigan Republican Party.
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=5fe4655d62&e=a2af77507c)
---
| | | | | | [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c32581fc95&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=df5b1d08e4&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=2482b722e2&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6808378e23&e=a2af77507c)| [](mailto:communication@migop.org)
---|---|---|---|---
|

---

**Our mailing address is:**
[3450 Alpine Ave. NW Box 332
Grand Rapids, MI 49544](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=93dec3d270&e=a2af77507c)

You can [update](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=328693fc0d) or [unsubscribe](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=328693fc0d).

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Peter, will you personally endorse Ruben Gallego?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Let us explain why this is no ordinary ask
#

Peter -
We need to ask you to do something important today.
Can you add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona? It's a small and simple act, but it speaks volumes about the strength of our campaign.
If that's all you need to hear, use this link to get it done:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_sept23/**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_sept23/?source=em230905-1-15&refcode2=1109.734936.bYdFdh&akid=1109%2E734936%2EbYdFdh)
Otherwise, here's why this is important. Please give it some thought:
Winning this race will require us to unite Democrats behind our effort, and that includes national Democrats whose endorsements matter.
Those folks are paying attention to three things: the polls, how much money we raise, and the grassroots enthusiasm for our campaign.
They don't want to be on the opposite side of a campaign that has broad grassroots appeal.
That's where these endorsements come in. When Ruben has these conversations, this is the story he is telling: the polls, the money and the grassroots support.
So please:
[**Use this link to add your name as a personal endorser of Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona. It's a small act that means a big deal to our chances.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_sept23/?source=em230905-1-15&refcode2=1109.734936.bYdFdh&akid=1109%2E734936%2EbYdFdh)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_sept23/?source=em230905-1-15&refcode2=1109.734936.bYdFdh&akid=1109%2E734936%2EbYdFdh)
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=1109%2E734936%2EbYdFdh). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1109_734936_bYdFdh&akid=1109%2E734936%2EbYdFdh)

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Peter, it’s Congresswoman Jen Kiggans here. I want to take a moment to let you know about an issue that I care about deeply. I’ve said this before, and I’ll say it again–I’m not a career politician. I’m just a Mom, Veteran, and Nurse Practitioner who is committed to serving my nation. My mission has been and always will be to help protect and defend others to the best of my ability. I ran for Congress because I was frustrated with our politician's empty talk and lack of action... We need real action and results that will actually help people. This is why I’m messaging you today, Peter. I served in the Navy as an H-46 and H-3 helicopter pilot for ten years, and as a veteran, I understand how important it is to make sure our servicemen and servicewomen get the support they deserve. Our veterans have earned benefits and support by dedicating their lives to serving and protecting our nation. Advocating for proper support for veterans and ensuring their quality of life is my personal mission on Capitol Hill. But I can’t complete this mission alone. I need you by my side as I fight to deliver hard-earned benefits to those who deserve it most. Will you join me? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb12288d2bec7a3f2d02b8d8d4fd956585d5b9f37e28e1bb38b20ef64558edb53f75ad5291d41f04fa520c8ac4675d8bb7c1cdc SUPPORT OUR VETERANS https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb12288d2bec7a3f2d02b8d8d4fd956585d5b9f37e28e1bb38b20ef64558edb53f75ad5291d41f04fa520c8ac4675d8bb7c1cdc If you support veterans in America and think they should be the top priority of our government, please sign your name on my petition. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb12288d2bec7a3f2d02b8d8d4fd956585d5b9f37e28e1bb38b20ef64558edb53f75ad5291d41f04fa520c8ac4675d8bb7c1cdc SUPPORT VETERANS https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb12288d2bec7a3f2d02b8d8d4fd956585d5b9f37e28e1bb38b20ef64558edb53f75ad5291d41f04fa520c8ac4675d8bb7c1cdc SIGN YOUR NAME Your support means everything to me, Peter. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb1228876c2705713c557d1a3b66775c6ca78dd6dabebdf4bd63ee5ec5777e2f93dfce7f66213a446ebc34ea3f6858bfd8c1dc3 – Congresswoman Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb12288fb61984983e480b1e3380453ae578159514922a4daa20129674b91f7087ecca03b6067e6e358cc9d4f45487a9a7aeaa0 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb122889a5f05289619fba2a51666a0b51c12cf0fe3ca017cbe3efa66ca198625211297b697f551e98ff8bd14dca119b2150db6 >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=863c2dc09bb1228830d9224a626209e4729729e6f91a304414f16e6d754dc58e9fbe69a276c27628ee9e41e8716216ee425410e5fd044d6a here . Sudden music phenomenon, Oliver Anthony, recently criticized Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton for their evolving views on same-sex marriage during a conversation on the Joe Rogan Experience podcast. name: April Cao
subject: My husband Hung
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b5f13f0518024d1fb71694324454b7e5&_e=E056Cc2NDvtNr7USflvvuL98nVLOO9PcsdRH7kuqdzwTlv8VAyKQpq_aOfGuvyqVqnWtYfm5NgfqL7Y7f8dWI_l_fyzLfcu8xi9CpplgtibwpvtfYZIyJDdvjuPVRNoa4uPu7CB8NSDS4dzOQ6QNeRvceaN27WgDDMKl_Gy0zUMXr1tearqz3j81u0UO8M0H-ZQ3Yepf1ajWAKPgc5nQUIwALkdEmtl6sZI-767i-ecA_neqGrPp5NbUop5jDNj6EdsdKQn43FetzN1XrGXKd5wIcSyxP62A5bO_3B2k935e2VwIh3OXFuKI5Sh3VeQFemYkQXmUdat3Rd_36bwMnDC3PRzTY--D68Zp5IOCQAhO4ul-gWowhryvtsAqGE0F)
---
Peter, Since day one, Hung has been the best husband and father for our family.
I’m so grateful for his dedication to our family and country.

Now, he’s ready to be the best U.S. Senator for Virginia - and here’s how I know he’s up for the job.

Hung always puts others before himself. Whether it’s the sacrifices he made serving in the U.S. Navy to always making time for our five children, he does everything he can to make sure our country and our family are taken care of.

He always says what he means, and he’s not afraid to make hard decisions. Hung isn’t afraid to get the job done - even when it means ruffling feathers.

I admire his honesty, his bravery, and his dedication to defending the American Dream for our children.

**T[his race is going to be one of Hung’s toughest battles yet, and he needs your help. Will you endorse Hung right now?>>](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b5f13f0518024d1fb71694324454b7e5&_e=E056Cc2NDvtNr7USflvvuL98nVLOO9PcsdRH7kuqdzwTlv8VAyKQpq_aOfGuvyqVqnWtYfm5NgfqL7Y7f8dWI_l_fyzLfcu8xi9CpplgtibwpvtfYZIyJDdvjuPVRNoa4uPu7CB8NSDS4dzOQ6QNeRvceaN27WgDDMKl_Gy0zUMXr1tearqz3j81u0UO8M0H-ZQ3Yepf1ajWAKPgc5nQUIwALkdEmtl6sZI-767i-edGo7S06AT240k7FiScvXTITL1YUshLU1XoJmmJHHyW0rgZBO0RFjFotDByeKr7pVIewJsKMA_OQO_FHQS45EqOMBkUBb_FoZnKEBT22d86sy3E91xzrZHf49uf0vD7tI62RIhvasNG6UdFHMHuEcYy)**
---
[**ENDROSE HUNG FOR U.S. SENATE**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b5f13f0518024d1fb71694324454b7e5&_e=E056Cc2NDvtNr7USflvvuL98nVLOO9PcsdRH7kuqdzwTlv8VAyKQpq_aOfGuvyqVqnWtYfm5NgfqL7Y7f8dWI_l_fyzLfcu8xi9CpplgtibwpvtfYZIyJDdvjuPVRNoa4uPu7CB8NSDS4dzOQ6QNeRvceaN27WgDDMKl_Gy0zUMXr1tearqz3j81u0UO8M0H-ZQ3Yepf1ajWAKPgc5nQUIwALkdEmtl6sZI-767i-edvdetzNnrOZuyTgxRGNz26U7Z4_6ACA8jZjisAG6dCk-e0hnxy4CL8tX_OKznC-U7ZldIkoEU1PlhqUj17UAplh_lYmM0ru0iFrkqc0Mq-ksM8D1xTLN8eA9krWdfqHk77nUoRpLiz96CxBaRYMhAe)
---
This isn’t just about politics for Hung, Peter. This is personal.

Hung knows the American Dream is possible - because he’s lived it.

He came to America not knowing a word of English after escaping Communist Vietnam. By the time he graduated high school, he had a spot at the U.S. Naval Academy.

He owes his life to America, and he’s paid it back every way possible.

But just because his career in the Navy is over doesn’t mean he’s done fighting.

Hung isn’t the kind to stand on the sidelines, and when he saw what Joe Biden with the help of Tim Kaine, was doing to our country, he knew he had to take action.

Now, we need you to take action too.

**[Please, show your support and help send my husband Hung to the U.S. Senate to get our great country back on track.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b5f13f0518024d1fb71694324454b7e5&_e=E056Cc2NDvtNr7USflvvuL98nVLOO9PcsdRH7kuqdzwTlv8VAyKQpq_aOfGuvyqVqnWtYfm5NgfqL7Y7f8dWI_l_fyzLfcu8xi9CpplgtibwpvtfYZIyJDdvjuPVRNoa4uPu7CB8NSDS4dzOQ6QNeRvceaN27WgDDMKl_Gy0zUMXr1tearqz3j81u0UO8M0H-ZQ3Yepf1ajWAKPgc5nQUIwALkdEmtl6sZI-767i-efkU6_FDokqoBHLMobmKJh8CDF-CqGPniaQ3_ruKUkJoVRWjFx3gbsDfH-E-g25MsdNPJ6K-EXO_s1gwPjGdf2YGswbmoEEJLjLakPSC8jctcC-fwVZucd5ysc1PtVwcsNc5k7UDn4HmPiXutvC6jx4)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Since day one, Hung has been the best husband and father for our family. I’m so grateful for his dedication to our family and country. Now, he’s ready to be the best U.S. Senator for Virginia - and here’s how I know he’s up for the job. Hung always puts others before himself. Whether it’s the sacrifices he made serving in the U.S. Navy to always making time for our five children, he does everything he can to make sure our country and our family are taken care of. He always says what he means, and he’s not afraid to make hard decisions. Hung isn’t afraid to get the job done - even when it means ruffling feathers. I admire his honesty, his bravery, and his dedication to defending the American Dream for our children. T This isn’t just about politics for Hung, Peter. This is personal. Hung knows the American Dream is possible - because he’s lived it. He came to America not knowing a word of English after escaping Communist Vietnam. By the time he graduated high school, he had a spot at the U.S. Naval Academy. He owes his life to America, and he’s paid it back every way possible. But just because his career in the Navy is over doesn’t mean he’s done fighting. Hung isn’t the kind to stand on the sidelines, and when he saw what Joe Biden with the help of Tim Kaine, was doing to our country, he knew he had to take action. Now, we need you to take action too. Thank you, April Cao Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Liars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676627%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SjnFybw2rySRRBJw0uhnvQ&sysid=1)
Hey Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American}: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676628%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ust%2f92PV5t00m12iraBNkw&sysid=1)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676629%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Me5CW5GewOLkglOjTMhBlA&sysid=1)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676627%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SjnFybw2rySRRBJw0uhnvQ&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let's prove them wrong._Together_.**

| [** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676620%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=37GMs9CNXovHVIwMIzdPzw&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676621%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l8fDIblEnW%2bOFFRpeTGLJQ&sysid=1)

---

| |
---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

American Update

name: Sabina Matos
subject: We can make history today

| | Wow, I can't believe Election Day is already here. As I cast my ballot, I thought about my daughter being with me on the debate stage last week, and I was reminded why I’m running for Congress.I want a better future for my daughter. Right now, she has fewer rights than I did when I first came to this country. Folks, she deserves better. My daughter, your children, _everyone_ deserves better. And that's why I'm in this fight. I'm determined to be a champion of the people to secure them a better and brighter future. [**So, I'm personally asking you to chip in whatever you can before the polls close tonight. I'm counting on just 100 or so grassroots folks like you to step up with an urgent donation to power our final GOTV efforts and keep RI-01 blue**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69219877/425468167/-93024851?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.09.05_B1_Election-Day_30o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTE2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTNhMDQyOC1mMTRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PN7CB8enjd4v1pMJ3lH2znUpJn6kFa4nBM0I9fOKmV4=)

subject: Join me in endorsing Ryan Mackenzie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress
body:

---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ea7935a398134ec4b4a848c5c4a33dc9&_e=FFSnbnJteN9RZBuj7LbNH1HlC4bhwkagnEVSFb-TlBmHjOuoTRSw5PixA9fEqWhjdEea8TjHvG1m1kcRB1TLdFcNBcSf1NyaBsyLeJ_OQPdL4Pz2fK_bz1B8zwCuLCZR9lFBdhvYE4AWdNPuR3gNOl6L6Yexjswt629a-_jk_T_kAVedkana9ZBd0pDBOSbnZIwFB7FAe2tbyjhSJVSuP5TvPZsz4vOyf9JVsUvY6IqqA_fQaKTWWohqYX8BKwVBagsEi_Rpz1P9YwX6ZRhRBxeP0ziGm9VVnOhTFm1RHfV6m18o6DN1-J9G4dwKl9ZroYthzY3LSZ36gCm0mTGm6bAzQCZftm7W3KkUmcEDuhwdZCieUFtDtIuqBM9MQHGb2nTc2c_AcEj9zYe7ZZVusyx_yoTgnR5y1eBqgsgzfCw%3D)

Fellow American,

Being chosen to represent our nation, our history, our values, and our people is an honor unlike any other.

I know because when President Trump asked me to serve as the U.S. Ambassador to Denmark, I felt the weight of the responsibility asked of me.

In that moment – and in the weeks and months to come – I learned something that I thought I knew, but didn’t fully grasp: how important it is to elect strong leaders in every branch of our government if we are to fulfill the promise our nation was founded upon.

[**That is why I am endorsing Ryan Mackenzie for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 7th District.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ea7935a398134ec4b4a848c5c4a33dc9&_e=FFSnbnJteN9RZBuj7LbNH1HlC4bhwkagnEVSFb-TlBmHjOuoTRSw5PixA9fEqWhjdEea8TjHvG1m1kcRB1TLdFcNBcSf1NyaBsyLeJ_OQPdL4Pz2fK_bz1B8zwCuLCZR9lFBdhvYE4AWdNPuR3gNOl6L6Yexjswt629a-_jk_T_kAVedkana9ZBd0pDBOSbnZIwFB7FAe2tbyjhSJVSuP5TvPZsz4vOyf9JVsUvY6IqqA_fQaKTWWohqYX8BKwVBagsEi_Rpz1P9YwX6ZRhRB4X2lnatZMeKHarZX5Z1aCesLGvciQnKb8zwgi3kGjPfiXow0TEtk0Mmv1FEEZmwtltbhtZthGl0MhBrIDWet8Xun0eDgkeKvPf7TAzqwkM9ShUKO55_BUyo27TLfmQe1wLfjdb5L1wr6ocwZmMS4OM%3D)

Ryan Mackenzie is the America First candidate Pennsylvania needs. Our country is in real danger and the only way to turn it around is with leaders who are as proven as they are principled. Ryan fits the bill, and I am pleased to support him in his campaign for Congress.

Ryan is 100% committed to restoring the conservative policies that were so successful under President Trump’s administration. In fact, he is the only candidate who both shares that vision for America AND has a proven record of backing up what he says with real action and results!

From fighting illegal immigration to protecting American jobs and workers, Ryan has always put America First. He will do the same in Washington.

**But Ryan can’t do it without our help!**

[**Please join me in supporting Ryan today by contributing to his campaign today. All you need to do is visit RyanForPa.com!**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ea7935a398134ec4b4a848c5c4a33dc9&_e=FFSnbnJteN9RZBuj7LbNH1HlC4bhwkagnEVSFb-TlBmHjOuoTRSw5PixA9fEqWhjdEea8TjHvG1m1kcRB1TLdFcNBcSf1NyaBsyLeJ_OQPdL4Pz2fK_bz1B8zwCuLCZR9lFBdhvYE4AWdNPuR3gNOl6L6Yexjswt629a-_jk_T_kAVedkana9ZBd0pDBOSbnZIwFB7FAe2tbyjhSJVSuP5TvPZsz4vOyf9JVsUvY6IqqA_fQaKTWWohqYX8BKwVBagsEi_Rpz1P9YwX6ZRhRBxXk6v0fjLzu1LkuoqkmKQ802-s5sqDlzZ_sji0D8jfUwzf1Ifdc_mFSBcUsyxSfVdc9F9u0U9YCcetDo2cRev3MWtEpEXCj48J5mW4ZX_-DZChR3dVsBN74xACGTJYvoNQosWlN-EFTsFdpUfAjlmU%3D)

Please, if you care about the future of our great nation, join me in supporting Ryan Mackenzie today.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=ea7935a398134ec4b4a848c5c4a33dc9&_e=FFSnbnJteN9RZBuj7LbNH1HlC4bhwkagnEVSFb-TlBmHjOuoTRSw5PixA9fEqWhjdEea8TjHvG1m1kcRB1TLdFcNBcSf1NyaBsyLeJ_OQPdL4Pz2fK_bz1B8zwCuLCZR9lFBdhvYE4AWdNPuR3gNOl6L6Yexjswt629a-_jk_T_kAVedkana9ZBd0pDBOSbnZIwFB7FAe2tbyjhSJVSuP5TvPZsz4vOyf9JVsUvY6IqqA_fQaKTWWohqYX8BKwVBagsEi_Rpz1P9YwX6ZRhRB6f-nuWGrEghA6JavC1Wb-2rm-s2klEnpgdqqyvX2sAM9DSbzAQINgiZX83Ni0ZGlYB0pF2XPBJ6dvXgnQZJsMppTJ-Bq-aYG03e8STxilLJMUpTN85uC5KkOyt3AJF5hqTGAlRwulxWVq1KfMixn5g%3D)
Carla Sands
Fmr. Ambassador to Denmark

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan’s first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It’s that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: “Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin.”

In Pennsylvania’s state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn’t just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

clean_body: Please, if you care about the future of our great nation, join me in supporting Ryan Mackenzie today. | | Fellow American, Being chosen to represent our nation, our history, our values, and our people is an honor unlike any other. I know because when President Trump asked me to serve as the U.S. Ambassador to Denmark, I felt the weight of the responsibility asked of me. In that moment – and in the weeks and months to come – I learned something that I thought I knew, but didn’t fully grasp: how important it is to elect strong leaders in every branch of our government if we are to fulfill the promise our nation was founded upon. Ryan Mackenzie is the America First candidate Pennsylvania needs. Our country is in real danger and the only way to turn it around is with leaders who are as proven as they are principled. Ryan fits the bill, and I am pleased to support him in his campaign for Congress. Ryan is 100% committed to restoring the conservative policies that were so successful under President Trump’s administration. In fact, he is the only candidate who both shares that vision for America AND has a proven record of backing up what he says with real action and results! From fighting illegal immigration to protecting American jobs and workers, Ryan has always put America First. He will do the same in Washington. But Ryan can’t do it without our help! Please, if you care about the future of our great nation, join me in supporting Ryan Mackenzie today. Sincerely, Carla Sands Fmr. Ambassador to Denmark MEET RYAN * When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers. A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan’s first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching. It’s that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: “Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin.” In Pennsylvania’s state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn’t just talk – he got our values enacted into law. | | Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress

Senator JD Vance's August was a busy one! See all what the _Hillbilly on the Hill_ has been up to across Ohio and in Washington. Thanks! [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmK2o1OpigxEmnyurKZhU5dAmLBou4bIEBtKmzfiCGb8YHe65cDCJTcuU4naao-vo7jPYnCFbUfk-F5ZhaiDeDZ4f3doBZgpz2UnsW4dckmo7k4Nhx0fmFR0EFSOgI1dxE7T8qNSXS_qwMm2-jqNnoXc2dYDYesUdEgIkOYb_qn0pnNyzpJWzjMERivrP2tezzKBz_tY6sGklqo97ehrbNULZgTL6RfC7UO4iTLbdPpPPwoXm_woBQN3UiuxX368LwJdjNcLjfbl9h5cucWAt5xdtQVf6kgHsuyRCLjFzbTEhCZ9M9D7NOjDCgTMnv15Z8BR1CgIj56nJ6dMf8IUhNh0oADDPNUDdho9tB-kOwgHu) **' HE'S A SENATOR WHO WILL PUT OHIO FIRST - SOMETHING HIS OPPONENTS QUESTIONED THROUGHOUT THE 2022 CAMPAIGN'** ([The Cincinnati Enquirer](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmK2o1OpigxEmnyurKZhU5dAmLBou4bIEBtKmzfiCGb8YHe65cDCJTcuU4naao-vo7jPYnCFbUfk-F5ZhaiDeDZ4f3doBZgpz2UnsW4dckmo7k4Nhx0fmFR0EFSOgI1dxE7T8qNSXS_qwMm2-jqNnoXc2dYDYesUdEgIkOYb_qn0pnNyzpJWzjMERivrP2tezzKBz_tY6sGklqo97ehrbNUKPGaTX3Qxd-8gWCYuQUCOdePU0zCS8hdy6miWCHzXM0H1OZzGGEIv8bKO2BcxsFxSIbOjQASBX-8a5-qxC2_ZIE7L7NLPb2vpyNknOYpZ2nUzPJRV7zVUFFKdqWLoIXU8CLokGiGui8ND2NgUrsOMP))-- Eight months into his first term, the freshman Republican senator is reaching across the aisle to get things done. But he's still not afraid to make people mad.

That's the Vance Ohio voters came to know on the campaign trail, the one at the core of his first months as a senator: Someone unafraid to wade into the muck and speak his mind, even if it grates his critics or members of his own party.

At the same time, he's made strange bedfellows with colleagues across the aisle to tackle manufacturing issues and crack down on bank executives. Vance doesn't idealize bipartisanship, and that's not really his goal. The Iraq War, he likes to point out, was bipartisan and considered by many to be a massive failure.

But the junior senator and "Hillbilly Elegy" author is interested in getting things done.

Read the entire _Enquirer_ article [here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmK2o1OpigxEmnyurKZhU5dAmLBou4bIEBtKmzfiCGb8YHe65cDCJTcuU4naao-vo7jPYnCFbUfk-F5ZhaiDeDZ4f3doBZgpz2UnsW4dckmo7k4Nhx0fmFR0EFSOgI1dxE7T8qNSXS_qwMm2-jqNnoXc2dYDYesUdEgIkOYb_qn0pnNyzpJWzjMERivrP2tezzKBz_tY6sGklqo97ehrbNUIYE0Bu4AEVew-7jL72fDlYiI5DHUY4QRHoOqE15EK6nOJVdaS8B9gzZGGIelxy4TQcn04oVon7P_sz_YcRg6PgeBueJNwd_Je_OJ9_KEMRNw2BfTJE4DMm-YsE3DAFxF4BzL-3Uy0zfK-1EuWYnV_Y) [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmLYaPyxnI0PAv7EzYTLIWj0fxCHaBXHa46X_cLkcmrAG-9IP2ymyqv4fSRiGCs71YdLkcLw_9EOIJW1P_r15emR_FkTxs9wnrrR4FfA36j_-lwZ3aEJ7ER6nfXss33OUr9PJZOnpt9pwwLQTGoE3jNXWUgTEYxqXhGt8GTNRXH7uYOvNRuVdi4vX2UqofsUK4xqa5Shktyn4xvhkuJXUyy4%3D) **' OVER 100 DAYS AGO, JOE BIDEN PROMISED HE WOULD VISIT EAST PALESTINE. HE HAS BROKEN THAT PROMISE'**([Fox News](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmLYaPyxnI0PAv7EzYTLIWj0fxCHaBXHa46X_cLkcmrAG-9IP2ymyqv4fSRiGCs71YcAiYVX-2KwK5o4kbE_VQXFBZv8WN2F3TLinR6_uCpiFPIfg1U6KGPIq4Atz2n9jbwpKybO-PL1kqrtbPc9IGGl1E_vYLWw0Po9BVQ-nfYXmk20Py_r7d7UhcMdRORL4KRhW2CMHIWElima0kGaIc_c%3D)) - Senator Vance joined Fox News' Sean Hannity to discuss Joe Biden's abandonment of East Palestine.

[Watch](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmLYaPyxnI0PAv7EzYTLIWj0fxCHaBXHa46X_cLkcmrAG-9IP2ymyqv4fSRiGCs71YcwMm3tXkZVrhV6TsODT-SDisnpBJ1fCdYKaSQTK62xDoK5RnJrXK7NJBXHnZtbyKw2R2Bz8okUxeASRSnMg1zh078vUaI0nsGCDVC6k4MrTd3UhD-T2J0sgPzXlUi8KLSaTqVPbqvE_Dbp_AZw3M7E%3D): [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmLYaPyxnI0PAv7EzYTLIWj0fxCHaBXHa46X_cLkcmrAG-9IP2ymyqv4fSRiGCs71YUS4DCxOcTk4XLzgJOmlLdrU6GmpFqlZghTdf0PxzpemBZENAtfVmjogcgvC4lTJiJytygRoiF4Tk4f3lWrhjGhqVeqiCqvVZvsHr9SVesca07t_aLn0DJskR2qNvrxr-z3pmt34nrIEKOgySE5p5zY%3D)[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmDGLKm9y0Ch8cKeSvhRi2eaCuGRLRmlZAaS7EOEDarImNKMaRYYNj2CIF3sVFhyWeIOUeiPLddwtk63rXaVxzEXCJgkmdz25f6fgdzsC5P-FomywqdmNhC0SdtRauoEo-5AiHVZEhDyR_42rZUBCzT3x0u02s9luLv-ayDVTuto6zTwNv9vHLxfTdE5OZdKnydGwkogv-dfBGEPDi0vhtNIr5ADyOWfWAUkD3r_L_WIW) **' CONFOUNDING EXPECTATIONS IS TURNING INTO SOMETHING OF A HABIT FOR VANCE'** ([Washington Examiner](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmDGLKm9y0Ch8cKeSvhRi2eaCuGRLRmlZAaS7EOEDarImNKMaRYYNj2CIF3sVFhyWeIOUeiPLddwtk63rXaVxzEXh5RRWKds0Kg8Pvnho1NHky3qYiSRHKsVPi3LBGAphLytMYF9L3ImI26mxv4e5RYyKZvCuOBn9rHcem2A8ERKLsWVZLlPE7wqWGSXp4ta7Xeu79xW9ZVmffAi_nZt5fodyldWhIUODAh5JEvJab_Xk)) -- Eight months after winning Ohio's U.S. Senate seat over Democrat Tim Ryan and a year after winning one of the wildest, smash-mouth primary races in the Buckeye State's history, with both races having former President Donald Trump's hands all over them, Vance is not the fire-breather the press predicted he would be. Neither, of course, is he his mild and wonkish predecessor, former Sen. Rob Portman.

Vance is just fine not fitting in any of those molds...

Vance is still a conservative populist, still a hardcore Trump supporter. But he has also introduced legislation with Sens. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), Tammy Baldwin (D-WI), and Mark Kelly (D-AZ).

Vance smiles at the notion of not fitting into someone else's caricature of him.

Read the entire _Washington Examiner_ piece [here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmDGLKm9y0Ch8cKeSvhRi2eaCuGRLRmlZAaS7EOEDarImNKMaRYYNj2CIF3sVFhyWeIOUeiPLddwtk63rXaVxzEUpHWUuMLwmHMBfiRDzftsHH7vYFS5qkTsuXMVmX5rECXWCaoNYdhLLRPzWDNafwvYtZNgmf_jBpOKL5wfarHzKeJrL7o-BiMhJC0-szK7jQMWgqqByQ9hkH7XZilh44UO-HHRXYDzpGTue2qCjd5mE)

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmE7Y1EpGpWr4C80jBA9XN5Oj_EBubvSVa0bhXhi-U43V450LZRLnAwl6OrrUGs5_thYtRjI4DAzCccrlIw-82gXQoDktrlboX8yTvu-RYqckLiZ1fx28q9EDHGjpXJEU4eEqPS44LIoxfKeD9uz267dfmLmI2RTV5O4EBDqEAAJdwFUxjX5tbfIbHFH2ZdlJS0hfmcUOLnzFXBxoAQGnydUrjBhxtGsYQ_1R6Dx2CglHAeF32nZiezUdRAVZ9FU95VhWzfJk64VmhZ5sGiOxhCbwzBBvKqZjqJbv3ui24qv1v_gqilLb3El_kvlen8ZMM7h6Lc6WUP7Kdo2F90orDp1cmU1-2qZUjgexhX6FlOmDQsVDtXm8uMTPzirUpvMdHg%3D%3D) **' NOT ONLY HAS JOE BIDEN REFUSED TO VISIT EAST PALESTINE, BUT HE HAS ALSO REFUSED TO GRANT CRITICAL ASSISTANCE TO THE RECOVERY EFFORT'** ([The Columbus Dispatch](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmE7Y1EpGpWr4C80jBA9XN5Oj_EBubvSVa0bhXhi-U43V450LZRLnAwl6OrrUGs5_thYtRjI4DAzCccrlIw-82gXQoDktrlboX8yTvu-RYqckLiZ1fx28q9EDHGjpXJEU4eEqPS44LIoxfKeD9uz267dfmLmI2RTV5O4EBDqEAAJdwFUxjX5tbfIbHFH2ZdlJS0hfmcUOLnzFXBxoAQGnydUrjBhxtGsYQ_1R6Dx2CglHB31TQkJovXv537b2ESSd5mqNyXUmSV6H9T9gS41Qb1fE5DFj0XpTDZ9nVEJSdBAo643VhEf3mfrtveyN9VUCEGWvPnE2IdcsMdKh4b1onOBVYK7dCvXDr4Nr-efTuqnSVte4IspvOIbsVbjEm-4uZw%3D%3D)) -- Senator Vance penned an Op-ed calling on the Biden Administration to provide help to the residents of East Palestine.

Read Senator Vance's piece [here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmE7Y1EpGpWr4C80jBA9XN5Oj_EBubvSVa0bhXhi-U43V450LZRLnAwl6OrrUGs5_thYtRjI4DAzCccrlIw-82gXQoDktrlboX8yTvu-RYqckLiZ1fx28q9EDHGjpXJEU4eEqPS44LIoxfKeD9uz267dfmLmI2RTV5O4EBDqEAAJdwFUxjX5tbfIbHFH2ZdlJS0hfmcUOLnzFXBxoAQGnydUrjBhxtGsYQ_1R6Dx2CglHPKEGGzplTXkJycD-z4a1G6xyOM51_vtKzTxbtL8Ne3Amr9UBIZneUQk4rsfRhB2uBTmmpHX6xpmFuqiE0DQrfSFTbjUA1zKOZkhC2AJCH3Zb8OEnXSeYN68FHQ2LtWCpXEN4OAdo8QPb51_X1hPqIQ%3D%3D). [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmE7Y1EpGpWr4C80jBA9XN5Oj_EBubvSVa0bhXhi-U43V450LZRLnAwl6OrrUGs5_thYtRjI4DAzCccrlIw-82gXQoDktrlboX8yTvu-RYqckLiZ1fx28q9EDHGjpXJEU4eEqPS44LIoxfKeD9uz267dfmLmI2RTV5O4EBDqEAAJdwFUxjX5tbfIbHFH2ZdlJS0hfmcUOLnzFXBxoAQGnydUrjBhxtGsYQ_1R6Dx2CglHGMzVb1ZFYK6CdaenCkw6wK9E6-2dPkA2r37QEuWoF5FSKSMPAnqx_iYcXEzia8PODHtNKe3Viz53h_MseeXbjCmsQl-JKcyHT3l67qhRbS_YHcsfk-Q3wlEtWAdRyEzWCV07NvXVHsom_BB03gaxNA%3D%3D)[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmFsQ6Omr3hNolHOS3KNbqVcdw-Rv_Y39KjYg9ar0nTXScQA7lqtqHo_rdJmzstv6i47M6PhDdGIKDC2rPyIqek8MB6k7F-iwx15ZUd6xdi_GgVY2Qw1MLVHugBEZB8Mq74y1P0oKoVUzAwc_bZO_xfg_DMkQK8WzTzIfGe2JywWeJxXv10gey245N6abLI61Rf67jKhYi7QZNLqt2ljW8U_EB5CEClI0qBJQbCoGG8vI7AzKlmCavXKDKq9kwxvMd76wNNoy_jvDbFTvTkga_IxrPwuOhK-CZjiXcSYs_5oZTZsEVZ-K8RQxJ1RgKzx6hw%3D%3D) **' THE PATHS OF DEALMAKER AND CULTURE WARRIOR SO FAR HAVE BEEN MORE OF AN INTERSECTION THAN A CROSSROADS FOR VANCE'** ([Cleveland.com](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=24964bc627c64d4b8c3f9d6c982b19df&_e=kVNIQO9vNrST7ARL6lFYmFsQ6Omr3hNolHOS3KNbqVcdw-Rv_Y39KjYg9ar0nTXScQA7lqtqHo_rdJmzstv6i47M6PhDdGIKDC2rPyIqek8MB6k7F-iwx15ZUd6xdi_GgVY2Qw1MLVHugBEZB8Mq74y1P0oKoVUzAwc_bZO_xfihzAZ4-afsYpDr8kAJyIKgFTCOhH9QxjmcmfCYhUY6BMGnwc-iRn-s9O7gyYQnkxxQu6WiI8R2F9qQBnBDnzj2Mv-Svb0oVjCws7FCWm0nOv044vp7cr05koKU297p9I17vo1LWe1av_XvDO8ftI88_tc06Rz8G-o5LLyAcX16QA%3D%3D)) -- On the campaign trail, Vance fashioned himself as the sort of conservative fighter that supporters of former President Donald Trump had come to embrace as the new face of the Republican Party. That brand of politics would seem to put Vance at odds with his colleagues across the aisle...

[But] Vance has kicked off his Senate career by reaching across the aisle to work with Democrats on several bills. He teamed up with a bipartisan group including Cleveland's Sherrod Brown on a bill aimed at improving rail safety in the wake of a catastrophic derailment in East Palestine. He joined a group led by Massachusetts' Elizabeth Warren on legislation that would claw back the salaries of rogue financial institution executives in the wake of high profile bank collapses at Silicon Valley and Signature banks.

At the same time, he's embraced divisive culture war issues and been a vocal backer of Trump's bid to return to office. Vance calls criminal indictments of Trump "a complete sham," and maintains President Joe Biden is using the Department of Justice to "go after his political rivals." "To my surprise, none of the schools that received my letter on July 6 responded to these queries in good faith. Instead, each school responded with generalized and dismissive statements.
