clean_body: | -- Senator JD Vance's August was a busy one! See all what the Hillbilly on the Hill has been up to across Ohio and in Washington. Thanks! ' HE'S A SENATOR WHO WILL PUT OHIO FIRST - SOMETHING HIS OPPONENTS QUESTIONED THROUGHOUT THE 2022 CAMPAIGN' ()-- Eight months into his first term, the freshman Republican senator is reaching across the aisle to get things done. But he's still not afraid to make people mad. That's the Vance Ohio voters came to know on the campaign trail, the one at the core of his first months as a senator: Someone unafraid to wade into the muck and speak his mind, even if it grates his critics or members of his own party. At the same time, he's made strange bedfellows with colleagues across the aisle to tackle manufacturing issues and crack down on bank executives. Vance doesn't idealize bipartisanship, and that's not really his goal. The Iraq War, he likes to point out, was bipartisan and considered by many to be a massive failure. But the junior senator and "Hillbilly Elegy" author is interested in getting things done. Read the entire Enquirer article ' OVER 100 DAYS AGO, JOE BIDEN PROMISED HE WOULD VISIT EAST PALESTINE. HE HAS BROKEN THAT PROMISE'() - Senator Vance joined Fox News' Sean Hannity to discuss Joe Biden's abandonment of East Palestine. : ' CONFOUNDING EXPECTATIONS IS TURNING INTO SOMETHING OF A HABIT FOR VANCE' () -- Eight months after winning Ohio's U.S. Senate seat over Democrat Tim Ryan and a year after winning one of the wildest, smash-mouth primary races in the Buckeye State's history, with both races having former President Donald Trump's hands all over them, Vance is not the fire-breather the press predicted he would be. Neither, of course, is he his mild and wonkish predecessor, former Sen. Rob Portman. Vance is just fine not fitting in any of those molds... Vance is still a conservative populist, still a hardcore Trump supporter. But he has also introduced legislation with Sens. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), Tammy Baldwin (D-WI), and Mark Kelly (D-AZ). Vance smiles at the notion of not fitting into someone else's caricature of him. Read the entire Washington Examiner piece ' NOT ONLY HAS JOE BIDEN REFUSED TO VISIT EAST PALESTINE, BUT HE HAS ALSO REFUSED TO GRANT CRITICAL ASSISTANCE TO THE RECOVERY EFFORT' () -- Senator Vance penned an Op-ed calling on the Biden Administration to provide help to the residents of East Palestine. Read Senator Vance's piece . ' THE PATHS OF DEALMAKER AND CULTURE WARRIOR SO FAR HAVE BEEN MORE OF AN INTERSECTION THAN A CROSSROADS FOR VANCE' () -- On the campaign trail, Vance fashioned himself as the sort of conservative fighter that supporters of former President Donald Trump had come to embrace as the new face of the Republican Party. That brand of politics would seem to put Vance at odds with his colleagues across the aisle... [But] Vance has kicked off his Senate career by reaching across the aisle to work with Democrats on several bills. He teamed up with a bipartisan group including Cleveland's Sherrod Brown on a bill aimed at improving rail safety in the wake of a catastrophic derailment in East Palestine. He joined a group led by Massachusetts' Elizabeth Warren on legislation that would claw back the salaries of rogue financial institution executives in the wake of high profile bank collapses at Silicon Valley and Signature banks. At the same time, he's embraced divisive culture war issues and been a vocal backer of Trump's bid to return to office. Vance calls criminal indictments of Trump "a complete sham," and maintains President Joe Biden is using the Department of Justice to "go after his political rivals." Vance put a hold on Senate approval of all Justice Department nominees to protest what he calls Trump's "unprecedented political prosecution" as well as the nation's "two-tiered justice system." Read the entire Cleveland.com article . ' OHIO IS LEADING THE WAY TO A BRIGHTER FUTURE BY TAPPING THE UTICA SHALE, AND I WILL NOT STOP FIGHTING FOR OUR ENERGY INDUSTRY TO RECEIVE THE INFRASTRUCTURE IT NEEDS TO FUEL OUR ECONOMY'() -- Senator Vance penned an Op-ed in support of Ohio tapping the Utica Shale. "In a time of grinding inflation, increasing energy costs and continuing global instability, we Ohioans are lucky to live on top of the Utica Shale oil and gas basin. "Stretching across Appalachian Ohio and into our neighboring states, the Utica Shale is a vast, underground reserve of energy containing an estimated 38 trillion cubic feet of natural gas, 940 million barrels of oil and 208 million barrels of natural gas liquids." Read Senator Vance's entire piece . ' THE MEN AND WOMEN TASKED WITH MAINTAINING FEDERAL DATABASES OR MANAGING OUR SATELLITES SHOULD BE CITIZENS OR PERMANENT RESIDENTS WITH SOME STAKE IN THE FUTURE OF OUR NATION' () -- Sen. J.D. Vance is pressing the Department of Justice (DOJ) for information regarding its lawsuit against SpaceX -- which claims Elon Musk's rocket company "failed to fairly consider or hire asylees and refugees" -- probing Attorney General Merrick Garland on whether the action is politically motivated. Read the entire Breitbart article . ' FOR THOUSANDS OF SMALL BUSINESSES, THE IRS HASN'T ONLY FAILED TO CHANGE ITS WAYS, IT'S GOTTEN WORSE' () -- Senator Vance penned an Op-ed in The Wall Street Journal calling out the IRS for remaining dysfunctional despite $80B in new funding and 87,000 new agents. Read Senator Vance's piece . ' IT WOULD BE A TERRIBLE MISTAKE TO ALLOW A FOREIGN COMPANY TO BUY US STEEL' () -- Ohio Republican Sen. JD Vance is calling on a storied American steel company to reject foreign entity buyout offers to protect their shareholders and the country. Vance sent a letter to U.S. Steel CEO David Burritt and board Chairman David Sutherland expressing his "interest in the formal review of strategic alternatives" of the steel giant's buyout prospects. "The recent announcement signaled a turning point not only for the iconic American company but for an industry of strategic national importance," Vance wrote. Read the entire Fox Business article . ' IT WOULD GREATLY BENEFIT OHIOANS AND ALL AMERICANS IF OUR GOVERNMENT COULD BE COUNTED ON TO DEFEND OUR FOUNDING FATHERS, INSTEAD OF CAPITULATING TO POLITICALLY MOTIVATED RENAMING EFFORTS' () -- The USDA Forest Service wants to change the name of Wayne National Forest in southeastern Ohio. Senator JD Vance, R-Ohio, sent a letter to Tom Vilsack, Secretary of the U.S. Department of Agriculture, and Randy Moore, Chief of the U.S. Forest Service, opposing the name change. Vance said the name change "denigrates Ohio history and represents a lack of fidelity to our nation's founding generation." Read the entire WKBN article . ' TO MY SURPRISE, NONE OF THE SCHOOLS THAT RECEIEVED MY LETTER RESPONDED IN GOOD FAITH' () -- In case any colleges and universities were looking to violate the U.S. Supreme Court's rulings from June that ended affirmative action, Sen. JD Vance (R-OH) not long after sent a letter to multiple elite schools putting them on notice. Vance has now sent another one assuring compliance, this time to the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) and the Department of Justice (DOJ). "To my surprise, none of the schools that received my letter on July 6 responded to these queries in good faith. Instead, each school responded with generalized and dismissive statements. Reading through the responsive letters, I was struck by their uncanny similarity, both in substance and structure," he wrote with original emphasis, with may suggest collusion already occurring. name: Nikki Haley
subject: taking a few minutes to share my story
body:
If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | |
---
| | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=fa19d8f98eac4a0a97f0928784f655d9&_t=-PaZeUqyCQIjsiw8NBs1RyuFCx_6E1R2a0kZh_l0oR7A4J-TR18DyjacBQ2Mji4PtWNKEmV32wKhoeD_SIoLcxszH8PtldT6dMhzQBI9XDU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=fa19d8f98eac4a0a97f0928784f655d9&_t=-PaZeUqyCQIjsiw8NBs1RyuFCx_6E1R2a0kZh_l0oR7A4J-TR18DyjacBQ2Mji4PtWNKEmV32wKhoeD_SIoLcxszH8PtldT6dMhzQBI9XDU%3D)

|
Hi Fellow Conservative,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa19d8f98eac4a0a97f0928784f655d9&_e=JiI46AkcdaGtRGpyYSSgb1-AfGS0DshIZKWTVlKg35WoCzWOdoZNhpP8GVGGDx8v8iD2jmLagLohpm4CAISalVMY8hddxKfCQz2hCZkEiydgsq7jVyGwsdvD_BP7xbINQAt-NKmZTndhI4WJas8o14jukDBuvQAMfLjfOM_lmkjmZMwEujb1x8FNig3p8B1KFCGNzJf0XoOXqbqNQbCEl6U5Yk4kCYlshP_75fB_rtYiyklredlyx4dnOuhM6QdzXQujWObyJyowAzmeXsJPrxR0z__A6-2-5SfpJ0qde9wE5hNdbxQIL0lPzF8VN3H9rlyVYk8ewp7Pf1r1WsAUtHotOSjtEVq-Y4rJIbe-ACrwc8s8EiRxstDH98ge7H5U "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa19d8f98eac4a0a97f0928784f655d9&_e=JiI46AkcdaGtRGpyYSSgb1-AfGS0DshIZKWTVlKg35WoCzWOdoZNhpP8GVGGDx8v8iD2jmLagLohpm4CAISalVMY8hddxKfCQz2hCZkEiydgsq7jVyGwsdvD_BP7xbINQAt-NKmZTndhI4WJas8o14jukDBuvQAMfLjfOM_lmkjmZMwEujb1x8FNig3p8B1KFCGNzJf0XoOXqbqNQbCEl6U5Yk4kCYlshP_75fB_rtYGS1AK9S66Ag61LyhW9_6y4Q-_oQmbCP67iiQun0wFjjyRT3krQOFo26qft3jN-kkxlX1HE_nNc5ZrhgMFxy1sHmyaUldB77CHvEYa98TIlhmy7UeYY91lpkriviNLUbq4iJmxOHHn7Ebz7V_0l7iE)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa19d8f98eac4a0a97f0928784f655d9&_e=JiI46AkcdaGtRGpyYSSgb1-AfGS0DshIZKWTVlKg35WoCzWOdoZNhpP8GVGGDx8v8iD2jmLagLohpm4CAISalVMY8hddxKfCQz2hCZkEiydgsq7jVyGwsdvD_BP7xbINQAt-NKmZTndhI4WJas8o14jukDBuvQAMfLjfOM_lmkjmZMwEujb1x8FNig3p8B1KFCGNzJf0XoOXqbqNQbCEl6U5Yk4kCYlshP_75fB_rtarpWdSwmVKKrLA1ttaO4GbJ9NIjuSoosHLDcgfG9Ps4ZjDLopC_B7Hjjp9VnbsKA1CAbwn2q8Lc6KAmILIFYe5IXVi8bZ1RFHxzuoW4FnOHuVaMkZ87xI6vH_hlPQ1hGlffANkFrTe9V6gHu51EDrL)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa19d8f98eac4a0a97f0928784f655d9&_e=JiI46AkcdaGtRGpyYSSgb1-AfGS0DshIZKWTVlKg35WoCzWOdoZNhpP8GVGGDx8v8iD2jmLagLohpm4CAISalVMY8hddxKfCQz2hCZkEiydgsq7jVyGwsdvD_BP7xbINQAt-NKmZTndhI4WJas8o14jukDBuvQAMfLjfOM_lmkjmZMwEujb1x8FNig3p8B1KFCGNzJf0XoOXqbqNQbCEl6U5Yk4kCYlshP_75fB_rtZTbdeVeE4XtRGFcvQGI-3Xsry936dBKq7vxXc55nrxcLe7Zf6pRZBZ7sSdB95_r5yPwjpvPseA30LDYXW2bsUkCw34z0sNYMKu69NOxCQ8tROpFJfOXqcmbuHQhVrZ9LxLqrViASn8Og0AUZM5oJpL)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fa19d8f98eac4a0a97f0928784f655d9&_e=JiI46AkcdaGtRGpyYSSgb1-AfGS0DshIZKWTVlKg35WoCzWOdoZNhpP8GVGGDx8v8iD2jmLagLohpm4CAISalVMY8hddxKfCQz2hCZkEiydgsq7jVyGwsdvD_BP7xbINQAt-NKmZTndhI4WJas8o14jukDBuvQAMfLjfOM_lmkjmZMwEujb1x8FNig3p8B1KFCGNzJf0XoOXqbqNQbCEl6U5Yk4kCYlshP_75fB_rtZItAEllL05d6TZI_XHGaOz0RE_B180AbotHS9l1HjGzDp41NE0CW0V0WKqbNnHETYA8z6x5KfoYoxPM90KCUcyyNGqA8jqXzuODbUmvvmmvlULqSfAwRcOshV-3ty0_4VudSGGDz9vcZEw0_mfL20L "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> ")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

clean_body: If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | | | | | | | | | Hi Fellow Conservative, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. **Peter, we can’t build a better Texas – or a better nation – without hope. **
Hope can be hard to find right now. From the assault on abortion rights and voting rights, to persistent gun violence, to disasters brought on by climate change—sometimes it can feel like the deck is stacked against us.
**_But when I talk to people across Texas I am filled with hope._** Because I’ve seen that when we work together and take action together, we can build a better future for all of us.
We can build an economy that works for working people, not just big corporations.
We can restore abortion rights and civil rights.
We can save our planet and our democracy for generations to come.
**That’s why I’m so excited to officially launch my re-election campaign!_Because this is our state, our home, and we’re not going anywhere._**
**[CLICK HERE to watch my re-election launch video. And please consider chipping in $35 today to help me kick off my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69222649/425478632/2078950009?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRhYjNiZi1mNDRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BhOzuGf1Kk3_EZ5ahlwj0xsDringIa1dtG6Ihsz7Rpc=)**
Together we can build a better Texas and a better nation.

Thank you for your support,

-Greg

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoqq3d2hluk73ka2576v0jj7fearkugmleoprre0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvn8denhufi1gh4ie21nl4hct54i4d8geajanep0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zua528ftvhnbs4p6eejagd3k007326gjmfqt1gp0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsmou4hn1qp0h6pub46pnmpq17p1i9hdp2ffphio_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcca5pbgfron190h96l04b1t32ldpcilu041u8gg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7ore0r8d24ht6mnco9qifk3spk7eiikvntvn708_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrojk1fssfk8d338ta2bo6hthiq32q9jh0nebi80_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztcuv1n798oufhj6d5um0aju2s1t32jtha92e180_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4kunfdloabam8tts4v247eu3t663aa3lbsocg40_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4r1cb83ol7852kqe96cp15vbe1eu9j74jss5mv0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm7b2lah0cs95m0qljhfc15ti425elmgc6i666h0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrpp52t4d4h1ucmlf1kb8vl9snp7s11n8scj3a50_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs "I need your help â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z61fgkbjpf1jfp9q81cd4rjgsd41ah4jrts46tj0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd1i1o2jn6t0uij1d87ck383qun2tcglh59v6rco_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1gbmikbu71tid1hk3p8ccnuegfs0vq9ukil7fmg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ugt8l4q9a7q58fr4ck9oibbtjnkodvdmc2sms0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj66o74cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate." Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A little bit about me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We need a new generation of leaders who think differently, work harder, and never forget that we are public servants.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)

Friend --
An open Senate seat in Michigan is a rare opportunity. With the retirement of the great Senator Debbie Stabenow, Republicans will be doing everything they can to win this swing seat and control of the Senate.
**I’m running for Senate because we need a new generation of leaders who think differently, work harder, and _never forget_ that we are public servants.** Being of service to the American people means bringing passionate, pragmatic leadership to Washington.
Service is something I’ve done my entire adult life -- first in the CIA, where I served three tours in Iraq alongside the U.S. military, and later at the White House, State Department, and finally at the Pentagon, as an appointee of President Obama. Thanks to people like you, I’ve served two full terms in Congress, winning three extremely competitive elections in a Republican district.
**[A contribution of $3 or more today will help us show everyone we'll have what it takes to win this election. Please chip in today to help us raise the resources we need to win in this notorious swing state.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230905-1-30&amount=3&t=2&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-sep23.4B2XRE&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=21&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sep23.ftxq_S&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=22&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hxG7bS&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=23&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-sep23.Buc2ei&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=24&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-sep23.CyJnvg&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=25&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep23.owjc7j&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=26&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)**
---
****
But separate from my national security background, what motivated me to first run in 2018 was much more personal – my mom. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 – and she didn't have health insurance at the time. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience – of desperately trying to get her care at the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork – fueled me to run when the GOP threatened protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
Now Republicans want to put Social Security and Medicare on the same chopping block. Prescription drug costs continue to spiral out of control, and many have to choose between life-saving medicine and their rent or food. We are not settled, as a nation, on access to healthcare and this issue requires real change in Washington. **By winning this Senate seat, we’ll help ensure that Democrats retain the majority and can pass legislation that expands access to healthcare.**
**[Congress desperately needs a new approach to leadership. I would be the youngest Democratic woman in the Senate, if elected. Your contribution of $3 or more today will help us make sure everyone knows what’s at stake in this election.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230905-1-30&amount=3&t=27&akid=661%2E135344%2EScW6pt)

****

Thank you. I’m committed to doing everything in my power to be the principled leader that you deserve.
Onward!
Elissa

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676637%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e%2bzJ0HwVPPfmJdD9x%2biSBA&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

We're entering the final stretch of our campaign and this is still anyone's race. _Politico_ is calling the matchup between me and my McConnell-protégé opponent "dramatically close."

It's clear that this will be the most competitive race in the entire nation this year. That's why my opponent and four super PACs have announced or spent nearly $10 million to try and buy this race. They're ready to spend – and say – whatever it takes to undo our progress.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi6vaujnqn2hj77g2pjsc5tjuhvafo9ieo2hs3d8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5a2745iis5as9qnk1gajdt22gn756m8osml8sc8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr88jg3m0s7qgkg0p0nmnbvsh6li4vrq4jmv8t8o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7l1nqobfqhh2gosts613m18rhpfuge6mu6jeq38_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcio9vdprjr7kg6deqvq67mbuaojfgk4cl7j3mio_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhu856vsd5t13iavs23eeqe07bc044idpj94rvgo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znspuoffjcumup364d7dj1sqto0gconq44sn0oqg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdlf2n3uqt5hjg18oc5a3efn16pnqtacocf9bbi8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq8alv2spiu1b2rcusheqd9pf2ghgua85s1huh7o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0mdbq0utvg9a02n4d3pcuubltptumiqu4p97bm8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb7p9oftjotdrmrq367os6js5s7todl9i48c0pa8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2eeuiaub1fcm8454d8n537pflcmboskqs3rlal0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "I need your help â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zef8hsqc8jjjrbmgn4p1bkionc329i55f71riis8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgchnmlfkh4uvpik9j6o9tie6rvgks9fbvdpbgj8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqbqqkmub2jueohorodu1cj5k4jgirfks08hob4g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zja1kpqprkh7o0nke7d0chq8gifbncbeucppcumo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbc1lkii9102a5ic3r274f7rls69sfjesdjhemho_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt64br7v8n9ei0hon4b7rn8218rg3om8p8e0kneo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5cb32v42lgobvsaj0hrrpgf0578ia1j4onpcep0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate." Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. body:
This may be the first time you’ve heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.
---

**[I’m reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z58j3fbt6pu02572shhncg1hvshhfih1di302ang_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)** Before you ask, no: I’m not talking about the Presidential election. I’m not talking about threats from China. I’m not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that’s happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I’m talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You’ve seen what’s happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids’ mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what’s happening in our nation’s schools is an accident. Rather, it’s the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they’ve: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can’t do this without your help. Could you do me a personal favor and send in a donation of $17.76 or more to help the 1776 Project PAC get brave conservative school board candidates elected nationwide?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfujd7r9bncj55ls5crr1u2apfrhulq90q241e60_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)** **Friend****, if p atriots like you and I don’t stand up today, America’s destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas.** We cannot let that happen. **[That’s why I’m hoping and praying that you’ll join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC as they fight to take back our schools with a donation of just $17.76 today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zld59q4027f8q377j9l3sijfb3pp5qvhq4huo72o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjj61or6cdh2bs)** Thank you for taking the time to review this message. God Bless You, Ann Coulter, On Behalf of the 1776 Project PAC

name: Tim Scott for America
subject: 35 words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us

| |
---
| | | _"I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."_
Friend,

On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us, the American people.

We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction.

If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years.

Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American.

**We need Tim Scott as our next president!_[If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5643330758b64e2b98d73a42608c1c87&_e=8iCVHevnwSK-ozaJA9HOEODov-8LTMrPgF4CeH0Qiw4HwV_SZ-TrKiNCDq2Ufotn0WLR6InULcf5FFjeSsmIqegP-xCa04sgjoPTQd1e1iFGyGQ6enj3c6dPoRf29R__xns45fG4H4gmWAyP-0oI3WFh0uelwoyLWDXn-t1qnqXhkNMXZUSQRxjA5Yv-e__vM6P4hkSNMD2x27MJ9nlfQVXoKjoUw0zFTE7fKHSMRl8-TcB6MGrEsMOoKsJsI6FlTTIkfpdnHWtxi0vcKZ3umIe7voEgxpiGAncNDfTR8-0sG7KAcEX-AQUKis3t9jDQ0BbVTA8p7-biJ47ants6e94MNo14mBrb-WbP97HF85DBYfyA55T6viOKW7mdq8ilaliOTb7RTS5cIbBIwrboXGJu3rnIGtUz6JF73VIRH94%3D "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?")_**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5643330758b64e2b98d73a42608c1c87&_e=8iCVHevnwSK-ozaJA9HOEODov-8LTMrPgF4CeH0Qiw4HwV_SZ-TrKiNCDq2Ufotn0WLR6InULcf5FFjeSsmIqegP-xCa04sgjoPTQd1e1iFGyGQ6enj3c6dPoRf29R__xns45fG4H4gmWAyP-0oI3WFh0uelwoyLWDXn-t1qnqXhkNMXZUSQRxjA5Yv-e__vM6P4hkSNMD2x27MJ9nlfQVXoKjoUw0zFTE7fKHSMRl8-TcB6MGrEsMOoKsJsI6FlTTIkfpdnHWtxi0vcKZ3umKjC0ofSibeAl0k41pRxXUSO7VwuELQjSm4oKRl8kvFnplneRNQKcry2543BiNbJ-PzMXCRtx7IwFrq7bpDaNIfn-SwAgGYlz1aD7Q29EYMko45Pq5EO4zsKGb0AH4RsYaDKDRYAKxhgQ9hLmPFtQ14%3D "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

On Tim's first day in office, he will:
* Restart the Keystone Pipeline
* Secure the Border
* Stand up to China
* Restore Parental Rights

You can count on him to **FIRE** Attorney General Merrick Garland, **FIRE** FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government.

**Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5643330758b64e2b98d73a42608c1c87&_e=8iCVHevnwSK-ozaJA9HOEODov-8LTMrPgF4CeH0Qiw4HwV_SZ-TrKiNCDq2Ufotn0WLR6InULcf5FFjeSsmIqegP-xCa04sgjoPTQd1e1iFGyGQ6enj3c6dPoRf29R__xns45fG4H4gmWAyP-0oI3WFh0uelwoyLWDXn-t1qnqXhkNMXZUSQRxjA5Yv-e__vM6P4hkSNMD2x27MJ9nlfQVXoKjoUw0zFTE7fKHSMRl8-TcB6MGrEsMOoKsJsI6FlTTIkfpdnHWtxi0vcKZ3umGy9oDueOxVqvZRfVpH2662-w3jDO9AaPvtbbgGLju_yad7z4S7uPM8Tn_IfIGC8bbw8fmTzw9xhlhdIMKKow3wxYREjoMGAMy68MOUAbxNbBxWUYAz3unPsokR4zQSIL_WrEMkXfbyfSjet2slOXzw%3D "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT")
---

He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. **But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from.**

Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn't have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future.

Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He's going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream.

America's future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won't become reality unless we help Tim win!

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.
And if you're a man, you should play sports against men.

America needs more victors and less victims._

These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

clean_body: On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us | | | | | "I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States." Friend, On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us, the American people. We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction. If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years. Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American. We need Tim Scott as our next president! "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?" | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT" On Tim's first day in office, he will: Restart the Keystone Pipeline Secure the Border Stand up to China Restore Parental Rights You can count on him to FIRE Attorney General Merrick Garland, FIRE FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government. Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States. | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT" He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from. Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn't have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future. Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He's going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream. America's future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won't become reality unless we help Tim win! "Can you please make a contribution of any amount to support Tim Scott’s campaign?" | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT" Thank You, Tim Scott for America | | | "JOIN ME NOW" If you 're able-bodied, you work. If you take out a loan, you pay it back. And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail. And if you're a man, you should play sports against men. America needs more victors and less victims. These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them. "If you agree, will you join my team?" | | | "STAND WITH ME" Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country. I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy. "I need your help! name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Urgent: Supporting Maui
body:
Go to alfonsoforcongress.com to learn more! | | | | |
---
|
---
# Urgent: Supporting Maui
|
---
Today, I bring to your attention a matter of utmost urgency that affects our beautiful Maui and its residents.
Amidst the Maui fires and soaring temperatures, we must urgently address the global climate crisis.
While these events may seem far from our homes, they serve as reminders that the effects of climate change know no boundaries.
| [LEARN MORE](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=75a04a2b9c&e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
# High Temperatures Demand Action
|
---
Maui is battling unprecedented wildfires worsened by soaring temperatures, endangering lives and the island's essence.
While the Maui community is resilient, they cannot face these challenges alone.
It's times like these that remind us of the importance of standing together, and helping our neighbors
|
---
# Addressing Climate Change:
# A Call to Action
|
---
Extreme weather events, like the wildfires in Maui, are becoming more frequent and severe.
In Michigan, we've felt climate change's impact: intense heatwaves and shifting agriculture.
The urgency to address climate change and protect our environment has never been clearer.
I believe that we have a moral obligation to take action, not just for ourselves but for future generations.
Climate change is not a distant threat; it's happening now, and it's affecting us all
|
---
# EVERY DOLLAR
# COUNTS!
|
---
| [GIVE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=cc9c7b05b3&e=16d812e81c)
---
As your representative, I am committed to working tirelessly to address climate change, protect our environment, and build a sustainable future for Michigan.
But I can't do it alone.
I need your support, your ideas, and your engagement to make meaningful change.
Your involvement in these efforts is invaluable.
Let's stand together, not just for Maui or Michigan, but for the planet we all share. Together, we can make a difference.
Visit alfonsoforcongress.com and click "Give Today" to contribute securely.
Every donation, big or small, makes a difference.
Thank you for believing in our cause.
Together, we'll build a Michigan that works for everyone, reflecting the spirit of democracy.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Alfonso For Congress Team
| | | | [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=439573ce5c&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=a7f3271580&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=6a3edf2973&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=6800d86fb5&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=a00d15e3a7&e=16d812e81c)

body:
| Bumping Cinde’s Labor Day message from yesterday, because we still need a few more signatures from our supporters to stand up for working families. **_[Click here to make your voice heard!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69227771/425497396/1064042850?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230905_PT_laborday_1.2_1MO_website_na_na_laborday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2IyYjdmOC1mYzRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZJeQ7GQRFmHYLTajnyFNz-VSVsEwSOkUuuRnFu2Guw=&emci=f1b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f7b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)_**
* * *
**_Cinde’s Original Message:_** Hi there, today is Labor Day, when we come together to celebrate the labor movement and recommit to fight for the ideals it promises.

For three years, I have been the last line of defense on the Executive Council in the fight for the rights of all Granite Staters to be able to thrive. In my role, I was able to help our state employees get the biggest wage increase they’ve seen in decades, while pushing to deliver resources for job development, affordable housing, and child care across New Hampshire.

As your governor I will fight to make sure everyone in our state has the opportunity to get a good education, put a roof over their heads, have food on the table, and retire with dignity.

Now, this Labor Day, I want to hear from you. I’m asking you to join me in doubling-down on our commitment to working families. **_[Will you add your name to my Labor Day petition to show we’re not going to stop fighting for New Hampshire’s working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69227775/425497400/1064042850?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230905_PT_laborday_1.2_1MO_website_na_na_laborday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2IyYjdmOC1mYzRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZJeQ7GQRFmHYLTajnyFNz-VSVsEwSOkUuuRnFu2Guw=&emci=f1b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f7b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)_** | | **[Sign On: Support Working Families](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69227777/425497404/1064042850?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230905_PT_laborday_1.2_1MO_website_na_na_laborday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2IyYjdmOC1mYzRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZJeQ7GQRFmHYLTajnyFNz-VSVsEwSOkUuuRnFu2Guw=&emci=f1b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f7b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)**
---
This cause is personal to me: When my parents were first starting out, my father worked in a shipyard and my mother waited tables, but they were still able to buy a small house and provide for me and my three siblings.

I’ve been able to live my slice of the American Dream, but for too many working families in New Hampshire today that Dream is getting farther and farther out of reach.

And that’s exactly why I’ve always been a staunch advocate for the labor community. Unions built the middle class and attacks on unions are attacks on working families everywhere.

If you agree, join me in taking a stand for our shared values:

**_[https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/labor-day](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69227782/425497407/1064042850?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230905_PT_laborday_1.2_1MO_website_na_na_laborday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2IyYjdmOC1mYzRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZJeQ7GQRFmHYLTajnyFNz-VSVsEwSOkUuuRnFu2Guw=&emci=f1b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f7b2b7f8-fc4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)_**

Thank you,

Cinde
* * *
