name: Nikki Haley
subject: Will you take a chance?
body:
If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | |
---
| | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=b836a97f0e8b4ed39cc66383c7e8a7dc&_t=FRqI7UjA8jkOj-vu6sJ5bhjZPs5Up4HodT-jE2Yi0lKeHMKTC0lQ4vnhMZVwRLNtmIlMRAoSENxpUV0ynZ5eYqIm9s4rimvhtLarB6zffwY%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=b836a97f0e8b4ed39cc66383c7e8a7dc&_t=FRqI7UjA8jkOj-vu6sJ5bhjZPs5Up4HodT-jE2Yi0lKeHMKTC0lQ4vnhMZVwRLNtmIlMRAoSENxpUV0ynZ5eYqIm9s4rimvhtLarB6zffwY%3D)

|
Hi Fellow Conservative,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b836a97f0e8b4ed39cc66383c7e8a7dc&_e=X5-H3Q8SXsiAsDWZJLayLT2cNGr39fytR8Z2_Jjx2dQe2YQRPhEHONsnUjshdO7MMZF8eHj6a-z2sU_Y5KuEPqKi-UjgLyTcdtPRR3oHD6-6z0WlrV4ZugaJgxj_fN2tXjDNoK5lRLmZTgWi-vXHMyXrDHJdIoFGeYLkTH1hlDuZhG09Q78sILl2n7bQrw2FCFV2TajsIqchatD50C2Qai0YzVGmtA-W9JjS3xDXRVuihXzKncG_fHMxLtHMZoKMlCo9G-qQCjD4_g7ecP0f6iExdcEXvMDnKf4xkUdT16GI2HlueNiw4pbpWYZgZIS-TVBQuwKp_wY_vs1NRInMC4nCsq1ZeTFraQ-HXKBXoEVvXBA69nhHOjW344-00pfi "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b836a97f0e8b4ed39cc66383c7e8a7dc&_e=X5-H3Q8SXsiAsDWZJLayLT2cNGr39fytR8Z2_Jjx2dQe2YQRPhEHONsnUjshdO7MMZF8eHj6a-z2sU_Y5KuEPqKi-UjgLyTcdtPRR3oHD6-6z0WlrV4ZugaJgxj_fN2tXjDNoK5lRLmZTgWi-vXHMyXrDHJdIoFGeYLkTH1hlDuZhG09Q78sILl2n7bQrw2FCFV2TajsIqchatD50C2Qai0YzVGmtA-W9JjS3xDXRVvCe2X5GxaqGQ4cGJPMcNUWOsuwU9iKGf4U9w2E65J43SH-cJi1SG8Oumv-4dAxLnkcoeEL3HgO3-rAYSIfqfLe8SEJaCfWCV1IgLgYxACUnT4Ka_qfMWcvXscl502h5HbZRLQa80jzcth_ehCEtYnN)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b836a97f0e8b4ed39cc66383c7e8a7dc&_e=X5-H3Q8SXsiAsDWZJLayLT2cNGr39fytR8Z2_Jjx2dQe2YQRPhEHONsnUjshdO7MMZF8eHj6a-z2sU_Y5KuEPqKi-UjgLyTcdtPRR3oHD6-6z0WlrV4ZugaJgxj_fN2tXjDNoK5lRLmZTgWi-vXHMyXrDHJdIoFGeYLkTH1hlDuZhG09Q78sILl2n7bQrw2FCFV2TajsIqchatD50C2Qai0YzVGmtA-W9JjS3xDXRVtMj0RHRVl7dOSFB-BosmusussDz55XsMXRkgdTD-JbYM41sHR7xHRC_75fCSsoGi1TMr8iUkvktgAOzxVzV72ZlNzdUckSBI-6ZJBJbU2q_DxlBtFmY_KZVZtGHAqVd89AFa12z7iHa40zjilSN9Y2)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---

clean_body: If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | | | | | | | | | Hi Fellow Conservative, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb89l1gjbolhj72922h4j676i2r4vfc87i11poeg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjm78a6ltgdu7lptslahaqv31rhira69p2vdn6h0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk607kpft3kikvh390v8lq09n7q4l5961q7cdcig_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq3076tkk0aao96oqtv7kd5jg30upr819fifb7ag_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcpvo793oq3ttrejrncap9d7gkbg4j7l53s34od8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00fhhjoodotk6emqv0ndivd1l821faagcgcltn0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zveppu3lp8ffsje8cff8jus210v600ms9c42akug_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdfmjmpujo2514cibna2co0lbue7178jc5jf5m0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zedrttkt44bnvsm5dfqpeud9qd4c64j1299q63cg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zri4kd3e5btr98g8cmqecqrkfukce3rnc2rib40o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zea2j1f0ubah1nvfadhf7jevtfaduma8tbrejfq0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zat67sotf9c270r7q9c3h4c4acu4qe9g18c7ab58_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "I need your help â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlh3qjnkbrp7pno1b2c553bhi9m5iamma45knk7o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmp6unshnhi0kpf4e9au9c9iohtbp00bhv7fu8lo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoqvarl7v5vdp0aoekllpe0o3023gbbfjlipetb8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpqk3upp381rjqaqgokfg8r0v0rr8g33au4qoocg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd0iejdkb93uib4gtv3bg18k94fhnsg3ddagm8p0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znk4qpbkg4hb39tc4g6o0iqej1rlinojcsht0dd8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1tqb8o1ssod8k0j99f94eipsstljkjfbbfislo0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Hi, it’s Ann.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
This may be the first time you’ve heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2ati7qt0c5sadenvhlb0khpechlbl5103dfeja0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
**[I’m reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zotgtpo3m5tmd00p7i0aoiop34libo5do0131lh0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm0ob1cdh2bs)** Before you ask, no: I’m not talking about the Presidential election. I’m not talking about threats from China. I’m not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that’s happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I’m talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You’ve seen what’s happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids’ mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what’s happening in our nation’s schools is an accident. Rather, it’s the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they’ve: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can’t do this without your help. body:
I hear you when you say that our nation is facing major problems

| |
---
| | | It's Kevin McCarthy.

I reviewed your responses to my recent check-in with top supporters, and I wanted to follow up with you directly, Friend.

I hear you when you say that our nation is facing major problems including securing the border, reducing inflation, growing the economy, standing up for parent's rights, and making America energy independent.

| Monrovia, MD, September 5, 2023 -- The Committee To Elect Stephen McDow has affiliated with the Forward Maryland. The two came together to affect change in the state of Maryland and the United States. McDow already outlined 22 policy objectives, 18 already framed for resolution, and wrote two resolutions. McDowʼs objectives range from opening up the primary system in Maryland, developing a new inclusive trade deal with Africa and South America, creating a Marijuana Safe Law, as well as increasing funding for Law Enforcement and providing tax incentives and breaks for small businesses $50 million and under.

Friend,
The rabidly anti-Trump Attorney General in New York is now seeking an **IMMEDIATE VERDICT** against me **WITHOUT A TRIAL**.
**My constitutional rights are being ripped to shreds.**
This is the same Attorney General who OPENLY CAMPAIGNED on the idea of “getting Trump.”
Or, as she put it in her own kind words... **“** _**we’re gonna definitely sue him. We’re gonna be a real pain in the...” (you know what... I’m not going to say it!)**_
Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me – and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man.
They’ve examined my entire life under a microscope and have found ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to pin me down for, so they’re inventing crimes out of thin air and launching never-ending witch hunts to try and break me.
But, after every single witch hunt, our movement has only grown stronger!
These left-wing lunatics have FAILED to break me, simply because I have countless patriots like **YOU** peacefully standing by my side.
I truly believe the people of our country are waking up to how corrupt our nation has become.
The people can see what’s going on... _The ruling class is trying to eliminate its leading opponent who happens to be a political outsider with a clear mandate from the hardworking voters of our country._
But, with your support, we will continue to prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and OUR vindication will come on November 5, 2024 when we win back the White House in an electoral LANDSLIDE.
_If you’re doing poorly right now due to the people who would rather see me imprisoned than actually help the citizens of our country who are crying out for help, then don’t even think about donating. I completely understand._

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kMFuszAQBp9muQWt12YxBx_-_IhLpEg9VG2PxnYaV4YgDI3y9hUR7fXb0Wi0dphSvDwM1EcgukafgQjkPyA6qeP7mU9vp_Zw_tDh0HKl7tuV_gPR8pjCH7pbyjDYmLa1bgtvyGlyrghGcCMbYpaquBolBGvdB-ElunDpiZytMJBXWPtauyIaQpLYYCUqgdiUPSOT1w37iqoLC1B4j2Ppb6NN_muZ12Eq3W0okrkuy5SfSR1Ql-13sEOYo7PluLoU1vwM3GCgbo_ewLXPbo7TEm9jBurWcV_6ALJ7PkW2Xlt8rc8vXMzGT_eYUsxcg8LPX-dPAAAA___qMmVT)

clean_body: | | | Friend, The rabidly anti-Trump Attorney General in New York is now seeking an IMMEDIATE VERDICT against me WITHOUT A TRIAL. My constitutional rights are being ripped to shreds. This is the same Attorney General who OPENLY CAMPAIGNED on the idea of “getting Trump.” Or, as she put it in her own kind words... “ we’re gonna definitely sue him. We’re gonna be a real pain in the...” (you know what... I’m not going to say it!) Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me – and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man. They’ve examined my entire life under a microscope and have found ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to pin me down for, so they’re inventing crimes out of thin air and launching never-ending witch hunts to try and break me. But, after every single witch hunt, our movement has only grown stronger! These left-wing lunatics have FAILED to break me, simply because I have countless patriots like YOU peacefully standing by my side. I truly believe the people of our country are waking up to how corrupt our nation has become. The people can see what’s going on... The ruling class is trying to eliminate its leading opponent who happens to be a political outsider with a clear mandate from the hardworking voters of our country. But, with your support, we will continue to prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and OUR vindication will come on November 5, 2024 when we win back the White House in an electoral LANDSLIDE. If you’re doing poorly right now due to the people who would rather see me imprisoned than actually help the citizens of our country who are crying out for help, then don’t even think about donating. I completely understand. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---

| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
Hey Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will – **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](http://trk.secureandprosper.--IrsoFrKyLg)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](http://trk.secureandprosper._mt8sXRA)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](http://trk.secureandprosper._P2zjWcmWMPKQ)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let's prove them wrong._Together_.**

| [** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT → **](http://trk.secureandprosper.-dw)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | Hey Fellow American, The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative. They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present. But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs. I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck. I will tell you what no one else on that stage will – THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU. They cannot be trusted. The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. And you're the one who pays. What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you. Here's where you come in, Fellow American: Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight. Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment. Stop the lies. Stay strong. Stay free. In Truth, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. Let's prove them wrong.Together. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22189%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7c2RDTON79A5Sjco%2fhZ%2faQ&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Protect our Western State Forests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69229716/425504684/1418014978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExZGQ5YzEyLTAxNGMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JPQZjOD3eYESNRafsvXMfxOEdV1Ww1P5tfGt6svOXL8=&emci=9c699da8-4a48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a1dd9c12-014c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, Oregon’s state forests need your voice. **The Board of Forestry is meeting on Thursday, September 7, to consider changes to core conservation areas under the proposed Western State Forests Habitat Conservation Plan** (HCP). A strong HCP will help protect iconic salmon runs, wildlife habitat, recreation, and clean water while ensuring more sustainable timber harvest. Right now, the timber industry and pro-logging politicians are calling on the Board of Forestry to reject the proposed HCP, prioritizing timber harvest and profits over all other values. **We need to counter their efforts to weaken the HCP.** I’ll be testifying on the 7th in support of passing the strongest HCP possible. [**Will you make your voice heard and add your name to this petition that I’ll be submitting on the 7th when I testify?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69229717/425504685/1418014978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExZGQ5YzEyLTAxNGMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JPQZjOD3eYESNRafsvXMfxOEdV1Ww1P5tfGt6svOXL8=&emci=9c699da8-4a48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a1dd9c12-014c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) **The HCP is a plan based on science that was developed with years of extensive public input.** If the Board of Forestry succumbs to corporate timber industry pressure and the HCP is weakened, or thrown out altogether, thousands of acres will open up for the benefit of the timber industry and industrial-scale clearcuts. Vulnerable fish and wildlife will be threatened by destructive logging practices and environmental groups will be forced to litigate. Not only that, rural Oregonians could lose access to clean, cold drinking water if clearcuts damage their drinking water sources. [**We need to show up and support the Board of Forestry to stand strong against the demands of the timber industry.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69229718/425504686/1418014978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExZGQ5YzEyLTAxNGMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JPQZjOD3eYESNRafsvXMfxOEdV1Ww1P5tfGt6svOXL8=&emci=9c699da8-4a48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a1dd9c12-014c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) At the Board of Forestry's meeting in June, a state forester highlighted the large backlog of timber sales that have been purchased but haven’t been harvested by the timber industry. This backlog exceeds Oregon’s annual state forest harvest by 50%. Still, they want more, and they’re using inflammatory and misleading statements to undermine the HCP. With this massive backlog of timber sales in place, the Board needs our support to stand strong against pressure from the timber industry and avoid weakening the HCP. **Join us, stand tall for Oregon’s forests, and[add your name to the petition for our forests; for clean, cold water; for fish and wildlife; and for the greatest permanent value for all Oregonians.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69229719/425504687/1418014978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExZGQ5YzEyLTAxNGMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JPQZjOD3eYESNRafsvXMfxOEdV1Ww1P5tfGt6svOXL8=&emci=9c699da8-4a48-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a1dd9c12-014c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Thank you for all that you do. Best,
Julia DeGraw

Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zruiuav0lrs6bd73bdbu2m2304n7rth4849emth8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm4oj2cdh2bs)
---

Friend,

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgd4hh9h4k9bed6qogce90qnavaidadotgkdkv58_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm4oj2cdh2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlu7aen3rdtde45lgff2orbplkkt2kf32k0ohb68_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm4oj2cdh2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z71268ilnghtsfrflradr5ve7dq9tmap7g0rhngg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm4oj2cdh2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zth7d4t3e25qt9om0n8lokpf0dcgf10ad7in83sg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm4oj2cdh2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjfsj5fuh10jq6tn35nif27nn475s1lnte4qt0do_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm4oj2cdh2bs)
---

The August recess is almost over for the House of Representatives. They will be back in session next week, and your window of opportunity to visit the local office to deliver the letters is dwindling! **If you already delivered the letters, THANK YOU! Also, **[**please fill out this feedback form as soon as possible,**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**so that we know which representatives received the letters and which ones did not.** If you haven’t delivered the letters yet, please try to do so by this Thursday, September 7th, before they return to D.C. **[You can download both letters here,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNDgtYmQyODhmYmVjNDcyNDAxNjhmN2FkZDIzN2RlZDY0MTYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRoZXBhdHJpb3RjZW50ZXIub3JnL3Rha2UtYWN0aW9uLWF1Z3VzdC8_bWlkPTQ2NTA1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/KS6Xk5KDni_4QlPtu17mrQ)** customize them as appropriate, print them, and then deliver them. The first letter is about opening an impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden’s alleged crimes, and the second letter is about using the end of the fiscal year on September 30th to cut spending and stop funding the DOJ’s witch hunts against conservatives and President Trump. **Please get those letters delivered and then fill out the feedback form!**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Dave Min Statement On Scott Baugh Denigrating 9/11 Victims and Military Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
State Senator Responds To Huffington Post Report on Comments Made by Republican Frontrunner In Crucial CA-47 Race | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/61f3c94c7509/dave-min-statement-on-scott-baugh-denigrating-911-victims-and-military-veterans-15661320?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** September 5, 2023
**Contact:** press@davemin.com
**Dave Min Statement On Scott Baugh Denigrating 9/11 Victims and Military Veterans ** _State Senator Responds To Huffington Post Report on Comments Made by Republican Frontrunner In Crucial CA-47 Race_
**Irvine, CA –** This morning, the [Huffington Post](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=f25c51beeb&e=7017cc100e) reported on a video of Scott Baugh recently stating that “woke-ism” is the greatest threat we’ve faced as a nation: “We survived civil wars, World War II, World War I, a lot of wars, 9/11. None of those were that threatening to our country compared to the war that we’re fighting now. That war is about wokism....” Baugh, who lost to Katie Porter in last cycle’s contest for the seat, is likely to face State Senator Dave Min in the general election for CA-47.

**“Scott Baugh’s comments are despicable and denigrate the memories of the 2,996 Americans who died during the September 11 attacks,”** said Senator Dave Min. **“They also reflect an extremist and un-American ideology that is more suited to the backwaters of Q-Anon chatrooms than the halls of Congress. When September 11 occurred, I was a third year law student in the Boston area, where two of the hijacked flights originated. This was a defining moment for all Americans. Many of my friends and classmates went into the military or public service after those horrific terrorist attacks, to try to honor the memory of those who perished. 9/11 was a big part of the reason I chose to begin my career at the Securities and Exchange Commission, prosecuting financial crimes. For Baugh to outrageously state that “woke-ism” is worse than 9/11, both World Wars, and the Civil War, illustrates his total contempt for our military veterans and for protecting the safety and security of the American people.”**

The comment spells disaster for the Baugh campaign, who faces an uphill battle next November in Dave Min. Dave was called to service in the aftermath of the events of September 11–he joined the SEC after graduating from Harvard Law School, before serving as a policy advisor to Sen. Chuck Schumer, and then policy director at the Center for American Progress. As a State Senator for California’s 37th District, Dave has been a consistent vote for veterans. He wrote SB 763, which builds on existing law to allow PTSD and other mental health conditions arising from military service to be considered in sentencing of veterans and active military, and was passed unanimously in 2021.

**“The choice in this election is clear: a candidate who stands for unity and service to our country, or one who espouses extreme views that do not reflect the values of Orange County,”** said Min campaign Manager Dan Driscoll. **“Voters want someone like Dave Min – a dedicated public servant who has worked tirelessly for Orange County, advocating for policies that will improve healthcare, protect the environment, and promote economic opportunity for all residents.”**

California’s 47th is widely seen as one of the most competitive seats in the country. Incumbent Rep. Katie Porter defeated Scott Baugh last year by just over 3%. Baugh is the likely Republican nominee, and will face Porter’s pick in Dave Min next November, during a cycle where the national GOP has declared CA-47 their top target. But Dave Min is no stranger to tough races. He currently represents over 80% of the 47th Congressional District in the State Senate, and won CA-47 during that election by over 5% in 2020, a tough year for Orange County Democrats, defeating a long-time Republican icon who was thought to be unbeatable. Just after the end of 2023’s first quarter, former Congressman Harley Rouda ended his bid for the 47th, leaving Min as the only Democrat in the race with previous campaign, legislative, or federal policy experience.
###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
PO Box 5959
Irvine, CA 92616
---

| | Derek, As we kick off the new legislative session in Congress and get down to the nitty-gritty again, I wanted to pause for a moment and say thank you. After a slow start to fundraising this year, this grassroots movement answered our calls for help, stepped up, and helped us get back on track. Not only did you help us finally meet our fundraising projections in July, but **you made sure that our August numbers were even stronger.** And the timing couldn’t be better. Now is not the time for our fundraising efforts to take a hit – not with our last end-of-quarter fundraising deadline approaching right before the election in Virginia (which is only about 2 months away)! Our fingers are crossed that this momentum continues and we can carry it into a sweeping victory for Democrats in the General Assembly in November. But frankly, it’s not about luck. It’s about this team being willing to do whatever it takes to help Democrats protect all of the progress we’ve fought so hard for. _****[So I’m asking: Can you chip in $5 today to kick off September on the right foot and help us ride this momentum all the way to turning Virginia blue in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69230677/425508747/-1986114747?refcode=mw_em_230905_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA2NjUxZi0wNTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmztLc-Xky7-USrJjdz614zPhEbEKu8BRI2svq1UA1w=)****_ Our fundraising numbers go public at the end of the month, so it’s time to show the GOP what we’re made of. Let’s do this. Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69230678/425508748/-1986114747?refcode=mw_em_230905_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA2NjUxZi0wNTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmztLc-Xky7-USrJjdz614zPhEbEKu8BRI2svq1UA1w=)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | |
---
| | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=eecabc39a3fb4596b923989674079f8f&_t=y_pK0wdoLy-Ul_Vi4VAohQmsMS2ICGQ4gcJfwcbA7q2_FEbWYribTDLupdohMSlvBqmhwaLOnt7mgSikTZbWEZHMuUMMdJ63e-9_-RRqJAw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=eecabc39a3fb4596b923989674079f8f&_t=y_pK0wdoLy-Ul_Vi4VAohQmsMS2ICGQ4gcJfwcbA7q2_FEbWYribTDLupdohMSlvBqmhwaLOnt7mgSikTZbWEZHMuUMMdJ63e-9_-RRqJAw%3D)

|
Hi Peter,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eecabc39a3fb4596b923989674079f8f&_e=30ZwZkVJLSbRDXCE1mFpYxSI2YwFVOoKjUSpYDvg3QrLgS-PbhBH1RPm-1XrUg_hiG7blfjjs5gMH3WQnpAkv-ik3tifWSmIbwKdW1NMSfd166xutBUgtxcP_UZ1jC_TlKWPhZOKkJg27JKCPiASOW0HMjOCRVsQnbYUF1MwTVRr4rV7VQhpbt-FqQJnvmso8jecSR7xnByMrbuM4SRYaLztb_WmVjuuQuPcoowdnrK4ea2C4p8vphzgByFdgRmzk6BSYgvoMg_psY_DaNIb6U1oH1w7cYyttmUlDQD2Xht4BMCtiEn_SQHjqlYEg9AyU2_fxNC7upSnsIRFmRGjVHlgjf6bzwgIIi6BZe4rfevfrfJC_H4kuzvPyIcTFhLI "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eecabc39a3fb4596b923989674079f8f&_e=30ZwZkVJLSbRDXCE1mFpYxSI2YwFVOoKjUSpYDvg3QrLgS-PbhBH1RPm-1XrUg_hiG7blfjjs5gMH3WQnpAkv-ik3tifWSmIbwKdW1NMSfd166xutBUgtxcP_UZ1jC_TlKWPhZOKkJg27JKCPiASOW0HMjOCRVsQnbYUF1MwTVRr4rV7VQhpbt-FqQJnvmso8jecSR7xnByMrbuM4SRYaLztb_WmVjuuQuPcoowdnrLIG4RVE8NLDzxN13fOFe34JXEdTBou8l6YUgXv1CgoWnwjwJ-VIC6IE_anpccOSi8AwtDtf7REN-HXQ3HTTLSrSkb3qKL6ujsmRCrsUrx7C4oPNC6v4OU2BT1Zmzy3JiP3GAV5Bp2sBV3EnluDcnaF)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eecabc39a3fb4596b923989674079f8f&_e=30ZwZkVJLSbRDXCE1mFpYxSI2YwFVOoKjUSpYDvg3QrLgS-PbhBH1RPm-1XrUg_hiG7blfjjs5gMH3WQnpAkv-ik3tifWSmIbwKdW1NMSfd166xutBUgtxcP_UZ1jC_TlKWPhZOKkJg27JKCPiASOW0HMjOCRVsQnbYUF1MwTVRr4rV7VQhpbt-FqQJnvmso8jecSR7xnByMrbuM4SRYaLztb_WmVjuuQuPcoowdnrKus2l-UmROruzKnykyeHdaoUTZ4hABIXbWQOJjl6mXU8-uDuXJJanm9VzPnqsPhUdJcjjSDFPRyITM0nwCBF2Kg2PDDDNLv7pvt4rK5IzQTPojghqxUs7ujBFp_bQMpgb1C357CbegVW2-aHyjX-nd)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eecabc39a3fb4596b923989674079f8f&_e=30ZwZkVJLSbRDXCE1mFpYxSI2YwFVOoKjUSpYDvg3QrLgS-PbhBH1RPm-1XrUg_hiG7blfjjs5gMH3WQnpAkv-ik3tifWSmIbwKdW1NMSfd166xutBUgtxcP_UZ1jC_TlKWPhZOKkJg27JKCPiASOW0HMjOCRVsQnbYUF1MwTVRr4rV7VQhpbt-FqQJnvmso8jecSR7xnByMrbuM4SRYaLztb_WmVjuuQuPcoowdnrKkLV2oHbqzoa8nJ0ZqhecQ7MsJdXB1fZBGNVveyK-AkiaaRpfc3dn-nHwwHwe1EUdLMizyxeDqCZR0_iKx2Qeme4KBFqoOuVCjdx1ev7UfHYkLOjApDnka7TbfT4bdwK1YuV-eWoIOgvRq9A5Wqon9)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eecabc39a3fb4596b923989674079f8f&_e=30ZwZkVJLSbRDXCE1mFpYxSI2YwFVOoKjUSpYDvg3QrLgS-PbhBH1RPm-1XrUg_hiG7blfjjs5gMH3WQnpAkv-ik3tifWSmIbwKdW1NMSfd166xutBUgtxcP_UZ1jC_TlKWPhZOKkJg27JKCPiASOW0HMjOCRVsQnbYUF1MwTVRr4rV7VQhpbt-FqQJnvmso8jecSR7xnByMrbuM4SRYaLztb_WmVjuuQuPcoowdnrLwiOqeflV7rm7LV4wi-saXF3wPlGcjSrJEPpYIp5BAfGXYyBVmqgZK-sFqYnc2Wof6FxJHr0AtaZTDqxVkIrYp5HTuzi_pDYLW0Y9tOY4zJaJar0_WWkhTDGdW3ivoU_x2jFD5I8xEoPqWi4MgCVNx "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> ")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---

clean_body: If you watched the debate, you know why I’m running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. | | | | | | | | | Hi Peter, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Peter, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Liars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42e46b32304d4c51b3c28500d18be90d&_e=YeghruCnUdN22MpJJfoCfrf-0XP627hlOnEF-n-5CC0vSCfFkI4nghCXAYCiExUzEruh7rsxE-w1O1gPtmPQXTYBQy7WnILm7HMKWTQTrpQs8TPqx-skyOl8EHpPfT4mUOH7OO1T5JkSu36YRM5_Jitw4OE4VbYXQcWGdPzgHBeTR-IvI_Mg9y843fN_HFM7R3AwtWI5wzY8x0ELMDpqYtPfzByynlyGDBHHADH5d2RYd_iNIMI-dWTnP1mEgAJT9vPHrWah000lwQDWgS95sEeDN5wJjbrnwPl25uyJ4uktgC6VUxyUV_Ya0lGyvwQIVR2VOrb3LDRENA-DufuRcWho0vSZPTTdR7E3tGzdcRsgsxRQSnOrTlix7zEh-lVv)
Hey Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American}: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42e46b32304d4c51b3c28500d18be90d&_e=YeghruCnUdN22MpJJfoCfrf-0XP627hlOnEF-n-5CC0vSCfFkI4nghCXAYCiExUzEruh7rsxE-w1O1gPtmPQXTYBQy7WnILm7HMKWTQTrpQs8TPqx-skyOl8EHpPfT4mUOH7OO1T5JkSu36YRM5_Jitw4OE4VbYXQcWGdPzgHBeTR-IvI_Mg9y843fN_HFM7R3AwtWI5wzY8x0ELMDpqYqKy2LksBhpo8E3glmCvP3FA9wk34YWaYGxsv94O8XhlaNUqhHkdWu0Jf2adQ1YuohnmvWVzMi6blxcv5cosxs4a4PHk1VVQglARDzWmavoECe6ibadjLRU5Hw3RxCAVXi2UY6FMHgP89bCIuZ-iYyKVSN3YUE5AYnR8TSPshQrX)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42e46b32304d4c51b3c28500d18be90d&_e=YeghruCnUdN22MpJJfoCfrf-0XP627hlOnEF-n-5CC0vSCfFkI4nghCXAYCiExUzEruh7rsxE-w1O1gPtmPQXTYBQy7WnILm7HMKWTQTrpQs8TPqx-skyOl8EHpPfT4mUOH7OO1T5JkSu36YRM5_Jitw4OE4VbYXQcWGdPzgHBeTR-IvI_Mg9y843fN_HFM7R3AwtWI5wzY8x0ELMDpqYjCha4qThI5IVcybilzdq0xUJghq2U0Xj7YhaLPtihOXO13D4zBpvpDqevke_UB4LXZG9_3Hw5FbIfmVJgPu3Cz_zBvy9HyGS4faNG-Tvjsmvoy8QmFIbpbVkV6kJK_WGIEefQerw3yWZwwjYHa52_0QyFc_HPzPdz6pCWWRusa5)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42e46b32304d4c51b3c28500d18be90d&_e=YeghruCnUdN22MpJJfoCfrf-0XP627hlOnEF-n-5CC0vSCfFkI4nghCXAYCiExUzEruh7rsxE-w1O1gPtmPQXTYBQy7WnILm7HMKWTQTrpQs8TPqx-skyOl8EHpPfT4mUOH7OO1T5JkSu36YRM5_Jitw4OE4VbYXQcWGdPzgHBeTR-IvI_Mg9y843fN_HFM7R3AwtWI5wzY8x0ELMDpqYnc0OpZxgpJGttyERQq_KylRCFOWyYdoF1wxmkz3UE40oubnwm2uwSvX03pjgo6MVuM3HTWl3KLGnywC4jENTEaqaK1f8CCkYrY2raFChe-J-aULEEFK8H_3D8RHetw0ndCCSYn4WkqAZn9zeCLf76eBshBtOc69Pm4SSeBmWh5t)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let's prove them wrong._Together_.**

| [** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT -> **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42e46b32304d4c51b3c28500d18be90d&_e=YeghruCnUdN22MpJJfoCfrf-0XP627hlOnEF-n-5CC0vSCfFkI4nghCXAYCiExUzEruh7rsxE-w1O1gPtmPQXTYBQy7WnILm7HMKWTQTrpQs8TPqx-skyOl8EHpPfT4mUOH7OO1T5JkSu36YRM5_Jitw4OE4VbYXQcWGdPzgHBeTR-IvI_Mg9y843fN_HFM7R3AwtWI5wzY8x0ELMDpqYpcUgIizlLGpxxm_WCAxI64BiDUHftCjRDKJvoCFa8ayko_pioyhrMzlAoQLtSfuQ5RtkIdIMfv_xqnH9ADdXMtvvISUriXnjWKk_ue4esx4ANlvFjkjb24LtaWW24NSH2lxfalTBqcSeP1oomx0wZYj7mOc8V-91iDcWMap6eCj)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42e46b32304d4c51b3c28500d18be90d&_e=YeghruCnUdN22MpJJfoCfrf-0XP627hlOnEF-n-5CC0vSCfFkI4nghCXAYCiExUzEruh7rsxE-w1O1gPtmPQXTYBQy7WnILm7HMKWTQTrpQs8TPqx-skyOl8EHpPfT4mUOH7OO1T5JkSu36YRM5_Jitw4OE4VbYXQcWGdPzgHBeTR-IvI_Mg9y843fN_HFM7R3AwtWI5wzY8x0ELMDpqYheVtYewdTGjvB-FB3Ag4sI9Iko76UqcLgYzmBwi0sK0LkNojL7y_crlKDYolGwZNkDIPn9QYNs21csQB63x2gHS07lQSBgiYh6oaYPAaALMFBtcp383OVtytr7v0sjkgQYA1lbmmaMc3YYGThxalhkwJfGW3JSZUYcqmPsI9nIc)

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: Help Lauren fight back against the Radical Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is Kellyanne Conway and I need to share urgent news with you

| | | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93ee3f4733ba4bae8cee6cfea1d5b66e&_e=DST4an7OTssdZMSy8TJYIvRdRBGXrUiy1pVAZMlu_KWTFifApoWRdTJrEX6dfHllr-RS8zy4X8yogYxtx6uknv4gVAZxL-fqsJs0F6Uap6P7b0fKKHMs-OlRCzzNfwAIYJdXLyEoS6PjNMyzHDFWLM140gGAqHfS7bpyjHFqN2oolKKdU55_JoH6d5vV8ut-w7_RaXkLtvEIW8IiKdlr4qOdz6wUjTid5KPEEFwTHWZ16jk2scqxQZjKei2FrydtnNCqB6VVcqOyMOvlEuR6oZbx1X_yh-7ySh2L54V88XE%3D)
---
| | | This is Kellyanne Conway and I need to share urgent news with you, Friend.

I've made a career being the best pollster in Conservative politics, and managed the winning Campaign that put Trump into office in 2016. I know Elections.

With that in mind, **I 've just looked at some numbers for Lauren Boebert's congressional race, **and there's no easy way to put this: we are in serious jeopardy of **_losing this seat to the Democrats._**

She's getting **_pummeled_** by her radical leftist opponent, Adam Frisch, and his left wing millionaire donors.

He's raised **$4.4 million in the first six months of this cycle thanks to Soros** , with a whopping **$2.6 million** in the second quarter _alone_.

If the Election were held today... **_Lauren would lose._**

_But there 's still time to save this seat._

[**Right now, I urgently need you to donate as much as you can to Lauren 's campaign, or we will lose this seat, giving yet another vote for Jeffries as Speaker a silencing a conservative lioness.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93ee3f4733ba4bae8cee6cfea1d5b66e&_e=DST4an7OTssdZMSy8TJYIvRdRBGXrUiy1pVAZMlu_KWTFifApoWRdTJrEX6dfHllr-RS8zy4X8yogYxtx6uknv4gVAZxL-fqsJs0F6Uap6P7b0fKKHMs-OlRCzzNfwAIYJdXLyEoS6PjNMyzHDFWLID4Dhb-vyI2t1OmRMkruIeLdw6CwbD-rNG6tAXKdqTEr1mPLwoa89tZwL3BC_QHK52TfOjZIHKonezlj5Op5GiyxjHH51xrWER5XVXyAPbQYkebxNfhLVXDWWQPv-Wm3N9VouI2Q0EvVyq44aMT3ek%3D)
---
| [DONATE NOW >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93ee3f4733ba4bae8cee6cfea1d5b66e&_e=DST4an7OTssdZMSy8TJYIvRdRBGXrUiy1pVAZMlu_KWTFifApoWRdTJrEX6dfHllr-RS8zy4X8yogYxtx6uknv4gVAZxL-fqsJs0F6Uap6P7b0fKKHMs-OlRCzzNfwAIYJdXLyEoS6PjNMyzHDFWLKUp3Lml6l3Hg5qWHzK_0mrvJJ_wIaEzgEqStz3nW6mX5OuKHUICqKtOH4ezkrDg6kamtzuO_S-VQvbLRbnSrsPfKK_m2uGZAdJylBGXQ3fRWp54RQUtw3iXVHOkMcE2qt6hSUBHUIWPLn0UOPRDvJc%3D "DONATE NOW")
---

And I know that I have millions of supporters like you who will also NEVER SURRENDER our mission to save our country.

The Obama-appointed judge has scheduled a TRIAL DATE in the Biden DOJ's witch hunt against me on the DAY BEFORE SUPER TUESDAY - when I am expected to be declared the PRESUMPTIVE GOP nominee for President. This is the same judge who has publicly expressed ANGER that I continue to walk as a free man in America... The Left just forced me to take a mugshot in an attempt to turn me into Public Enemy #1. After I used their mugshot against them to raise over $9 MILLION for our America First movement, they are now retaliating with a vengeance. Their new attack is to force me to stand trial on the day before the Republican primary is set to be wrapped up and it 's officially time to begin the General Election against Joe Biden. But I want to make one thing clear: I am not the r eal victim in this vicious act of Election Interference. ...This is an attack on YOU - the voter. The Biden Administration is interfering in the Republican primary to try and effectively disenfranchise millions of voters and rob you of your vote. They don't want a political outsider in the White House. And they certainly don't want to have to face me in a General Election where they are guaranteed to lose in a free and fair fight. But no matter how many times they arrest me, indict me, take my mugshot, intimidate me, or force me to stand trial as an innocent man, I will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again.
