name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: My pledge to the American Legion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
This Texan warrior’s words are her bond. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/83130ef07ce5/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12649639?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=70bdec630f&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| The American Legion is the nation's largest wartime veterans service organization aimed at advocating patriotism across the U.S. and I have taken a pledge to honor their efforts when I serve We The People in Congress.

**I, Julie Clark, hereby pledge my unwavering support to the American Legion and its invaluable mission of advocating for and safeguarding the rights and well-being of veterans, promoting Americanism of ‘God and Country’ across our great nation. **

_**If it weren’t for Veterans, there would be no United States of America**_. They shall never be forgotten and shall forever be treated with dignity and respect due to the sacrifices they have made for all of us. Veterans should be a priority for our government and should not lose funding to cover other government shortfalls, especially to fund illegal immigration.

**I pledge to:**

**Maintain an Open Door Policy:** I will always keep lines of communication open between my office and the American Legion leadership. Their perspectives, suggestions, and concerns will be treated with the utmost respect, and I am committed to working collaboratively to find effective solutions.

**Protect Veterans' Rights:** I recognize the need to safeguard the rights and benefits earned by veterans through their service to our country. I will stand firm in protecting and upholding these rights, advocating for policies that honor the sacrifices of our veterans.

**Promote Veterans' Well-Being:** Mental health, healthcare, employment opportunities, and housing are critical aspects of veterans' well-being. I will work to create and support programs that address these areas, ensuring that our veterans receive the care and assistance they rightfully deserve.

**Advocate for Legislative Initiatives:** I pledge to actively support and sponsor legislation that aligns with the American Legion's objectives, working tirelessly to make positive changes in areas that impact veterans' lives.

Peter, join me in creating a future where veterans are cherished, respected and provided with the opportunities they have earned.

[**I invite you to stand with me in doing so by adding your name in support of my pledge to veterans today:**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=5752130fad&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=c495c9e1e9&e=c982eb7ad4 "ADD YOUR NAME »")
---
| For America,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=fe85008dbd&e=c982eb7ad4)

name: Sean Barry for Congress
subject: A fresh start
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOH8vS-H2wVKd-2YocowzUKsqJ2Uw2Dw7Hu4rQilhmmHhPjBa14JlvtykRTmyNFCOsJvrG7UVdn2EDz1h5FwP4UNq4JkYCuD44-72-9qlQVBjC3_HoKeIJb6m67pbnSC6T1u1-Dasla2nQF6kpGpGdLvpddXY8AomWsCtcDNwoZAo_5MbRSvK_trW3A1miqFkxMK0FhyentEByRsEbTy3ccYge85xSMHwpkFxz6BiV5y/3zc/sO7Ji4vhTYapmcNK2TJ8NQ/h0/DlTpYppaKx-IgtWbtpn3Zib9wbJ_IUpR01xMEH1KGTE)
---
Friend, Our great state of Texas deserves fresh faces and new ideas in our government, not more of the same career politicians who seem more interested in their own agendas than in the needs of our community. I believe it's time to bring about positive change and a new era of dedicated public service. During my campaign, I will prioritize the issues that matter most to you and your neighbors, such as affordable healthcare, quality education, job opportunities, and sustainable economic growth. We have the resources to do so, we just need the right people to push these policies forward. These are not just talking points for me; they are the driving force behind my decision to run for office. I could not continue to sit back and watch as our representatives kept a lukewarm stance about our district. **The people of Texas deserve more.** Running a campaign isn’t easy, especially when you’re running against an incumbent. But I know that TX-29 is ready for a fresh start. We must end the cycle of lazy career politicians. Here's the truth: I can't do this alone. I need your support and involvement to turn this shared vision into a reality. [Join our fight today with your donation of $250, $100, $50 or just $25. It’s time to bring motivated representatives to Washington, DC.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQb_fIl_NqEZ5xsd0GxWkKIdi5rXlJG3idR_HYBYoptZ5YeRfGNlMh6Q9wffsTVLNmHc9phN5isrqXUjATSuXnvNijh6sJ8DSPaHVnyxDulKWJyupfJXoWJzRAtUL_Ql_Pb3sR1C5Fe4eMqQ30euempfQ7vwlPyzM5wphhUepn-GJPGc3nQASNLzaWYv0yfE_vt1KGu4IbtcEPfxRET61yNBFqxmTAupHjh6pNM8rQnszouiumlYs8rklyeEdbE92I7oVNLxZJ-lN11paUHXyuwoBTfY0crwEbtcd68r4ah7sw2pPkWDyaTYLZK_mt0xs/3zc/sO7Ji4vhTYapmcNK2TJ8NQ/h1/7uPsrWvJi5ilIUdXzzIm_2uDTc7AAZclwfv2Ag7Z0LA) Together, we can make a difference. Sean Barry Candidate for Congress (TX-29)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: 🇨🇦Help Send Revival North!!!
body:
God is stirring the hearts of our Canadian brothers and sisters | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=af23091717574ff98aae92fda702492e&_e=1th2cYN1CZUIsRUs_vFryN8dCGWmdT3lmT_pkfAn3FD2gpHbiM5i4xrPxSOjxiFmlx8y59i2mLj8F6frDvo12-YRnw4TSKfrRe2lNHXvU6uWiwVGtILRiKcWQWlNp43lX7lwGKYqFwO6K-4uEX3X2_Tgc8b0PwqKoAv53b2IJVR1HSy_rGMypZwi2DOooFpivres26ep71IOOrnDWAexcF2R59zV6wLv8WzhLvQqVYsf79bpg8LwFXcNBYAMitOG_txVjNS8UDKuU3Hqe8_Ui8S75h0EK44GpuNT0d6CEBaw0FYzzkHLZJZI6sMB_ciJ)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Let Us Worship is a movement born out of the desire to see a Holy revival fall upon our nation. But the desire for revival is not held exclusively by us Americans—far from it!! We've seen a hunger for revival from Believers all across the globe, from South Africa, to India, to Iraq and beyond!!

In Mark chapter 12, Jesus taught, "Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.’ The second is this: ‘ _**Love your neighbor as yourself.’ There is no commandment greater than these.**_ ” We know God is stirring the hearts of our northern neighbors, our Canadian brothers and sisters in Christ, as well as preparing to work in the lives of the lost. _**NOW IS THE TIME for us to bring Let Us Worship to Canada!!!**_ To host these three revivals, we need to raise $60,000—that's $20,000 per revival. We don't have event sponsors or already pledged donations, so this is something we have to pay for all on our own.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=af23091717574ff98aae92fda702492e&_e=1th2cYN1CZUIsRUs_vFryN8dCGWmdT3lmT_pkfAn3FD2gpHbiM5i4xrPxSOjxiFmlx8y59i2mLj8F6frDvo12-YRnw4TSKfrRe2lNHXvU6uWiwVGtILRiKcWQWlNp43lX7lwGKYqFwO6K-4uEX3X2_Tgc8b0PwqKoAv53b2IJVQBubTKX_pLPx4JWoCl2_rRMprnFvLcBOf2Z4H4cllWp-UWnOiUTFM72CINHcmlmXV0uXu3l4n_UEb7u3blLHFibyVrQo0DbYRcvNVGAIVqfPaSXaQqxV6Jcj3fidoljFUl66l86uuVNgL89VWUOhTh)
---
Canada is a hostile environment for the Gospel—we've seen pastors arrested for holding services during Canada's extreme COVID lockdowns and arrested for protesting child drag shows, but we heard God’s call to go and we are answering!__ Can you help us fund these three revivals for our Canadian brothers and sisters?
---
[**HELP BRING REVIVAL TO CANADA >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=af23091717574ff98aae92fda702492e&_e=1th2cYN1CZUIsRUs_vFryN8dCGWmdT3lmT_pkfAn3FD2gpHbiM5i4xrPxSOjxiFmlx8y59i2mLj8F6frDvo12-YRnw4TSKfrRe2lNHXvU6uWiwVGtILRiKcWQWlNp43lX7lwGKYqFwO6K-4uEX3X2_Tgc8b0PwqKoAv53b2IJVTR6k227ISmif_RAkkN2r03Fs4RgEkfsIUIPizauIbzRAbrU4_xrdADSEN0CfYlJYc4rw6c51PQW8YoyzUYnwomqI5oWi5qflIXGrPocIgbn6wUNQQOuZaHPA195FZFh1J3L79zFoTOtYY3fNf5TE4x)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---
[**HELP BRING REVIVAL TO CANADA >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=af23091717574ff98aae92fda702492e&_e=1th2cYN1CZUIsRUs_vFryN8dCGWmdT3lmT_pkfAn3FD2gpHbiM5i4xrPxSOjxiFmlx8y59i2mLj8F6frDvo12-YRnw4TSKfrRe2lNHXvU6uWiwVGtILRiKcWQWlNp43lX7lwGKYqFwO6K-4uEX3X2_Tgc8b0PwqKoAv53b2IJVQxxVUBuhpXH146ec37LDg2CxXjG85ITE2t1kXGRkY9lW8nRaLDeIujBJC6ONufJJQCgO_esUOFDEXFl3Izv9QCm7JgP5OwAl94-7g9AvPbxcRt0gErorn84gTKymoU-3vOvRSVLbcCB-W4kgOIZua-)

clean_body: God is stirring the hearts of our Canadian brothers and sisters | | | Dear Friend, Let Us Worship is a movement born out of the desire to see a Holy revival fall upon our nation. But the desire for revival is not held exclusively by us Americans—far from it!! We've seen a hunger for revival from Believers all across the globe, from South Africa, to India, to Iraq and beyond!! In Mark chapter 12, Jesus taught, "Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.’ The second is this: ‘ Love your neighbor as yourself.’ There is no commandment greater than these. ” We know God is stirring the hearts of our northern neighbors, our Canadian brothers and sisters in Christ, as well as preparing to work in the lives of the lost. NOW IS THE TIME for us to bring Let Us Worship to Canada!!! To host these three revivals, we need to raise $60,000—that's $20,000 per revival. We don't have event sponsors or already pledged donations, so this is something we have to pay for all on our own. Canada is a hostile environment for the Gospel—we've seen pastors arrested for holding services during Canada's extreme COVID lockdowns and arrested for protesting child drag shows, but we heard God’s call to go and we are answering! Can you help us fund these three revivals for our Canadian brothers and sisters? Till all hear, Sean - | | P.S. Our new album Send Me is now available!!! The album contains old favorites like "Liberty Bells," and new ones like "Send Me." Listen to Send Me . | | International Donors— donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I saw what you had to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I hear you when you say that our nation is facing major problems

| |
---
| | | It's Kevin McCarthy.

I reviewed your responses to my recent check-in with top supporters, and I wanted to follow up with you directly, Friend.

I hear you when you say that our nation is facing major problems including securing the border, reducing inflation, growing the economy, standing up for parent's rights, and making America energy independent.

**[I am FULLY COMMITTED to looking out for the American people's best interests. I hate to ask more from you, but if you share my commitment to America and are able to donate please consider chipping in - _even just a few bucks will go a long way!_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b273e7798f3412e966dcbf831a972cd&_e=Q2mXMp0ZZZu0AVa-5g7O5x93IGL_2dTZshT9PZawIBESy1bsmsoz_oNVINJwIdzZAALwSFC6BhlCT-FiwLZgvrFTNHJz0u000krae7Lrq_cgB5TW9YX7MzVE-ZPsvGHw_EiP_z8xqav0VcAi4jsPXLiqaXrgRbGAgq2ZFGmhcuM_sJ7d-5dHaNsjos3hohlcRuct1WSIRxX-55zmSWbIDOFZLU9QziGLmdaS11AOLdyM3I6_8pSZmyoIGt4kaJLqwDqoxV7goqLM2qUIwX897oNr3D6zfM_lRX142aspipw1axm8aI1HUCEhduO1eqjmNucumd7lXmeA19Y7MdCRIvbghfPNQepeblPsXLgrYBVjEi-xAuEcvMcAouroFEdqbt-vtNI20dznlHsBi9dpS7Pi1jti38RgJm6jfsO-GPV8YoGdq6P9grwTXbinGKqtPCgLnMlSmEmP9fdlZ_uu4hlp6BbMkOhV0PCIS7HwRoVncpFoU6ZQY9hp0HJO5is1Zu9uWId2oKtnB5ZxYCw-D5MMrd54PflCvWI8FGDaOSs%3D "I am FULLY COMMITTED to looking out for the American people’s best interests. name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8v2dqhhmga31f4568i1gsc5p9kl209j030v2c20_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ce43n6252qsdcl60qhtv6edu5n4b7kkpr1i5n0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zffjfjngep6c4lu06hijlirk23t80ubavtfrq0p8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm2o34cjh2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zak9808gdnik2fgv5arcakvtn1uj16cdibfqevbg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z20gv29occnd04s9qqa32pbj5m0m1j6iu0dlck0g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm2o34cjh2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqca9jkb8vblpladolakv0ve977aoor7p1tfb4v8_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
---

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: This number means everything to our campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
$23.89
#
This number means everything to our campaign, Peter:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36270?refcode=em20230905-3699&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3699%2E614464%2EsEm84h)
Thanks to grassroots supporters just like you in Missouri + all across the country, we’ve built a record-breaking people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and take back this U.S. Senate seat for the people.
**In August, our average online donation was just $23.89.**
Whether folks responded to an email like this one, saw one of our Facebook ads, got one of our texts, or even just visited our website — this kind of small-dollar support plays a critical role in setting Lucas + our entire campaign up for success. **And with our next major end-of-quarter FEC deadline coming up at the end of this month, we’ve got to keep it going...**
National Republicans and corporate mega-donors are doing everything they can to keep Missouri’s Senate seat under their thumb. A few weeks ago, we even learned that they put more than **$1 MILLION** into a brand new Super PAC to prop up Hawley’s campaign and fund even more desperate attacks about Lucas.
So if we’re going to be able to continue fighting back and getting Lucas’ message in front of every Missouri voter between now and Election Day, we have no choice but to keep up this grassroots momentum. **That’s why we’re asking:**
**[Will you chip in $23.89, $15, or anything at all toward our grassroots movement today, Peter? That’s why they just upgraded our chances of winning from Likely Republican to Lean Republican. = = | = Last week, a new poll came out showing this race TIED 46% to 46%. And this rating upgrade proves that national experts are starting to recognize what we’re doing here in Mississippi. It’s crystal clear: Tate Reeves is the most unpopular Republican governor in the country, the voters are fed up with his antics, and we have a real shot at winning—which would expand healthcare to 220,000 Mississippians. But it’s not going to be easy, and Brandon’s counting on YOUR grassroots support to give him the resources to win in November. subject: Ken Paxton attacked Georgia elections…now he’s on trial in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
Split a donation between Georgia Dems and Texas Dems to help hold corrupt officials accountable

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69233053/425517653/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzBmZmYyYy0wOTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lvApxfSVFYSu3w2aihGIEZJqZZ43NZ_GS-hJVO1VOyk=&emci=2ab67bbd-e84b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=570fff2c-094c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

**In December 2020, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton sued the state of Georgia in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election, disenfranchise millions of Georgia voters, and do the bidding of Donald Trump.**

Ken Paxton has created such a **_legacy of crime and corruption_** within his Office of Attorney General that Texas House Republicans determined Paxton’s crimes against the public were grave enough to warrant the first impeachment of an elected official in Texas in over 50 years. **Today, the Impeachment Trial of Ken Paxton begins in the Texas Senate.** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69233054/425517654/-2140796157?refcode=20230905.1_TDP_9E&amount=24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzBmZmYyYy0wOTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lvApxfSVFYSu3w2aihGIEZJqZZ43NZ_GS-hJVO1VOyk=)
---

Fellow Patriot,

Sometimes it's hard to understand what's happening in the D.C. Swamp. Still, it just comes down to one thing - **Liberals and the political ruling class are opposed to what is objectively in the best interests of the American people.**

**It boils down to this:**

* _They 've allowed, and in many instances profited from, the decimation of the American industrial base by China..._
* _They chose to allow our country to flood with criminals and drugs by not securing our border ..._
* _They chose to censor incriminating information on Hunter Biden 's illicit activities to tilt the narrative during the 2020 Election..._
* **_And_ they aim to teach the next generation of Americans to **HATE** our country via **Marxist indoctrination** from the moment they step into Elementary school until they graduate from College as _FULL-ON LEFTISTS!_**

Democrats are pushing delusional yet devastating ideas and policies that would ruin America as we know and love it. _Luckily, we have Congressman Kevin Hern and House Conservatives as our last line of defense until we take back the Senate and the White House!_

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Hi, it’s Ann.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
This may be the first time you’ve heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp6tr726cm8hq7qkqk7avler3i879fs5eha94v4o_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmao72c9h2bs)
---
**[I’m reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf87ako7q91k9dg0stld2er13r48hem4ncbpjhto_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmao72c9h2bs)** Before you ask, no: I’m not talking about the Presidential election. I’m not talking about threats from China. I’m not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that’s happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I’m talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You’ve seen what’s happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids’ mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what’s happening in our nation’s schools is an accident. Rather, it’s the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they’ve: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can’t do this without your help. Could you do me a personal favor and send in a donation of $17.76 or more to help the 1776 Project PAC get brave conservative school board candidates elected nationwide?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za05llr5vo3g6t3inft255h0sm6i4j1np27esgbg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmao72c9h2bs)** **Friend****, if p atriots like you and I don’t stand up today, America’s destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas.** We cannot let that happen. **[That’s why I’m hoping and praying that you’ll join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC as they fight to take back our schools with a donation of just $17.76 today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z71oeap6cnmd6qqfes0dvgbfptiqjrj9r9h4qef0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmao72c9h2bs)** Thank you for taking the time to review this message. God Bless You, Ann Coulter, On Behalf of the 1776 Project PAC

subject: Top Republican sends Joe Biden one warning that’s keeping him up at night
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 05, 2023

Top Republican sends
Joe Biden one warning that's keeping him up at night
The President and his
lackeys are barely treading water. His scandals are massive with
no end in sight.

And a top Republican sent Joe
Biden one warning that's keeping him up at night.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Trump smacked Joe Biden
across the face with this big reality check

Former President
Donald Trump is done playing the nice guy. He's on a mission to
clear his name.
➞ Continue Reading

This impeachment trial has
put President Biden on notice

The process of
impeachment should be used sparingly. But always used when a
politician is caught red-handed.
➞ Continue Reading

Border Patrol uncovers
alarming situation that has Biden sick to his stomach

Biden's border crisis
is a complete catastrophe. But it's far more serious than anyone
ever thought.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

name: Prescott for Congress
subject: Russell Prescott announces another round of NH endorsements
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 5, 2023
---
| Contact: Derek Dufresne derek@ascent-strategic.com; 202-809-6013
---
| Russell Prescott Announces Another Round of NH Endorsements
---
| Exeter, NH \- After announcing that his campaign war chest has surpassed $400,000 and unveiling an impressive first round of endorsements, Russell Prescott is now releasing his second round of endorsements.
Former NHGOP Chairman Wayne MacDonald, Londonderry "I've worked alongside Russell Prescott for many years, and I trust him. I have seen him defeat Democrats like Maggie Hassan when others could not, and I have watched him govern in a conservative way that still brings in the independent votes we need to win in swing districts. I'm proud to be one of Russell's early endorsements as we work to unify our party in order to defeat Congressman Chris Pappas."
Former State Senator for District 19 and former State Representative, Jim Rausch, Derry "Derry and its surrounding communities deserve an advocate in Washington who will put their families' interests first, and I am beyond confident that Russell Prescott is the right person for that job. He has the experience, record, and temperament that I wish we saw more of on Capitol Hill. Russell is the right candidate to take on Chris Pappas, and I look forward to working hard to ensure he is elected as our New Hampshire's First District Congressman next year."
Former State Senator for District 16 and former State Representative, David Boutin, Hooksett "Hooksett and Manchester families have struggled under the failures of career politicians like Chris Pappas in Washington. We need a fresh voice who knows our state and our communities, which is why I'm fully supporting Russell Prescott for Congress. I trust him to bring New Hampshire values to the Halls of Congress, and to ensure our Live Free or Die mindset is reflected in the representation we send there."
Former State Senate President and Senator for District 10, Tom Eaton, Keene "As President of the State Senate, I counted on Russell Prescott's leadership and steady hand to ensure our fiscally conservative policies advanced and benefited New Hampshire families. Russell always proved himself to be a fair, principled, and thoughtful voice in Concord, which is why I know he will do the same in Congress. He has my full endorsement in NH-01."
State Representative and School Board Member, Carlos Gonzalez, Manchester "I've worked with Russell Prescott for decades at the State House, and I trust him implicitly. I have seen his leadership firsthand, and I am confident he understands the struggles of Manchester's hardworking families. He will fight for us in Washington. He has my total support in his campaign for Congress."
Additional endorsements:
* Former State Senator for District 1 and former House Majority Caucus Whip, John Gallus, Berlin

* State Representative John Potucek, Derry

* State Representative Larry Gagne, Manchester

* State Representative Deb Hobson, East Kingston

* Former State Representative Kathy Hoelzel, Raymond

* Jim Boyle, Auto Dealer, Portsmouth

* Former State Representative Kurt Wuelper, Strafford

* Ron Severino, Severino Trucking, Candia

* Jay Flanders, former Chief of Staff to the New Hampshire State Senate, Sunapee

* Brian Boyle, Boyle Construction, Atkinson

Previously released endorsements:
* Chris Albert, Small Business Owner, Nottingham

* Rep. Pat Abrami, retired, Stratham

* Rep. Al Baldasaro, retired, Londonderry

* Senator Bill Bartlett, retired, Kingston

* Matt Connors, President of Gemini Electric, Auburn

* Rep. Tracy Emerick, Hampton

* Ken Fifield, Selectman and former Police Chief, Wakefield

* Senator Bill Gannon, District 23, Sandown

* Rep. John Graham, retired, Bedford

* Rep. Joe Hagan, retired, Chester

* Rep. John Hunt, retired, Rindge

* Rep. William Infantine, Manchester

* Rep. Aboul Kahn, Seabrook

* Al Letizio, Small Business Owner, Windham

* Jay Lucas, Business and Community Leader, NH Republican Nominee for Governor (1998), Portsmouth

* John Nyhan, Community Leader, Hampton

* House Majority Whip Rep. Jeanine Notter, Merrimack

* Rep. Norm Major, retired, Plaistow

* Sheriff Chuck Massahos, Rockingham County Sheriff

* Rep. Henry Mock, retired, Jackson

* Rep. Brian Murphy, retired, Rye

* Hon. David Patch, Fish & Game Commissioner, retired, Bartlett

* Rep. Mark Pearson, Hampstead

* Colonel Lynn Presby, NH State Police (Ret)

* Senator Jim Rubens, retired, Hanover

* Reps. Doug Scamman and Stella Scamman, retired, Stratham

* Wendy Stanley Jones, Community Leader, Greenland

* Senator Nancy Stiles, retired, Hampton

* Rep. Michael Vose, retired, Epping

* Rep. Ken Weyler, Kingston

* Paul Young, Small Business Owner, Portsmouth

---
|
---
| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---
| ###
---

Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: "Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... | | **Friend** ,

Politicians should be judged by their actions, not just their words.

In his first test as Congressman, Nick LaLota failed miserably.

**LaLota had the chance to expel his disgraced colleague George Santos from Congress, but instead he voted to pass the buck** and assured us his conference would oust Santos before the August recess.

Washington insider reality check?
* August is over
* George Santos is still in Congress
* We haven’t heard a peep from the Ethics Committee supposedly doing the investigation

I’m not surprised.**The truth is Nick LaLota voted to protect George Santos because that’s what the Republican leadership wanted.**

He doesn’t care that George Santos is making a mockery of public service.

He doesn’t care that George Santos is bringing shame to Long Island.

He only cares about protecting his buddies in Washington D.C.

It didn’t take long for Nick LaLota to start playing political games in Congress. That’s not the kind of representation you deserve.**I’m running against Nick LaLota to be a respectable, responsible leader that Long Islanders can be proud of.**

If you think that sounds good – [please send a donation my way](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=a4cc5ce07b&e=a6aa651d40). I’m going to need your help.

Thanks,
Jim

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to Gloria Johnson's campaign for U.S. Senate in Tennessee. She is running against far-right Republican Marsha Blackburn and just launched her campaign today.

Gloria Johnson is one of the Tennessee Three — the three Democratic legislators Republicans silenced after the Covenant school shooting.
Now she's running against Marsha Blackburn, a huge recipient of NRA fundraising and a far-right Senator who is, in her words, "leading the fight to protect life."
So please:

Friend,
A judge ruled that all of my court proceedings in Atlanta will be TELEVISED for the entire country to watch.
The Communist Democrats would love nothing more than for me to be stuck in court in a televised spectacle as a way to keep me off the campaign trail.
_But I refuse to play into the Left’s hands._
That’s why I have waived my in-person formal arraignment and simply pleaded **“NOT GUILTY”** to the indictment in the Georgia witch hunt...

will you join me for lunch this Friday? | | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=41ea6856f3&e=292fde286a)

| Hi Peter,

There’s still time to RSVP to my annual luncheon happening this Friday, September 8th at 11am. [Click here to RSVP today!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=8b92e7d625&e=292fde286a)

| I hope I get the chance to chat with you over lunch at Original Joe's in Westlake, Peter. If you can't attend, I'd appreciate it if you could make a contribution today to support my re-election campaign. [Click here to make your donation.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=e38e3b70c8&e=292fde286a)

Thank you for your friendship and support.

| Sincerely,
Congressman Kevin Mullin

Rebuilding the party of Ronald Reagan starts with remembering that what is at stake is much more important than yet another reality TV show contest.” **

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Union Strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Workers’ victories are America’s victories

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69234816/425523348/-772585877?refcode=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBhZDJhOC0wZDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VwQJSwyxjvVb85I4Dhkyf7TPmjJ0tJdGC7gVH7yx7w=)
---
First, I want to thank you for all your support in the last month. Second, I hope you had a safe and happy Labor Day weekend.

The holiday that marks the first weekend of September is to honor the history of the movement for workers’ rights. It’s all thanks to unions that we have weekends, pensions, child labor laws, and safer workplace conditions.

**The success of our workers means a stronger country for all of us.** We must never forget that – and we must remain vigilant against all efforts to roll back workers' rights.

I’m proud to have voted for historic infrastructure and CHIPS legislation that’s led to the creation of thousands of good-paying union jobs. I'm proud to have twice voted for the PRO Act, which would make it easier for employees to collectively bargain and crack down on underhanded union-busting tactics (I was deeply disappointed to see this bill stall in the Senate thanks to the filibuster, and I won’t stop advocating to see it become law). And my resolve remains strong to fight for expanded paid family and medical leave – because no worker should be forced to choose between their job and their health or loved ones.

I’m encouraged by the surge of union memberships around the country over the last few years. Even in the face of strong opposition from Republican state legislatures and some major corporate interests, folks are standing up and demanding fair pay to keep up with the cost of living, reasonable hours, and basic dignity. **And in many instances, they are succeeding and making their workplaces more equal, safer, and productive. Their victories boost our economy and are helping create more jobs.**

I’m proud to be a supporter of our unions, and I will continue to be a voice for them in Congress.

Best,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69234820/425523358/-772585877?refcode=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBhZDJhOC0wZDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VwQJSwyxjvVb85I4Dhkyf7TPmjJ0tJdGC7gVH7yx7w=)****
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Keeping us from the TRUTH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless than acknowledge the truth we present.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeqm225ugt7ioe7ukat5sb41hnqs5qvcej1r5g10_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmeor1c9h2bs)
Hey, Fellow American,

The establishment has long pulled the strings, holding back individuals like us who refuse to conform to their twisted narrative.

They'd rather see us silenced, weak, and powerless, than acknowledge the truth we present.

But together, we can expose their lies and return power to the people where it belongs.

I need your support, and not just in spirit. The establishment has big money and even bigger corporations in their corner. They also have career politicians like Nikki Haley, Mike Pence and Chris Christie in their pockets. Nothing ever really changes. It's the same old politicians who will do anything to make a buck.

I will tell you what no one else on that stage will - **THE ESTABLISHMENT IS LYING TO YOU.**

They cannot be trusted.
The politicians. The media. The corporations. They're all in it together. _**And you're the one who pays.**_

What we have, though, is the strength of conviction and the passion of warriors like you.

Here's where you come in, Fellow American: **[To truly challenge the establishment, we need resources. Every donation, big or small, helps us get one step closer to knocking out the establishment elites.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaougb1veaefc6n1tlqeu9rc94ha5gb2sugf52rg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmeor1c9h2bs)**

Remember, this isn't just my fight; it's OUR fight.

Join the rebellion. Make your mark. Stand with me against the establishment.

Stop the lies. **[Donate today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z486jptv7rs8f7a9fg9l7en5i4c857dntfsmudh0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmeor1c9h2bs)**

Stay strong. Stay free.

In Truth,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6ffinjr83s5gv5fl6lu9dt9pmkqfc0h40jd17og_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmeor1c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. They think we'll back down. They think we'll be quiet. **Let's prove them wrong._Together_.**

| [** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT -> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zedu5o8veu40q53hupl3dhjr297ft4ho58jaf07g_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmeor1c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8vp06p3cs5t879h9gmss163rpvpc6euk8v3r9vo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmeor1c9h2bs)

subject: Our politicians aren't getting it done
body:

| | Washington DC needs a reality check, my friend. Will Hurd is talking about the problems that nobody else is...
---
|
---
_**❌ Today, another tens of thousands of people entered the country illegally.**_ _**💰Another billion dollars has been added to the national debt.**_ _**🏚️ Another American neighborhood has become less safe.**_ _**🇨🇳 American families are struggling while China grows stronger.**_
---
|

I am disgusted by what the FBI has become. The government has been weaponized against those who dare disagree with the controlling party's agenda. Our Founding Fathers knew that if you allow power to accumulate like they have in Washington, if you don't hold these agencies Constitutionally accountable, they WILL abuse their power. And that's exactly what they've done._Now Catholics in our country are being labeled 'extremists.'_ We are not going to sit idly by and let them mobilize power against people of faith and people with whom they disagree. For far too long, this bureaucracy has imposed its will on us. It's about time we impose our will on it, and that's what we're going to do. **Our Constitutional right of religious freedom is too important to let fade into the dustbin of history. **

| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=41544c808059463a83ac12ee2714d80f&_e=T66YxkhcVq7qpHs_rhgA7lLWtM_PW6tg5t7hcQpcm1kGQb-TRchQENWVG0ZYnm9hAmMJXm3iokYqJDFqyMJ6FqMq-7LlNY5cHl42ECoQxae01tlKDiGjdyGxsLfS0iPrSjaTT667mZnzjeCsp4tfVFlAQCB1RwX-whmuKwtp1BBYiSuJ56sNrtSxUe-BOSo0Im4o_7aNsEH-sY7rJt0QIxJuIadYQTH2uM8Imt8LQloZ4hvMfZ9p6eMSu0CsrjAaR48jQPuU6L_UHhwMP0G-3QuNMX8tJIoaGo19H9_avBA-VHpgHpfj9mHTnPD_Wi0jNJ1e7LoJZsaUXJGGP-wTwyxuBFqoBjNmOuz5NIm7JUmcjLmU3gzgVY1PSX17ofUm5lkLqNTCaZqljL9zZh0UIgidY5GrxI2jF0dDS76VoMi3oH14qSRF4Rd_QEke9XnM)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Derek, I’m running for the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m taking on Marsha Blackburn for the future of Tennessee.
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230905-1?refcode=em20230905-1-8543&refcode2=8543_434096_nA6fUe&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)
**[Derek, I’m a teacher, a Tennessee state legislator, and a proud member of the Tennessee Three. Today, I’m announcing my run for US Senate. I need your support in this fight-- contribute any amount right now to become a Day One Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and John Fetterman.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230905-1?refcode=em20230905-1-8543&refcode2=8543_434096_nA6fUe&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)**
I’m in this race because _Tennesseans deserve better._
That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice.
So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest.
I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. _But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone._
The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. _Then the GOP majority passed a new law to increase access to guns._
**MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us.** They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists.
_But one thing has changed -- the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee._
**I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better.** Period.
Marsha has _failed_ us in her five years in office. She’s voted _against_ everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote.
She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies.
**Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us.** She’s had five years and _nothing_ is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it.
**[From day one, I’ve been fighting for Tennesseans. Now I need you to have my back on Day One of this campaign. Click here to split a donation between John Fetterman and me.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230905-1?refcode=em20230905-1-8543&refcode2=8543_434096_nA6fUe&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230905-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230905-8543&refcode2=8543_434096_nA6fUe&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)**
With you,
Gloria
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230905-1?refcode=em20230905-1-8543&refcode2=8543_434096_nA6fUe&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230905-8543-footer&t=1&refcode2=8543_434096_nA6fUe&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8543%2E434096%2EnA6fUe)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

I’m reaching out because I need your help ... Republicans have launched new attack ads and billboards throughout my district. This is the biggest attack I’ve seen so early in an election cycle. We need to raise $10,000 so we can launch new ads of our own to respond! **[So before I go any further, will you please rush in a generous donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69236114/425527351/-1515403871?&refcode=E4006-20230905-JoshAttacks-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWYxODVkZTUtMGY0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OO3MBKsVqozSSWr6xHIau7CFdaiokSYkY9Sxo1Fx6SM=)** Here’s why I need your support: **First,** keeping my seat blue is critical to taking back the House and making sure Kevin McCarthy doesn’t hang onto the Speaker’s gavel for two more years. We just had an amazing BBQ with our Senate candidates here in California showing the real difference between Democrats and Republicans. The GOP wants to steal that momentum by ramping up their attacks - we can’t let them control the narrative! **Second,** this is hands down the biggest attack I’ve ever faced so early in a cycle. Republicans have launched new attack ads and billboards throughout my district. This is the biggest attack I’ve seen so early in an election cycle. We need to raise $10,000 so we can launch new ads of our own to respond! = Here’s why I need your support: First, keeping my seat blue is critical to taking back the House and making sure Kevin McCarthy doesn’t hang onto the Speaker’s gavel for two more years. We just had an amazing BBQ with our Senate candidates here in California showing the real difference between Democrats and Republicans. The GOP wants to steal that momentum by ramping up their attacks - we can’t let them control the narrative! Second, this is hands down the biggest attack I’ve ever faced so early in a cycle. Usually we see these kinds of attacks during election season, but this year national Republicans are coming after me with everything they’ve got because Kevin McCarthy is desperate to keep his MAGA majority in Congress. Third, my team wants to launch a brand new round of ads so we can fight back against these attacks right away, but I can’t say yes until we reach our $10,000 goal. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- I’m so grateful for this grassroots team! \- Josh *

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsqodiegag3hu962bn7acnbdq6oalhgvj76g2s28_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjgmeor1c9h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Action News

I am disgusted by what the FBI has become. The government has been weaponized against those who dare disagree with the controlling party's agenda. Our Founding Fathers knew that if you allow power to accumulate like they have in Washington, if you don't hold these agencies Constitutionally accountable, they WILL abuse their power. And that's exactly what they've done._Now Catholics in our country are being labeled 'extremists.'_ We are not going to sit idly by and let them mobilize power against people of faith and people with whom they disagree. For far too long, this bureaucracy has imposed its will on us. It's about time we impose our will on it, and that's what we're going to do. **Our Constitutional right of religious freedom is too important to let fade into the dustbin of history. **
---

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. body:
Our team hit the streets on Labor Day to help folks register to vote.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69237196/425530969/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230905labor_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzNzJjY2VmLTEzNGMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Td6-tFKi2STsZcdSqyhQlIVL5D8JXajEK2rNf6gwgx4=)
| Hi fellow activist,

The labor movement harnessed collective power to transform our nation, build the middle class, and win desperately needed worker protections — despite often violent and sometimes deadly resistance. Every day, we are inspired by the labor movement’s hard work and sacrifice, and we use that inspiration to fuel our work.

Expanding the electorate is all about using collective power to accomplish transformative change. That’s why we are out every day in communities across Pennsylvania, engaging Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth across the Commonwealth to tap into their power by voting in every single election.

And Monday was no different:

**Our teams across the Commonwealth hit the streets on Labor Day to help folks register to vote. We showed up at community events across the state, ensuring Pennsylvanians were informed, engaged, and ready to make their voices heard.** [**But, this work must extend beyond this one weekend. Will you help us conduct year-round voter registration, civic education and mobilization within our centered communities by donating $25 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69237197/425530970/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230905labor_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzNzJjY2VmLTEzNGMtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Td6-tFKi2STsZcdSqyhQlIVL5D8JXajEK2rNf6gwgx4=) clean_body: Our team hit the streets on Labor Day to help folks register to vote. = | Hi fellow activist, The labor movement harnessed collective power to transform our nation, build the middle class, and win desperately needed worker protections — despite often violent and sometimes deadly resistance. Every day, we are inspired by the labor movement’s hard work and sacrifice, and we use that inspiration to fuel our work. Expanding the electorate is all about using collective power to accomplish transformative change. That’s why we are out every day in communities across Pennsylvania, engaging Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth across the Commonwealth to tap into their power by voting in every single election. And Monday was no different: Our teams across the Commonwealth hit the streets on Labor Day to help folks register to vote. We showed up at community events across the state, ensuring Pennsylvanians were informed, engaged, and ready to make their voices heard. = you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = ** With your help, we will expand the electorate in Pennsylvania to not only reflect the Commonwealth's demographically changing population but also to elect candidates who represent the change and policies we all want to see for our future. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4pj2o44bn9eq4ud6rucfk7nbrlmmmebluh93ejo_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjim0pj4c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znc7hfbt5v5v4buo9idu6uka4c7024to9jvqcfsg_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjim0pj4c9h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaku2smo7u4monqpj01ofmqsvfsj5quq1ffjsbu0_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjim0pj4c9h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zijiq5kg1fis5c63hc7r5js0u8o628j74t8lf868_rp22sh2s8i66p76cjim0pj4c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
