body:
This may be the first time you've heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57ae7f8aa13c48668c567f9b87787f13&_e=CJyUWjFmTryCwKdssJ0B4GPegeAxbJ8oYKstlNcfHDGt70RcUmFSA17wI9XD_TjUAqyUd5S3K3apS7XHVKZ_CB8AHUOkDqI1f0nLkuHAbR8NXYd57hs2k80Ec_zVkVbioShnVcNUX9r8RTaSly_hayuUv3NX_21OzDgyBrEKQgFWN2ynIVcMMFTN8WjsS7hHnU_9E1f2RinOI5hNjScjg3M0JPvCJLghk0lOocHnHpAxk0cpSk-ryjA0XW5ccjbEcBm316XeFYWbTVzQ5bbJSsFjDnsBWD6CkObtfRMyw3CptyRIauwDPoxqIZUREjc_lD20qaHUUKnHzEtGiH_Qpzo1eBZaGDbVjepn99oHK3m0PgTAGPwtOS0forlQQibjmN4vEGtKsEApx-DIYNyc-MtQTUBogI0jE01gWE-3ar-9BqAj2M-ApBW82kAhtWby)
---
**[I'm reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57ae7f8aa13c48668c567f9b87787f13&_e=CJyUWjFmTryCwKdssJ0B4GPegeAxbJ8oYKstlNcfHDGt70RcUmFSA17wI9XD_TjUAqyUd5S3K3apS7XHVKZ_CB8AHUOkDqI1f0nLkuHAbR8NXYd57hs2k80Ec_zVkVbioShnVcNUX9r8RTaSly_hayuUv3NX_21OzDgyBrEKQgFWN2ynIVcMMFTN8WjsS7hHnU_9E1f2RinOI5hNjScjg3M0JPvCJLghk0lOocHnHpAxk0cpSk-ryjA0XW5ccjbEcBm316XeFYWbTVzQ5bbJSmVKn8tzCMBkyV4zs7tq3L1yr7AZu3oBNGCAEVC1CMQYIq0x0DAy3oZdEOtv-LgOenanOZk3lclnxZGbN2y4eQr27UvdhjbNhDIsM4G_8Tls19TFM1T45gsk32EmyvOXdAZLzVN2HUq4b-0qJrcxrZKu8eHY_Yfp83VoYOSa-QXe)** Before you ask, no: I'm not talking about the Presidential election. I'm not talking about threats from China. I'm not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that's happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I 'm talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You've seen what's happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids' mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are "racist systems." And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what's happening in our nation's schools is an accident. clean_body: This may be the first time you've heard from me in a while, but this is important. | | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter. Before you ask, no: I'm not talking about the Presidential election. I'm not talking about threats from China. I'm not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that's happening in Washington, D.C.. I 'm talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country. You've seen what's happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids' mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are "racist systems." And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what's happening in our nation's schools is an accident. Rather, it's the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back. Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections. Take it from me: Ryan's team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they've: ✅Liberated MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅FIRED 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅Endorsed and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. Friend, if p atriots like you and I don't stand up today, America's destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas. We cannot let that happen. Thank you for taking the time to review this message. It is always great to support women's empowerment, and Emily's presentation was full of information and new strategies I will be taking with me on the campaign trail.

clean_body: ICYMI | | | | | Friends, A lot has happened since my campaign for Congress in the 7th District launched at the end of July. For Starters, I released my launch video. Please check that out ==! In case you missed it, please let me get you caught up on some of my campaign's activities! | == | == == == | == | == == == | == | We had a great night at the Women Leaders Series, in partnership with Amber Benzon, founder of Level Up! I can't show enough gratitude for the opportunity to cohost with her. Emily and Nadine, from The Leadership Institute, were sensational, too. It is always great to support women's empowerment, and Emily's presentation was full of information and new strategies I will be taking with me on the campaign trail. The Blue Valley Farm Show was a blast! I am always happy to connect with the agriculture community in PA-07 and register new Republicans. Pennsylvania's farmers feed the world! | | | | | Please join me at one of my upcoming fundraisers! We will be in Carbon County on Thursday, 9/7, and another local event on Sunday, 9/10. Please RSVP with Eric at, eric@mariamontero.org. I hope to see you there! Your support is crucial to winning this race! To make contributions online, please go to mariamontero.org/donate. Thank you! PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO == == | | | | | | | Friends of Maria Montero | PO Box 1494, Easton, PA 18044 | | Sent by mailto:info@mariamontero.org powered by

sign on now to show your support for an assault weapons ban

---
Friend, did you see this email from Kirsten?
Although less than three months have passed since she sent this email, the number of mass shootings in 2023 has, tragically, already skyrocketed to more than 470.
Our country is in the midst of a full-blown gun violence epidemic. And we all know that it won't end until leaders in Washington finally stand up to the gun lobby and pass an assault weapons ban. Kirsten is working hard to win the votes that we need to finally get these weapons of war off our streets. But she's counting on people like you to continue raising your voices for change until we get the job done.
**That's why I'm asking you to add your name to this petition to help us reach our new 10,000 signature goal before our midnight deadline.

[_Please, will you sign on now to show your support for an assault weapons ban? Your signature would mean so much to Kirsten._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69238722/425535735/925398452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4415-su-nd&refcode=jtk4415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNTFiOS0xNjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2B7-8hImA7qwAvU-rTOdMlTWCfedQ9RnQZPhs1n_kY=&emci=6e189039-2048-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ac1051b9-164c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

Friend, there have already been more than 200 mass shootings in 2023 alone. _That's more than one shooting for every single day of the year._
America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic — and families and communities across the nation are paying the price every single day. It's heartbreaking. It's infuriating. And it's long past time we address this problem head-on.
**Today, on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I'm asking 5,000 people on this team to raise their voices for change by signing my petition to support an assault weapons ban.[_Please, will you mark this day by adding your name to keep these weapons of war away from schools, off our streets and out of our communities?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69238724/425535737/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4415-su-nd&refcode=jtk4415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNTFiOS0xNjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2B7-8hImA7qwAvU-rTOdMlTWCfedQ9RnQZPhs1n_kY=&emci=6e189039-2048-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ac1051b9-164c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

---
Today, it feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shooting — at a school, a mall, a grocery store or even a family's own backyard — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable.
But here's the thing, friend: **This cycle _isn't_ endless. The next mass killing _isn't_ inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take _right now_ to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence.** And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms.
Last year, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including my legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. You have my word that I won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.
**[_So please, if you believe that we can win a future where communities are free from gun violence, will you add your name to support an assault weapons ban? I'm counting on your signature before midnight to know that you're on my side in this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69238726/425535739/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4415-su-nd&refcode=jtk4415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNTFiOS0xNjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2B7-8hImA7qwAvU-rTOdMlTWCfedQ9RnQZPhs1n_kY=&emci=6e189039-2048-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ac1051b9-164c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69238727/425535740/470233459?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4415-su-nd&refcode=jtk4415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNTFiOS0xNjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2B7-8hImA7qwAvU-rTOdMlTWCfedQ9RnQZPhs1n_kY=&emci=6e189039-2048-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ac1051b9-164c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

With hope for the future,

Kirsten
|
* * *

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69238729/425535742/1575385346?code=jtk4415-su-nd&refcode=jtk4415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNTFiOS0xNjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2B7-8hImA7qwAvU-rTOdMlTWCfedQ9RnQZPhs1n_kY=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69238730/425535743/1575385346?code=jtk4415-su-nd&refcode=jtk4415-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNTFiOS0xNjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2B7-8hImA7qwAvU-rTOdMlTWCfedQ9RnQZPhs1n_kY=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I’m running to defeat Rick Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=Ho9s6YpdTNGyu4k7xcTQn9115Gh6gin2cZcw5Tn3WngG3wb97xGD3iAuy3r%2BwFVsHvLXAz6L0FQXtP1ADvSSitF9Pb1f6rqnVWT%2FnUrMZXQN5DAF5E0s%2B4m6DKihP6v3ChnkOoYvW8mCteS1VoAxITvr84tVvR5ANK9gl1%2BLbu71FVcnPIS21gcDRnkytSUaejzk0gnjaOBYAxiYxuRmRv2xZPInHlS1hYyq2Ejy9Ljq3s7gd2DXgxxO3qPKmkUtvs9HgjLUBRxd%2FpI7gwRKSAg%2Bh4ttz76y0Iv3Vpv2hGFGMlZL6qWks2WlHovGuKnUj0msOXiVZaqONU0hNj4pdPnkgdOrdu%2BU%2BdIpSyxbKMB%2FFkJv6FmQBc%2B3kDNpTem%2FF1PUHKW9elgTn9ZrzRnhr6ZZj4mtxgEr3maJ%2F6%2FTLwc0Y68fQf5DopUVd15Td5ox .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Peter,
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. I’m an immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. And I’m officially running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and serve as Florida’s next U.S. Senator.
Rick Scott has failed us in Florida, and I refuse to sit back and watch him push my state and country backward. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our economy, and our very democracy — and even more, I’m prepared to win.
But this race will be one of the most competitive Senate races in 2024, and we’re up against a deep-seated Republican incumbent who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time around. The only way I can compete — and win — is with the support of grassroots Democrats like you.
I've set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 by midnight to defeat Rick Scott, and I need your help to reach it. Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez right now to flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
When I was 14, my mom, my three sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador to find a better life in America. We lived in a one room apartment. My mom worked double-shifts during the day and took classes at night to learn English. I picked up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet.
Those years weren’t easy. But thanks to my mother’s relentless belief in a brighter future for her children, I went on to graduate from college, become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and write the bill to expand Medicare Advantage coverage.
My story — coming from a one room apartment to walking the halls of Congress — is only possible in America. But Rick Scott has spent his time in Washington doing everything he can to destroy the country that gave my family a shot at a better life.
Rick Scott has a net worth up to nearly a quarter of a billion dollars, yet he’s proposed tax increases on working families and the middle class. He’s pushed for a nationwide abortion ban. And he wrote the GOP plan to end the Social Security and Medicare that so many rely on.
That’s why I’m running to defeat him next November. Experts say that Rick will be one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot — which means that if we build a powerful grassroots team full of people like you, Peter, we can take him down.
So please, I’m personally asking: Will you become one of my very first grassroots donors by splitting a gift between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez today? Every dollar gets us one step closer to defeating Rick Scott and defending our Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight for a better Florida and a better future for all of us.
With gratitude,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-rgtx-23q3-em?amount=5]

clean_body: You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: . [] Peter, My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. I’m an immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. And I’m officially running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and serve as Florida’s next U.S. Senator. Rick Scott has failed us in Florida, and I refuse to sit back and watch him push my state and country backward. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our economy, and our very democracy — and even more, I’m prepared to win. But this race will be one of the most competitive Senate races in 2024, and we’re up against a deep-seated Republican incumbent who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time around. The only way I can compete — and win — is with the support of grassroots Democrats like you. I've set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 by midnight to defeat Rick Scott, and I need your help to reach it. Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez right now to flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority? [] When I was 14, my mom, my three sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador to find a better life in America. We lived in a one room apartment. My mom worked double-shifts during the day and took classes at night to learn English. I picked up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet. Those years weren’t easy. But thanks to my mother’s relentless belief in a brighter future for her children, I went on to graduate from college, become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and write the bill to expand Medicare Advantage coverage. My story — coming from a one room apartment to walking the halls of Congress — is only possible in America. But Rick Scott has spent his time in Washington doing everything he can to destroy the country that gave my family a shot at a better life. Rick Scott has a net worth up to nearly a quarter of a billion dollars, yet he’s proposed tax increases on working families and the middle class. He’s pushed for a nationwide abortion ban. And he wrote the GOP plan to end the Social Security and Medicare that so many rely on. That’s why I’m running to defeat him next November. Experts say that Rick will be one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot — which means that if we build a powerful grassroots team full of people like you, Peter, we can take him down. So please, I’m personally asking: Will you become one of my very first grassroots donors by splitting a gift between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez today? Every dollar gets us one step closer to defeating Rick Scott and defending our Senate majority. [] Thank you for joining me in this fight for a better Florida and a better future for all of us. With gratitude, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? body:
We are on the verge of victory–all because of YOU! | | | | |
---
|
---
Team Becky,
When I entered this race just 3 months ago, there were many doubters. But, we are on the verge of victory–all because of YOU!
I am extremely grateful for your generosity of time, finances, and willingness to spread the word. We can have better leadership that truly listens and cares about our communities.
Will you help one more time before the end of this primary? I really need every vote to get across the finish line today. And, when results are announced, [I’d love to have you join me tonight. **RSVP below!**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=811da4a649&e=6484bb6dd5)
[](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=8d67e5a611&e=6484bb6dd5)
In the meantime, text your friends and remind them to vote in person or drop off their ballot at a drop box location today! You can find a voting location at [vote.utah.gov.](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=e110621346&e=6484bb6dd5)
I can’t wait to celebrate this victory with all of you. Together, we are going to win this primary!
Becky

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Don’t just take our word for it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This headline says it all:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1106%2E35263%2EgX0PUR)
This _Associated Press_ headline says it all, Peter: [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230905_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1106%2E35263%2EgX0PUR) As **_“one of the few remaining swing states,”_** all eyes are on Wisconsin this election. Republicans — from far-right group Moms for Liberty to high-profile surrogates like Donald Trump Jr. — flocked to Milwaukee ahead of the GOP’s debate last month to make their intentions of flipping Wisconsin red clear. And now, up to two potential self-funding opponents are getting ready to enter the race for Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat and could bankroll their own campaigns to defeat Tammy. **We have an incredibly competitive and expensive race ahead of us, which is why we need your help now to build the resources to keep this toss-up seat blue.** **[That all comes down to this grassroots team. name: Doug White
subject: URGENT: Yakima and Walla Walla police protecting MAGA
body:
Why is the torture of rural America so difficult to reckon with? | The situation is so dire that, now more than ever, Democrats must support
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fdOfcQ50U/c?w=5FDNZ_KItobsdIPqowERu7eBW9Kre0k9VTDeghTjTnU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvL2ZkT2ZjUTUwVT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | URGENT: We have far right petitioners stationed outside of Walmarts in Central and Eastern Washington. It seems that they are using an interpretation of the law to allow them on private property and are refusing to leave, the Walmart management has been trying to get them off property for a week. The police and sheriff are adamant that they will do nothing. The police and sheriff have stated that a court order is required, however our courthouse has no idea as to what they are referring to. Additionally it seems that our police and sheriff are colluding with MAGA party members. The Mayor, Deputy Mayor, a council member and County Commissioner are all working on this with me and a transcript was requested this morning of the Mayor's conversation with the police yesterday by a known MAGA member. The only way that anyone could have known the Mayor spoke to the police is if the police tipped them off. Summary, we have police and sheriff selectively enforcing an ambiguous law, deliberately making the process opaque and colluding with MAGA. We have nowhere to turn as the people that are supposed to be protecting us are working against us. I feel like I am in China again.
---
| | |
---
| | Why is the torture of rural America so difficult to reckon with?
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fdOfcQ50U/c?w=6TGayCH-Vdfu06ypLisKQulCaSSclheM_VbsGCpcWNs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiI1M2Y4MTU4NS00YWFhLTQzNmMtMDU2Ni0wOWI1NDZlMTQyYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | The situation is so dire that, now more than ever, Democrats must support one another. Rural Democrats continue to give generously, but is there reciprocity? Evidence suggests that, against rational reasoning, Liberal Progressive Urban Democrats (LPUD) are not seeing our struggles in rural America? I know in my heart of hearts that Democrats would not let other Democrats suffer intentionally. So how can we be seen? The single greatest factor defining Republicans and Democrats is geography. Democrats hang on to urban centers and Republicans have swept through rural America. We know that Democrats living in rural areas are living under Republican ideology. The stories I can tell. . . Things I know, things I believe and I have experienced: One would think that rural America, Central Washington, is the Holy Grail of causes for LPUD:
* Depressed wages - Yakima County’s household income is half the state average
* Greatly decreased access to healthcare and
* Lower Medicare/caid reimbursement
* More likely to be first or second generation immigrant
* Home of indigenous people
* 37% more gun deaths in rural areas
* Greater threat of violence toward LGBTQ+
* Increased threat of violence from MAGA
* We are the water and land that needs to be saved
* Genz, Latinx and even union members are trending right
* And the list is endless

So why is it easier to pull teeth than to get LPUD to “see” us?
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fdOfcQ50U/c?w=YhQKCaEsGjDSDz6BwkwjfTHeQvUr2AVxtxtfUT-l78M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiJiYTI4NjM4NC03ODc1LTRjNTMtYWZhOC1kZTk1M2NjZDU5MDAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | Washington State is the tenth largest donor to electoral politics with two-thirds going to Democrats. Mostly Seattle Democrats give over $100M. That is a lot of rain, but like IRL very little of it falls on the east side of the Cascades. During the last election cycle I raised a few thousand dollars from Seattle, but my Republican opponent raised millions! Why?
I have spoken with and know the history of a number of nonprofits that have explored Central and Eastern Washington as places to invest. One very well known organization has stuck its toe in the water in Spokane and Yakima but ultimately pulled back. Another organization, which is excellent and does good work, stated that the competition for non profits to spend money in the Seattle area is so great that they need to find new places to spend their money. But even they have acknowledged that their big dollar donors are hesitant about investing in rural Central Washington.
---
| | A wonderful national rural organization, that I engage with regularly, went on the record to say that national nonprofits focused on rural issues are flush with cash, but sadly no one is building political infrastructure in rural areas. They are watching from a distance.
Why is our very real plight invisible? Why can we not be seen? We are the crystal ball that shows the future clearly. Ohio’s issue 1 was defeated, but a review of the voting shows an almost perfect urban/ rural split. But what is most alarming is that the Republican votes are encroaching on the suburbs. We can look to Alabama, Texas and Florida to see how the Republicans can run roughshod with impunity. Here in Central Washington we see our statewide elected leaders losing by larger margins each election cycle. This is a damning trend that can only be stopped by seeing the problem and investing. That investment must be in rural America. The future strategy can not depend solely on hanging on to what Democrats have, but it must retake what we have lost. This is both good business and morally correct. To abandon Democrats to live a MAGA existence is not the Democrat way.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fdOfcQ50U/c?w=Dr2mQ73PEkZgW1CfUWvPLBpFvGJ7ErDlopI_wtop4-4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiIzMzJlMmU1OS0zMGQ1LTQzZTQtYmQxZS0wYzc2MDYyYjliODciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | |
---

---

subject: re: Trump’s latest ATTACK on Jack Smith:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
please don’t let us down!
| **🚨 BREAKING 🚨
Trump Escalates Attacks on Special Counsel Jack Smith** Donald Trump has been threatening and attacking Special Counsel Jack Smith for indicting him for his crimes — even calling Smith _“deranged!”_

**We _refuse_ to sit by while Trump spouts his nonsense, so we’re sending Jack Smith a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Jack Smith now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52405?t=6&akid=10287%2E878179%2EBLQEv8) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52405?t=7&akid=10287%2E878179%2EBLQEv8)
---
TO: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_Thank you for all your hard work defending our democracy!_**

After Trump tried to OVERTURN President Biden’s victory and incited the deadly January 6th insurrection, we feared he would NEVER be held accountable.

Thanks to you, we’re one step closer to finally booting Trump out of politics for good. **_IT’S ABOUT TIME!_**

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for indicting Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52405?t=8&akid=10287%2E878179%2EBLQEv8) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52405?t=9&akid=10287%2E878179%2EBLQEv8)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10287%2E878179%2EBLQEv8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10287%2E878179%2EBLQEv8).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10287%2E878179%2EBLQEv8) to request fewer emails. body:
For only $7, this is the perfect tailgate accessory! Your order will support Tim Scott's campaign

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f253750a2af4145b871857478739a1b&_e=XzEibau1CtqUCN2Ccz-l0_JDcZEs_t_2KTEYPfz4YVQUSBRwcwVzDLXeYeEdDMqWMIYEphkIHvb65JUPvBuHyib_ggR4iwetHyKF81rIuhFJj4Khy4zbtK5uEHSFNxfPNyNRWXcsFJpBk00eZdKJzFF7E8r7oIB8c7Xvg7YzwhM6lG1CrCGni982vRbMrwhZz_6OdBGfV2GMcPoHgHcjhjKrZQIqxkyV-gSea3Kw5_dVlkFQIQ-Oagf5Vw5zUg6RR89e6ZCWsvqF4xx5rnQZHgwTc5OnTvT88jpYBkxXaPg_m1gGK24pooQGfv8xbBwxOrG_s-2IQcRAWnlhHvf7Vfp86CxO2JqgnnIX04VprQUbVPqh77xsez16qRZrD44b0TZGetDmI9SGv31CMf-s00B0HtLkoLH8MlLQ_dq0TxJopq9pIP0opOaq2K07XveDGoowSVvM9PWHzEgR6-TuyA%3D%3D "GRAB YOUR BRAND NEW TIM SCOTT DRINK COOLER")
---

Friend,

FOOTBALL season is finally here! College football, the NFL, and good ol' Friday night lights are starting up again across America.

**Peter, the Presidential election cycle is already heating up.** Last month, the Republican nominees took the debate stage in Milwaukee, where they railed against abortion access, denied climate change, and defended Donald Trump’s actions on January 6.

While MAGA Republicans are in a race to the bottom of who can be most radical, Democratic legislators like Yadira Caraveo are in Congress doing their best to advocate for the issues that matter most to their constituents.

Here at Caraveo HQ, we take supporter feedback very seriously. We’re running this campaign with the interests of this grassroots movement in mind, so in light of everything, our team wants to check in:

**[Will you help us cut through the Republican noise and tell us what you want Yadira to prioritize in Congress and on the campaign trail?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69245052/425542923/-1158519932?refcode=em_surv_2023.09.05_b1_chq_120do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2JjNmM5Ni0xZDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-H7ZNHcHH7gptHySCze6S0cwS7PD0Id2ALvnsdvmoc=&emci=a72c91b0-ee4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=37bc6c96-1d4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=12666102)**

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: Labor makes us all stronger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
Thank you for your support for last week’s deadline! I so appreciate it – especially ahead of the public fundraising deadline at the end of this month. **** Thank you for your support for last week’s deadline! I so appreciate it – especially ahead of the public fundraising deadline at the end of this month.

Further, I hope you enjoyed Labor Day weekend with the important people in your life. Labor Day is more than just a long weekend; it’s also a great opportunity to pay tribute to the contributions and achievements of workers – while reflecting on all the labor movement has accomplished for hard working Americans.

**The emergence of labor unions pushed employers to renegotiate hours and pay — _tightening regulations on child labor, establishing the 40-hour work week, and solidifying the right to organize_.** Through organization and perseverance, the labor movement has fundamentally reshaped our idea of workers’ rights.

But after decades of corporations and special interests chipping away at those hard-won rights, labor unions are still fighting to secure fair wages and the right to unionize across industries. I stand with our labor unions – I hope you do too.

**[Join me in showing your support for livable wages, strong unions, and well-paying jobs for workers in all industries.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69246483/425544355/-2049271045?refcode=09052023_md_eomtylaborday_en_1&refcode2=fd0e9869-1e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDBlOTg2OS0xZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IQWDneBQKvoBrCxXCIml98iRls2OVgOxqcB5VHrV_oc=&emci=695b7f92-054c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fd0e9869-1e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)** | | [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69246484/425544357/-2049271045?refcode=09052023_md_eomtylaborday_en_1&refcode2=fd0e9869-1e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDBlOTg2OS0xZTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IQWDneBQKvoBrCxXCIml98iRls2OVgOxqcB5VHrV_oc=&emci=695b7f92-054c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fd0e9869-1e4c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Re: China on your doorstep
body:
| | | Mark my words, the only thing that will check Communist China’s belligerence is a strong and bold United States.

That’s why I’m working overtime as the Chairman of the House Armed Services Subcommittee on Readiness to ensure America’s service members are the best trained and equipped warfighters in the world.

Sadly, Biden’s hand-picked generals have other priorities.

Instead of building warrior spirits dedicated to defending our great nation and creating a culture that makes our enemies deathly afraid of war, they push woke initiatives and divide our ranks.

As a consequence of this politicized agenda, our military faces the worst recruiting crisis since the Vietnam War.

My friend, we must restore a colorblind, merit-based system to our military, abolish political and woke programs, and go all in on a Reagan-style military buildup.

You see, I’m working hard every day in the U.S. House of Representatives to strengthen America’s military and to hold the corrupt Biden regime accountable for their failed strategy of appeasement.

And I need patriotic Americans like you to stand with me.

So, I’m counting on you to join me today by completing our Communist China Threat Assessment Survey along with your most generous contribution to Team Waltz at once!

I eagerly await your response.[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=12a0e45f7c90447fa60bd5b08ddea897&_e=BFbZ6RcJH2qI_ITqSBkvwgW0V76CR73pmE5xfudO2NsQY0pCY6vlYsbUOW16GtaGgDC92VCm5TV0APpqLtXEmgOiA1ixJpR3M3GMAcahUV-38zow_kJoZ1Rm5W8GzTKjoGKHOfaJAby8cyg71NJhmELnTk7hv6-4naht5sjKBQHhgiNsWTz3zaRNY2MtrNIvgAK772zt0gDDlwxs5OQc3ZUs_i4yOZoVnR5Rc0kiBG89PkWhxAEFsLLpAEg2hxT4olPdWW_kQG9W2gm7C5LbPtwEZfSFCOORGgkVqPpH4RiP42xhYXTg48jg0aXb4WhQY8n0ndO6hTdthScx7cWKs4Qxd4WTjeyY601DuOqURCRfgfcn7dHUctE32J8YyRcm)

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXogQ2FtcGFpZ24=?=
subject: Let's get September off to a great start!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez

Team Sánchez here with an important update about our campaign.

August slipped away, and we need your help to get September off to a great start!

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e8b55a1ed1345229a58c179e12281ab&_e=qfYn1hjtGGr1pxUnNEz2Fi8azfXpRhy0QZ7ozcagLwshijROMGxE65q98gjT_Z38waG0nxI0a9CBwhHmz6EtXNM1FJVqOoT7xBGyucsd-az5rVaKqPSOksfKwzszOfxYBB3NUgYhpEsbur75WO3idZbVMNGHvd7-QBODTcN4HZHKKodaQ9UjQk9MTTxfPDhrK9wjG0JsStivm3GE8g-Vwq35bImQNVwbbBSQTP-568LkE-7ciFqLVwOfk0GQwdP4XqCg_G1GaZNiYibFbhbWP9m17lcRkDOcueiyqyvDS8c%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Defend the Constitution

Fellow American - My name is Nancy Mace.

I’m a high school dropout who started out working at Waffle House to pay the bills and put food on the table.

**Through grit and the American dream, I was the first woman to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets.**

In 2020 I took South Carolina’s first district back from the Democrats and I’ve been fighting like hell to keep it in Republican hands.

I’ve proven I’m a tough conservative who isn’t afraid to fight back against the woke liberal agenda.

**I’ve proven to Democrats I’m a threat to their constant lies and shady actions.**

[**Now, they’re attacking me in an attempt to silence me and regain power._But I’ll never stop. Join us at an upcoming fundraiser in support of
Delegate Lesley Lopez
and her campaign for Congress in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District
Montgomery County Breakfast

Time: 7:30-9:00 am
Hosts: Cheryl Gannon, Lynn Olson, Fran Rothstein, Cynthia Rubenstein, Julie Statland, and Beth Tomasello

Can’t attend?
Make a donation to help us meet Lesley’s September 30 end-of-quarter goal! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamlesley_email?refcode2=link_cantattend]
Lesley Lopez is a Democrat running for the open competitive seat in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. When she’s not busy being a mom to her two toddlers, Lesley Lopez serves the people of Maryland as a Delegate from District 39 in the Maryland General Assembly. Since she was first elected in 2018, Lesley has rapidly become an effective legislator and leader, spearheading efforts to alleviate student debt, improve the delivery and efficiency of health care, and protect the limited financial resources of economically vulnerable Marylanders. Lesley has passed legislation to strengthen gun safety laws and guarantee the rights for all women in the state. She is an adjunct professor at George Washington University and a proud union member of SEIU Local 500. Lesley lives in Germantown, MD, with her husband Richard Kelly, and their two sons, Max and Graham.

clean_body: [] Join us at an upcoming fundraiser in support of Delegate Lesley Lopez and her campaign for Congress in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District Montgomery County Breakfast Date: Thursday, September 7 Time: 7:30-9:00 am Hosts: Cheryl Gannon, Lynn Olson, Fran Rothstein, Cynthia Rubenstein, Julie Statland, and Beth Tomasello Location: All Set, 8630 Fenton Street, Plaza 5, Silver Spring, MD 20910 RSVP: [] Bethesda Reception Date: Thursday, September 7 Time: 6:00-7:30 pm Hosts: Elaine Arndt, Ellen Ginsberg, and Melissa Ladd Address Upon RSVP: [] Laurel Reception Date: Sunday, September 17 Time: 3:00-5:00 pm Hosts: Delegate Sandy Bartlett, Delegate Mary Lehman, and Delegate Emily Shetty Location: Olive on Main, 504 Main St, Laurel, MD 20707 RSVP: [] Early October Reception Date: Tuesday, October 3 Time: 6:00-7:30 pm Host: Karen Mulhauser Address Upon RSVP: [] Can’t attend? Make a donation to help us meet Lesley’s September 30 end-of-quarter goal! [] Lesley Lopez is a Democrat running for the open competitive seat in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. When she’s not busy being a mom to her two toddlers, Lesley Lopez serves the people of Maryland as a Delegate from District 39 in the Maryland General Assembly. Since she was first elected in 2018, Lesley has rapidly become an effective legislator and leader, spearheading efforts to alleviate student debt, improve the delivery and efficiency of health care, and protect the limited financial resources of economically vulnerable Marylanders. Lesley has passed legislation to strengthen gun safety laws and guarantee the rights for all women in the state. She is an adjunct professor at George Washington University and a proud union member of SEIU Local 500. Lesley lives in Germantown, MD, with her husband Richard Kelly, and their two sons, Max and Graham. name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=816ca8ff6ce04881814d9d589d177d8c&_e=Vo02ue8FVS9LZQu8Jct93Y9RW0KlpqqxQK-DAQXh-IQyryw5rCLypaYQ0ke9uuz8tIi-yK9QBCw5869qOX7rFHQ1MRAdBH5oQX8PUOZljqYA_Zz-hV62tS6pPcm0wUu9xe8fLkbfD0wFctWftuVteM5b0I61a7WvtH6HBKNBscwW8KOHzWs1VxN-DqnznPE7jT_cseCeiTnDb7O89VEAZHEy_4960bp5saoR8IQhDgXpxfXs-9CaeFn4D7JhqbzmoXKFRS98hYcLtkt8XC6T2DfLlYPrLEleoNdEM9iQ1fD44uj7kVOoU6YqO2pfmu0AqHH34GmfpGrCSriRIn7qaolAB5eU-qjaRvwewLnxmzhPWE_qsJWwdb3AmsQ63jiPE7f2bOg_4dnfMAPwTdePjVFt8wRo6C5yNaD8v03Q_u3M1mtQmHSmVCTqP3WPSJzV0JOcPyuHkTKrDfnCtuaOrs89gGgSkDkyPDnoMb9sZIA%3D)
---

Friend,

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=816ca8ff6ce04881814d9d589d177d8c&_e=Vo02ue8FVS9LZQu8Jct93Y9RW0KlpqqxQK-DAQXh-IQyryw5rCLypaYQ0ke9uuz8tIi-yK9QBCw5869qOX7rFHQ1MRAdBH5oQX8PUOZljqYA_Zz-hV62tS6pPcm0wUu9xe8fLkbfD0wFctWftuVteM5b0I61a7WvtH6HBKNBscwW8KOHzWs1VxN-DqnznPE7jT_cseCeiTnDb7O89VEAZHEy_4960bp5saoR8IQhDgXpxfXs-9CaeFn4D7JhqbzmoXKFRS98hYcLtkt8XC6T2DfLlYPrLEleoNdEM9iQ1fD44uj7kVOoU6YqO2pfmu0ANH07YhxDbf_YH7gxZSaXmbZAnpNO5Rl7Hml6-S7ziZtIhyoY3vO-ESJZI808MByYwPDYYV-0sLGENRMwroaGX8zKa9FOTe6j-yqYCO2VkEqoHKbzY94SRw5znksH-SzNyT6usr-0MD62TnobqCh_iVH9BgqMflrzZDZE68P2hsE%3D)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=816ca8ff6ce04881814d9d589d177d8c&_e=Vo02ue8FVS9LZQu8Jct93Y9RW0KlpqqxQK-DAQXh-IQyryw5rCLypaYQ0ke9uuz8tIi-yK9QBCw5869qOX7rFHQ1MRAdBH5oQX8PUOZljqYA_Zz-hV62tS6pPcm0wUu9xe8fLkbfD0wFctWftuVteM5b0I61a7WvtH6HBKNBscwW8KOHzWs1VxN-DqnznPE7jT_cseCeiTnDb7O89VEAZHEy_4960bp5saoR8IQhDgXpxfXs-9CaeFn4D7JhqbzmoXKFRS98hYcLtkt8XC6T2DfLlYPrLEleoNdEM9iQ1fD44uj7kVOoU6YqO2pfmu0AudGmLxd3PhCp9hr2uXvj6nhXRJllhEkCYceUcO8XCldazMUm-XQruhbwDJZM_H3LJ2lE6r0Kg4BMuo4yhMCrXjyrl_30UjWTckyvcDctyV9XAn5mZBRutDp68E-bg-nSaKtRUicv_7WUrGmdI8M_6zibZSXCeXu9CgCdLSuEaLk%3D "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=816ca8ff6ce04881814d9d589d177d8c&_e=Vo02ue8FVS9LZQu8Jct93Y9RW0KlpqqxQK-DAQXh-IQyryw5rCLypaYQ0ke9uuz8tIi-yK9QBCw5869qOX7rFHQ1MRAdBH5oQX8PUOZljqYA_Zz-hV62tS6pPcm0wUu9xe8fLkbfD0wFctWftuVteM5b0I61a7WvtH6HBKNBscwW8KOHzWs1VxN-DqnznPE7jT_cseCeiTnDb7O89VEAZHEy_4960bp5saoR8IQhDgXpxfXs-9CaeFn4D7JhqbzmoXKFRS98hYcLtkt8XC6T2DfLlYPrLEleoNdEM9iQ1fD44uj7kVOoU6YqO2pfmu0AucnnpcFSeSARHiPiIDlhxnR-FYEcjgA3KQ7-be8BHd-4wcxw3JT953vucq3VbZSwUbKuc3rhLtCjXwY3QKmLLvq3x5ia28CFfqgix2ZesQtno2R5yyWb_7jiBcBhr8_Ln9Znj1IdF9wCYbn5RYVgJEGzFQj3xKvD93NscUKIugQ%3D)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=816ca8ff6ce04881814d9d589d177d8c&_e=Vo02ue8FVS9LZQu8Jct93Y9RW0KlpqqxQK-DAQXh-IQyryw5rCLypaYQ0ke9uuz8tIi-yK9QBCw5869qOX7rFHQ1MRAdBH5oQX8PUOZljqYA_Zz-hV62tS6pPcm0wUu9xe8fLkbfD0wFctWftuVteM5b0I61a7WvtH6HBKNBscwW8KOHzWs1VxN-DqnznPE7jT_cseCeiTnDb7O89VEAZHEy_4960bp5saoR8IQhDgXpxfXs-9CaeFn4D7JhqbzmoXKFRS98hYcLtkt8XC6T2DfLlYPrLEleoNdEM9iQ1fD44uj7kVOoU6YqO2pfmu0A3lvL0PF0P4KVEElyi-pp9SO8Pz1xcAn6u8ECtfOemSSgKffb8VRIe0hnarqyrkdOXvx38dAmPw1RWJ0nhluUCXsk9NMAEK2shnJxCfCuieHEpd6_HY-zEpYuviJZQ7rkRg-_IFE86oJEdKJXvMbe1tW2N_2rV2bjwqDcsKOwsLY%3D "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=816ca8ff6ce04881814d9d589d177d8c&_e=Vo02ue8FVS9LZQu8Jct93Y9RW0KlpqqxQK-DAQXh-IQyryw5rCLypaYQ0ke9uuz8tIi-yK9QBCw5869qOX7rFHQ1MRAdBH5oQX8PUOZljqYA_Zz-hV62tS6pPcm0wUu9xe8fLkbfD0wFctWftuVteM5b0I61a7WvtH6HBKNBscwW8KOHzWs1VxN-DqnznPE7jT_cseCeiTnDb7O89VEAZHEy_4960bp5saoR8IQhDgXpxfXs-9CaeFn4D7JhqbzmoXKFRS98hYcLtkt8XC6T2DfLlYPrLEleoNdEM9iQ1fD44uj7kVOoU6YqO2pfmu0A59OI312_ikTTe9EfduW8gTdMVpTQjGXZSyrwZnogdoVziKW_1sWmPLvIq4E54QMhOXoBOSF3Qxgf0MnNNWUf1cTo_6koZ9FgLj86z5crPzvdyF5A-e_vnpqbw-DIOpXlhUViRbqkmXmG-TpOEmEO5yXfXPXI1ZfJQNgmjxLkTMw%3D)

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I'm Gloria Johnson, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate from Tennessee. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I'm taking on Marsha Blackburn for the future of Tennessee.
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/15574?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=11850%2E9716520%2EkGo0xQ)
**[I’m a teacher, a Tennessee state legislator, and a proud member of the Tennessee Three. Today, I’m announcing my run for U.S. Senate. I need your support in this fight — split any amount right now between my campaign and the DSCC to become a Day One Donor and help expand our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/15574?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=11850%2E9716520%2EkGo0xQ)**
I’m in this race because _Tennesseans deserve better._

That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice.

So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest.

I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. _But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone._

The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. _Then the GOP majority passed a new law to _increase_ access to guns._

**MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us.** They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists.

_But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee._

**I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better.** Period.

Marsha has _failed_ us in her five years in office. She’s voted _against_ everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote.

She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies.

**Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us.** She’s had five years and _nothing_ is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it.

**[From day one, I’ve been fighting for Tennesseans. Now I need you to have my back on Day One of this campaign. Click here to split a donation between the DSCC and me to help expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/15574?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=11850%2E9716520%2EkGo0xQ)**
| | [Become a day one donor](https://go.dscc.org/go/15574?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230905-GloriaJohnson-JohnsonAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=11850%2E9716520%2EkGo0xQ)
---

With you,

Gloria

clean_body: I'm taking on Marsha Blackburn for the future of Tennessee. | | | I’m in this race because Tennesseans deserve better. That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice. So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest. I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone. The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. Then the GOP majority passed a new law to increase access to guns. MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us. They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists. But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee. I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better. Period. Marsha has failed us in her five years in office. She’s voted against everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote. She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies. Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us. She’s had five years and nothing is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it. | | With you, Gloria Gloria Johnson is a teacher and state legislator running for the U.S. Senate in Tennessee to fight for working families to have access to quality education, health care, and good-paying jobs. | | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. Across the country, working families are grappling with higher costs, our fundamental rights are being rolled back, and the climate crisis is worsening.

Meanwhile, Baugh's answer is to fan the flames of the culture war and sell anger and outrage about diversity and inclusion -- even if it means denigrating hundreds of thousands of Americans who perished protecting our country from _actual_ threats. It’s sickening.

My Dad, brother, and nephew have all served in the Navy. I'm offended by these comments, but it goes to show just how extreme today’s Republican Party has become.

[**Our campaign to keep CA-47 blue will be one of the most competitive House races in the country, and what happens here will likely decide which Party holds the majority in 2024. name: Debra
subject: Reaching out about my son Ritchie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69251925/425548416/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230905_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjBjMTQ5ZS0yMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jrfpui0ofYkw3rvvirmElwqpMo0RdtBNYhW9fDQSD2o=) I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress.

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69251926/425548417/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230905_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjBjMTQ5ZS0yMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jrfpui0ofYkw3rvvirmElwqpMo0RdtBNYhW9fDQSD2o=)
---
I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69251927/425548418/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230905_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjBjMTQ5ZS0yMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jrfpui0ofYkw3rvvirmElwqpMo0RdtBNYhW9fDQSD2o=)

| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Peter, please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69251937/425548428/1654258770?refcode=footer-lnk-single&amount=25&recurring=0&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjBjMTQ5ZS0yMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jrfpui0ofYkw3rvvirmElwqpMo0RdtBNYhW9fDQSD2o=). **To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69251938/425548429/1654258770?refcode=footer-lnk-recur&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjBjMTQ5ZS0yMjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jrfpui0ofYkw3rvvirmElwqpMo0RdtBNYhW9fDQSD2o=).**

Frank Siller is the Chairman and CEO of Tunnel to Towers Foundation. Tunnel to Towers Foundation formed in memory of Frank Siller’s younger brother, Stephen Siller, a New York City Fire Department (FDNY) firefighter who gave his life on September 11, 2001.

name: Deya at United We Dream Action
subject: Not the end of the story
body:
| | | Peter, On this day in 2017, the Trump administration ended DACA — setting up years of attacks against the program and our community. I remember the day well. I watched Attorney General Jeff Sessions announce the life-changing protections afforded to so many immigrant youth were being rescinded with just the stroke of a pen. **But that wasn’t the end of the story.** Immediately after, I watched with pride as our community came together and organized. It was an uncertain moment, but we recommitted to the fight, and pushed our demands all the way up to the Supreme Court. We won that battle, but the fight is not over, especially not now that a right-wing federal judge from Texas blocked new DACA applications, and will issue another decision any day now on the future of the program. United We Dream Action is leading the fight for more permanent solutions than DACA for all undocumented people. Today’s anniversary is a reminder that DACA has always been a band-aid solution, vulnerable to attacks from right-wing administrations and judges.**** **That’s why we’re using this anniversary to demand more.** We need a path to citizenship that’s not subject to the whims of whichever party is in power. A program whose protections can be stolen away by the decision of one person is not and has never been good enough. **Peter, will you chip in a donation of $10 or more to fuel the fight for permanent protections for all 11 million undocumented people? At a time when the future of the DACA program is uncertain, your support couldn’t come at a more critical time.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8woUN_Ab65s2rQh9LDLPy4yw2kbh0G90EmZCal6ZYZjn3jPBroG5xKc-cMT21ZMKiaGibeoznavE50xH0nhwXi2qvYyTP6Usc4B88g2-Si0VKvcqUlOoAfiGlxGcC3t2oxBbwPoP1j-hnHaBDa9EQMSrwex8Mg6HNjcpbDLdsOZBg32DZuxDAEnpAIOMMWs8ag1MwUWsShUFbaLRtkZR881Lku5jUVMv4IgJZnZOPH0YjLoOjqghfX3sSVN2k6ccU0O2nzRbM9mZIi7MEzyL6D9QqoQgS026RviQqV2Zr9XX0_toLIQaSSNJXZEmgMv9x4pMFxI9jkyxjhTyey1m0QvkqP_YQiUeouoQxxwUob0SlK6a0mTfz1EbWyJYLNZff/3zc/waLZcMEQRYeHn9ZtlvY5Yw/h0/AKt8VioS5XnJJfzs_oiPki9CzR52GTDztOAqpdtwL0U)

The immigrant youth-led team at United We Dream Action is a critical part of the movement. Our resilience and determination kept the DACA renewal process open before.
And as a new wave of politicized attacks threaten the future of the DACA program, our community will be what wins us permanent protections for all immigrants living under the fear of detention or deportation.
Thanks for being on our side in this work,

clean_body: | | | Peter, On this day in 2017, the Trump administration ended DACA — setting up years of attacks against the program and our community. I remember the day well. I watched Attorney General Jeff Sessions announce the life-changing protections afforded to so many immigrant youth were being rescinded with just the stroke of a pen. But that wasn’t the end of the story. Immediately after, I watched with pride as our community came together and organized. It was an uncertain moment, but we recommitted to the fight, and pushed our demands all the way up to the Supreme Court. We won that battle, but the fight is not over, especially not now that a right-wing federal judge from Texas blocked new DACA applications, and will issue another decision any day now on the future of the program. United We Dream Action is leading the fight for more permanent solutions than DACA for all undocumented people. Today’s anniversary is a reminder that DACA has always been a band-aid solution, vulnerable to attacks from right-wing administrations and judges.** That’s why we’re using this anniversary to demand more. We need a path to citizenship that’s not subject to the whims of whichever party is in power. A program whose protections can be stolen away by the decision of one person is not and has never been good enough. Peter, will you chip in a donation of $10 or more to fuel the fight for permanent protections for all 11 million undocumented people? At a time when the future of the DACA program is uncertain, your support couldn’t come at a more critical time. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The immigrant youth-led team at United We Dream Action is a critical part of the movement. Our resilience and determination kept the DACA renewal process open before. And as a new wave of politicized attacks threaten the future of the DACA program, our community will be what wins us permanent protections for all immigrants living under the fear of detention or deportation. Thanks for being on our side in this work, Deya, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today:** | |

Today, I’m announcing my run for US Senate. I need your support in this fight—contribute any amount right now to become a Day One Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and HER Time.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69253728/425549452/677555985?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230905_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU1ODc3MTMtMjQ0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EUGwGKeSbKyaI_hha6TngzDbuVI2l9iWhfJvefH0TS4=) I’m in this race because _Tennesseans deserve better_. That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice. So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest. I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. _But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone. _ The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. _Then the GOP majority passed a new law to_ _increase_ _access to guns. _ **MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us.** They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists. _But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee._ **I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better.** Period. Marsha has _failed_ us in her five years in office. She’s voted against everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote. She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing _up_ to bullies. **Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us.** She’s had five years and _nothing_ is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it. [_**From day one, I’ve been fighting for Tennesseans. Now I need you to have my back on Day One of this campaign. Make a Founding Donation to help me defeat the GOP and deliver for our state! Click here to split a donation between HER Time and me.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69253737/425549453/677555985?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230905_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU1ODc3MTMtMjQ0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EUGwGKeSbKyaI_hha6TngzDbuVI2l9iWhfJvefH0TS4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Gloria Johnson and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69253741/425549455/677555985?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230905_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU1ODc3MTMtMjQ0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EUGwGKeSbKyaI_hha6TngzDbuVI2l9iWhfJvefH0TS4=)

name: Costello for Senate Newsletter
subject: Costello for U.S. Senate Campaign Update
body:
Dear Friend,

Here is a brief campaign update to conclude an eventful summer. Much of the summer of 2023 involved reaching out to Maine voters at various festivals, parades, and other events, including events and activities in Auburn, Bangor, Bath, Brewer, Brunswick, Cape Elizabeth, Freeport, Gardiner, Hanover, Lisbon, Lewiston, Orono, Portland, Rockland, Round Pond, Skowhegan, South Portland, Waterville, Waldoboro, and Yarmouth (There are a few pictures of some of these activities at the bottom of this email, so feel free to take a look). By attending numerous events across the state, we had the opportunity to meet with many amazing people, hand out flyers, and engage in important conversations about how we can achieve real change and progress for the benefit of all.
Below are PDFs of David's recent column about climate action featured in the Portland Press Herald and our campaign brochure. Check them out and consider sharing them with others. Also, if you follow social media please consider signing onto/following our Instagram and X (formally Twitter) accounts.

Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/costelloforsenate/](https://www.instagram.com/costelloforsenate/)
Twitter: [https://www.twitter.com/costello4senate/ ](https://www.twitter.com/costello4senate/)

And, as always, check out our website ([www.costelloforsenate.com](http://www.costelloforsenate.com)) for more information about the campaign.
Additionally, as we inch closer to the end of 2023, we have a lot of work to do and unlike Maine’s current U.S. Senators, our team is committed to advancing the kind of long overdue legislative and constitutional reforms that will not only aid in strengthening our democracy and government, but also help in better protecting our rights and freedoms, and assist in adequately addressing such pressing problems as climate change, economic inequality, inadequate health care, shoddy infrastructure, underperforming schools, increasing gun violence, and insufficient retirement security.
Your contribution, no matter the amount, can make a difference in ensuring that our message of reform, real change, and progress is heard.
[Donate here >>](https://secure.actblue.com/entity/fundraisers/145994)

Thank you and best always,
Grace Costello

body:
I learned that many of the things that all of you care about are also really important priorities for me and issues that I’ve fought hard for during my time in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69255088/425550283/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230905-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmZlYzQ1MC0yNTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S9qw4zspCSbidHoaL0TEGUvYaGd6wL4lIkJHT6nrrto=)

| Peter,

Earlier this month, I sent out a survey and asked our top supporters what was most important to them this election cycle.

I learned that many of the things that all of you care about are also really important priorities for me and issues that I’ve fought hard for during my time in Congress.

**These are just a few of the things that I’m working to secure for Americans, and specifically folks like you and me in the Lehigh Valley.**

**✅ **Curbing gun violence
**✅ **Fighting voter suppression
**✅ **Combating climate change
**✅ **Safeguarding Social Security
**✅ **Protecting reproductive rights

I know there’s still more work to be done, and that’s why I’m committed to ensuring we tackle these issues head-on in Congress.

**But listen, our first priority is winning re-election next year and taking back the House for Democrats, so I could use your support.[_Can you contribute anything to our campaign and help us flip the House blue next year?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69255089/425550284/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230905-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmZlYzQ1MC0yNTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S9qw4zspCSbidHoaL0TEGUvYaGd6wL4lIkJHT6nrrto=)**

** Is Vivek Ramaswamy worried about Trump?
------------------------------------------------------------

Plus he responds to the recent ‘Modern KKK’ controversy, media backlash, his recent rise in the polls and more.

** Stories I’m Reading...

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Respectfully asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please, help us start the month of September off strong
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=1&akid=6489%2E3935704%2EcOfI8r)
---
Hi there, friends. I hope you were able to have a restful Labor Day Weekend.
I’ll be direct with you: [**I’m reaching out to respectfully ask you to make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us start September off strong.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=2&akid=6489%2E3935704%2EcOfI8r)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=3&akid=6489%2E3935704%2EcOfI8r)**
Please give me a moment to explain why your contribution today is so important.
My team and I have been upfront that our fundraising slowed down over the summer. Now, as we move into the fall season, it’s more important than ever before that we pick up the pace on our fundraising. In addition, we’ll be facing a quarterly deadline at the end of this month, so starting September on the right foot is absolutely critical.
I know we ask a lot of you. There’s no doubt about it. But, we wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important. The majority of donations to GIFFORDS PAC come from people like you chipping in to emails like these. So when you receive an email from me or the team asking for a $3 contribution, just know that it’s going directly towards our work to save lives.
[**So please, will you chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your support today is crucial so that we can hit our fundraising goals and keep funding our lifesaving work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=4&akid=6489%2E3935704%2EcOfI8r)
