name: Shawn Wilson
subject: Immense gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I know we can overcome anything if we work together.

Hey Peter, I just wanted to quickly reach out and say thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goal before last night’s filing deadline. Thanks to incredible supporters like you, we were able to make up for the August shortfall and position ourselves to kick the campaign into high gear this month. But from here on out, I’ll need more support than ever before. **The primary is just around the corner, and we’re entering an all-hands-on-deck phase of the campaign.** Adding more fuel to the fire is the fact that national Republicans are now pouring massive amounts of outside money into our race to influence Louisiana voters. They just launched a six-figure ad buy in media markets across the state. **We need to get to work countering their narrative, and _fast._ That’s why I have to ask for your support today, Peter.** **_[Whether we like it or not, Louisiana voters _will_ see the GOP’s ad attacking me, and it could affect the outcome of the primary. clean_body: I know we can overcome anything if we work together. Hey Peter, I just wanted to quickly reach out and say thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goal before last night’s filing deadline. Thanks to incredible supporters like you, we were able to make up for the August shortfall and position ourselves to kick the campaign into high gear this month. But from here on out, I’ll need more support than ever before. The primary is just around the corner, and we’re entering an all-hands-on-deck phase of the campaign. Adding more fuel to the fire is the fact that national Republicans are now pouring massive amounts of outside money into our race to influence Louisiana voters. They just launched a six-figure ad buy in media markets across the state. We need to get to work countering their narrative, and fast. That’s why I have to ask for your support today, Peter. = = = I know we can beat them — this community of supporters has helped us overcome big challenges before, and this one is no different. Thank you, Shawn Wilson = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. It’s a make or break moment. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69256508/425555266/1420976906?refcode=ea.5c449574-294c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5c449574-294c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzQ0OTU3NC0yOTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBFddFiBphBa57Tffi05DDIfMNZ8iD1ipQsapKFLZnA=&emci=ad37f0b8-684b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5c449574-294c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)

**_TIME_ : Why New York Is the Center of the 2024 Fight for House Control** Folks, the fight for House majority could hinge on New York.
* **Democrats must flip FIVE seats to regain control of the House. And that path to victory could come down to our race here in NY-04.**
* **Meanwhile, Cook Political Report has rated our seat a toss-up. It’s THAT CLOSE.**
* **But Republicans are prepared to spend every dollar they have in their war chest to keep this seat red and retain power in Washington.**

If Democrats don’t start building up their resources NOW, we’re going to lose the chance to save our country from the extreme Republican agenda.

[**Here’s where you come in: Kevin is up against his first quarterly deadline of the campaign in 25 days. It's crucial that he doesn't fall short of his online goal. Can we count on you to step up with a $25 donation today to help Kevin WIN and flip the House blue? >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69256509/425555267/1778191876?amount=25&refcode=ea.5c449574-294c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.5c449574-294c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzQ0OTU3NC0yOTRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBFddFiBphBa57Tffi05DDIfMNZ8iD1ipQsapKFLZnA=)

We won’t mince words: another two years of a Republican House majority would spell chaos.

Reproductive rights? Diminished. Our democracy and freedom to vote? Gone. Gun safety? Not happening. And that’s just the tip of the iceberg, team.

The 2024 election is a make-or-break moment for us. That's why we're turning to everyday grassroots supporters like you to aid our fight.

[**Kevin isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so a $25 donation from folks like you makes a big difference. body:
Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**
Fellow American,

There are bank records showing that the Biden family and associates took MILLIONS of dollars from corrupt officials in foreign governments (Russia, Ukraine, and Kazakhstan) during Joe Biden’s time as the United States’ vice president.

**_These allegations are serious, and they deserve to be investigated._** However, so long as Joe Biden and his allies run the Justice Department, there aren’t going to be any investigations into the president’s business dealings.

My colleagues in the House, James Comer, and Jim Jordan, have uncovered mounds upon mounds of records, bank statements, and emails that provide more than enough evidence of wrongdoing to open such proceedings.

I want to know where YOU stand, Fellow American. name: Tamie
subject: Hot Labor Fall
body:
Let's make this a "Hot Labor Fall" and come together to defend the rights and dignity of every American worker.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69257217/425558009/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NzA2OWMtMmM0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FNUCCctMZIKrlVhGh3hgVqhEmtjH7DicHPODGXV78EM=)
---
Friend, I hope this email finds you well and rested after the long weekend. I spent my Labor Day weekend busy connecting with voters. I was in the West Liberty Labor Day Parade in Logan County and the Richland County Labor Day Parade, which was organized by Norm Shoemaker, the President of the Mid-Ohio Area Central Labor Council and one of the leaders of our United Steelworkers Local 3057. I also visited several fairs. I'll be honest with you: at times, I’m exhausted. But I won’t stop, and I haven’t stopped in two and a half years. I give my all to this campaign 7 days a week because saving our country from extremists and unseating Jim Jordan is THAT important to me, and my constituents. The girls and I dressed up as Rosie the Riveter to represent the continued need for women’s equality in the workplace.[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69257218/425558010/1649708063?refcode=nov-abortion-rightsNGP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NzA2OWMtMmM0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FNUCCctMZIKrlVhGh3hgVqhEmtjH7DicHPODGXV78EM=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69257219/425558011/1649708063?refcode=labordayNGP_pic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NzA2OWMtMmM0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FNUCCctMZIKrlVhGh3hgVqhEmtjH7DicHPODGXV78EM=)
---
As we return from the weekend, I’d like to reflect on all that organized labor has achieved for our great nation and the _critical work_ that lies ahead of us. As I stood among the hardworking men and women of my district at their parades and fairs, I was reminded of the immense dedication and sacrifice that built our nation and Ohio. From the steel mills of Youngstown to the auto plants of Toledo, and the tank plant in Lima, Ohioans have always known the value of a fair day's pay for a fair day's work. It was an honor to march alongside them, feeling their passion and commitment to the cause. This summer has truly been _"Hot Labor Summer"_ , a term coined by labor activists to describe the massive uprising of labor this summer which plays on popular internet memes. We've witnessed inspiring victories and seen the power of collective action as workers from coast to coast stood up for their rights. From the Screen Actors Guild historic strike, the teacher’s Union, the UPS’s threatened strike and contract victory, to successful union organizing efforts at Starbucks, the labor movement is roaring back to life, reminding us of the essential role unions play in protecting workers' rights. However, as we celebrate these victories, we must also remain vigilant. Congressman Jim Jordan, our opponent, continues to advocate for "Right to Work" laws that have already done tremendous damage to America and Ohio’s unions. These laws undermine the collective bargaining power of workers and have a direct negative impact on their wages, benefits, and working conditions. _We cannot let these destructive policies go unchallenged._ Let's make this a _**"Hot Labor Fall"**_ and come together to defend the rights and dignity of every American worker. Together, we can ensure that the American Dream remains within reach for every person and family, no matter where they come from or what they do for a living. **[But I can't do it alone. To continue this fight, I need your support. Every dollar you contribute helps us reach more voters, organize grassroots efforts, and take the message of workers' rights to every corner of our district. Can I count on you to chip in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69257220/425558012/1649708063?refcode=labordayNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NzA2OWMtMmM0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FNUCCctMZIKrlVhGh3hgVqhEmtjH7DicHPODGXV78EM=)**

clean_body: Let's make this a "Hot Labor Fall" and come together to defend the rights and dignity of every American worker.| | | = Friend, I hope this email finds you well and rested after the long weekend. I spent my Labor Day weekend busy connecting with voters. I was in the West Liberty Labor Day Parade in Logan County and the Richland County Labor Day Parade, which was organized by Norm Shoemaker, the President of the Mid-Ohio Area Central Labor Council and one of the leaders of our United Steelworkers Local 3057. I also visited several fairs. I'll be honest with you: at times, I’m exhausted. But I won’t stop, and I haven’t stopped in two and a half years. I give my all to this campaign 7 days a week because saving our country from extremists and unseating Jim Jordan is THAT important to me, and my constituents. The girls and I dressed up as Rosie the Riveter to represent the continued need for women’s equality in the workplace.= = As we return from the weekend, I’d like to reflect on all that organized labor has achieved for our great nation and the critical work that lies ahead of us. As I stood among the hardworking men and women of my district at their parades and fairs, I was reminded of the immense dedication and sacrifice that built our nation and Ohio. From the steel mills of Youngstown to the auto plants of Toledo, and the tank plant in Lima, Ohioans have always known the value of a fair day's pay for a fair day's work. It was an honor to march alongside them, feeling their passion and commitment to the cause. This summer has truly been "Hot Labor Summer" , a term coined by labor activists to describe the massive uprising of labor this summer which plays on popular internet memes. We've witnessed inspiring victories and seen the power of collective action as workers from coast to coast stood up for their rights. From the Screen Actors Guild historic strike, the teacher’s Union, the UPS’s threatened strike and contract victory, to successful union organizing efforts at Starbucks, the labor movement is roaring back to life, reminding us of the essential role unions play in protecting workers' rights. However, as we celebrate these victories, we must also remain vigilant. Congressman Jim Jordan, our opponent, continues to advocate for "Right to Work" laws that have already done tremendous damage to America and Ohio’s unions. These laws undermine the collective bargaining power of workers and have a direct negative impact on their wages, benefits, and working conditions. We cannot let these destructive policies go unchallenged. Let's make this a "Hot Labor Fall" and come together to defend the rights and dignity of every American worker. Together, we can ensure that the American Dream remains within reach for every person and family, no matter where they come from or what they do for a living. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = = | = = | | Donate= or**= I am committed to fighting for the rights of American workers and ensuring that our nation returns to its past of being a stronghold for organized labor. Together, we can stand up to those who seek to break the back of the labor movement and protect the rights of every worker in America. Thank you for your dedication to this cause and for your continued support. Together, we will create a better, fairer, and more just America for all workers. In Solidarity, Tamie Wilson | | | = | Tamie Wilson** Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | = To contribute via check, please address to: 273 SARATOGA ST. Fellow American,

Do you feel safe?

Because if you flip through any TV station or listen to the Dems, they will tell you **the border is secure – _but that doesn’t quite line up with the true facts._** Biden’s border crisis is historic and 7.2 million illegal immigrants have crossed the border since he took office.

**Even President Obama declared a border crisis - at just 15% of the current numbers being reported!** Biden has completely ignored the border and every day, you are paying the costs. We need to keep our communities safe from crime and the drugs that are crossing the border.

[**I know you are busy, but could you take a few moments to share your thoughts on the humanitarian crisis at the border today?**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=83e7ac455a2c4d3fb171ab2073e139cf&_e=mB-uQhQQC6fLyfRvrFveJT7szOawsvpVX89OCin2sUPfyNNOra46lftQyR3WGsaLfrmMfcUiyl6zBLR8Tl_gnNSw7KEDRbt9cU99eR-GgFoifwinLm48yRCw2RZQOeX6UcG-Wh6TR4BitRBWqEPnQ9V371UZ7p0geSGc6EhBCz_WQ9wFpJdnxYGg72mvJyKmNcvDRYxSBJ6kyckHqrXLqF_Kf4aKxbN56eW4K75-Ug7VEnIVrMih0HybV5cZCV2zSi6FoD5HDNvJRHqeXR7mBp1LYZsbez60Y1y6GLs9WDWYUgJfgRNDjQ_dB8Q1WAIVsr7-vGMwSN-pDt7aGMdFotWQpXfTsZxZPWeYLOcC0Dv8yrKUz5BjPhAIB82c5luiGNTxXXI4IFkvxkbDBWpDAyopJ3Lls7ldvfBQIjI9d65KA0M2taQ0aDzAsGqgmEdopZxBgSqFg2bcfaOAP7fWBfHEaj91P761YHyVtN9byaMDu03wRK4_OuUMImkxgoQ3lxMDs3NClfWvBnsNYjnD6fA9h-cKLn0Q4hdoogvcRyM%3D)

[**I’m not afraid to take action, Fellow American, and it is clear we need it now more than ever.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=83e7ac455a2c4d3fb171ab2073e139cf&_e=mB-uQhQQC6fLyfRvrFveJT7szOawsvpVX89OCin2sUPfyNNOra46lftQyR3WGsaLfrmMfcUiyl6zBLR8Tl_gnNSw7KEDRbt9cU99eR-GgFoifwinLm48yRCw2RZQOeX6UcG-Wh6TR4BitRBWqEPnQ9V371UZ7p0geSGc6EhBCz_WQ9wFpJdnxYGg72mvJyKmNcvDRYxSBJ6kyckHqrXLqF_Kf4aKxbN56eW4K75-Ug7VEnIVrMih0HybV5cZCV2zSi6FoD5HDNvJRHqeXR7mBp1LYZsbez60Y1y6GLs9WDWYUgJfgRNDjQ_dB8Q1WAIVsr7-vGMwSN-pDt7aGMdFotWQpXfTsZxZPWeYLOcC0Dv8yrKUz5BjPhAIB82c5luiGNTxXXI4IFkvxkbDBWpDA04beFyNg3QPlZK12EHmKtjTgC00oGOfHA8fSPWqBHRNw6g_JVLePjs7h6HtxcaeGEmkwKsPkSMmzYA6OHB1IhKyKhXu5ClmH76l0cDN_JZtg2TpBYW3KKl6PUpDATgcWATm9Y2jSMCAhcI626cY9m4%3D) I wrote the law that expanded the required use of E-Verify, protecting American jobs and wages. And I've voted to get tough on so-called Sanctuary Cities.

In Congress, I will push for even more legislation that sees our border wall realized and make sure that staffing along the border is never an issue – you have my word on that.

[**To better serve you though, I need to hear from you. Could you share your thoughts on the border crisis?**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=83e7ac455a2c4d3fb171ab2073e139cf&_e=mB-uQhQQC6fLyfRvrFveJT7szOawsvpVX89OCin2sUPfyNNOra46lftQyR3WGsaLfrmMfcUiyl6zBLR8Tl_gnNSw7KEDRbt9cU99eR-GgFoifwinLm48yRCw2RZQOeX6UcG-Wh6TR4BitRBWqEPnQ9V371UZ7p0geSGc6EhBCz_WQ9wFpJdnxYGg72mvJyKmNcvDRYxSBJ6kyckHqrXLqF_Kf4aKxbN56eW4K75-Ug7VEnIVrMih0HybV5cZCV2zSi6FoD5HDNvJRHqeXR7mBp1LYZsbez60Y1y6GLs9WDWYUgJfgRNDjQ_dB8Q1WAIVsr7-vGMwSN-pDt7aGMdFotWQpXfTsZxZPWeYLOcC0Dv8yrKUz5BjPhAIB82c5luiGNTxXXI4IFkvxkbDBWpDAz20ZAdQcnBxJbANaiFZzHcngca16_2mCmQ0tl12RsVXyzHjLYD53t18tsi73bbgxdXTZmU0dVRikQyGrB3TNoacePHZK1ufwqjKFZaE1wq5knKlG8EsdtfLTQhJl4KWt9Js91Yu3CbZL5f5BRuwWVQ%3D)

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

clean_body: Biden’s border crisis is historic and 7.2 million illegal immigrants have crossed the border since he took office. | | | Fellow American, Do you feel safe? Because if you flip through any TV station or listen to the Dems, they will tell you the border is secure – but that doesn’t quite line up with the true facts. Biden’s border crisis is historic and 7.2 million illegal immigrants have crossed the border since he took office. Even President Obama declared a border crisis - at just 15% of the current numbers being reported! Biden has completely ignored the border and every day, you are paying the costs. We need to keep our communities safe from crime and the drugs that are crossing the border. I wrote the law that expanded the required use of E-Verify, protecting American jobs and wages. And I've voted to get tough on so-called Sanctuary Cities. In Congress, I will push for even more legislation that sees our border wall realized and make sure that staffing along the border is never an issue – you have my word on that. body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
No one should ever have to choose between paying for life-saving medication or putting food on the table. But that's been the reality for too many Americans for too long.
Kirsten has been clear that her top priority in Congress would be lowering the cost of health care, including prescription drugs.
With the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act, Democrats in Congress gave Medicare the ability to negotiate drug costs medications directly with pharmaceutical companies.
Now, the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services have announced the first ten drugs selected for price negotiations. These are drugs that help treat diabetes, cancer, Crohn's, and more — and have cost Medicare billions of dollars.
This is a huge win — and it wouldn't have been possible without Democrats in Congress.
Kirsten's opponent, on the other hand, is part of an extreme far-right caucus whose budget would actively repeal the ability of Medicare to negotiate for lower prices.
We need Kirsten in Congress fighting for our working families. The path to taking back control of the House goes directly through this district — which is why we need your help. Can we count on you to donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090523_DrugCosts_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090523_DrugCosts_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090523_DrugCosts_act]
Thank you so much!
— Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090523_DrugCosts_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090523_DrugCosts_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090523_DrugCosts_act]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Cole?=
subject: Moving Onward: Will you join?
body:
https://frontlinepolicy.com/
https://frontlinepolicy.com/

You are humbly invited to join us for our 3rd annual Frontline Gala at the Gas South Convention Center on October 6th. This year’s event is themed “ONWARD” as we work to advance the Truth, achieve victory, and affect our culture for the glory of God.

The Main Event will begin at 6:15pm and last until about 8:45pm, when we will provide a dessert reception for all who want to stick around, enjoy some sweets, and fellowship with some of our state’s most impactful conservative leaders.

This dinner event is so important.
https://frontlinepolicy.com/

Frontline is already the most impactful pro-life, pro-family force in the state. With the combined efforts of our two organizations, we pass legislation that save lives and protects your faith, your family, your business, your church, we win elections, and we are transforming the culture for His glory.

To do what we do, it takes significant resources, and we are committed to expanding our efforts. We have an aggressive growth plan, and this event is the kickoff to building an even stronger Frontline. This is The Can’t-Miss Event of the Year featuring Georgia’s strongest conservative organization, a big vision for expansion, remarks from Riley Gaines, a performance from Christian music star John Waller, and more!
CLICK HERE to join us by purchasing your ticket today! (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTE1fGh0dHBzOi8vd2ViLmNoYXJpdHllbmdpbmUubmV0L2dhbGFhdHRlbmRlZXwwfDB8MHwxMTA3fDB8MHx8NjMyODEwfDE1)

...OR, if you would like to be a table sponsor – where you could potentially host others or even have access to our 5pm VIP reception – please email me at cole@frontlinepolicy.com or give me a call at 330-510-0553 for more information.

As we celebrate our Gala, we could not be more excited to have a speaker that I believe is one of those rare voices that uniquely speaks to a generational moment:
https://frontlinepolicy.com/

** Riley Gaines - Champion to Advocate
------------------------------------------------------------

An All-American swimmer at the University of Kentucky, Riley Gaines achieved her dream. She made it to the NCAA Championships to swim against the best female swimmers in the country. Unfortunately, one of her opponents was a man – a former male swimmer for the University of Pennsylvania who was now “identifying” as Lia Thomas and swimming for the women's team. Riley was forced to change in the same room as Lia and compete against the 6’4” man. Despite his physical advantages, Lia did not beat Riley outright – they tied – but he was given the trophy over her.

This was wrong, and it happened right here in Atlanta where the Championships took place.

Instead of allowing herself to be victimized by an agenda that erases women, Riley has spoken out. She has been before Congress, spoken at rallies, been all over the media, and ignited a movement. She has spoken truth with clarity, conviction, and reason, and she has shared her personal experience of how the Left’s agenda has harmed her – someone who worked tirelessly to achieve the pinnacle of her sport – in an irreparable way.

PURCHASE TICKETS TODAY TO COME HEAR RILEY GAINES, ARGUABLY ONE OF THE MOST IMPORTANT VOICES IN OUR NATION RIGHT NOW!
BUY TICKETS (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTE2fGh0dHBzOi8vd2ViLmNoYXJpdHllbmdpbmUubmV0L2dhbGFhdHRlbmRlZXwwfDB8MHwxMTA3fDB8MHx8NjMyODEwfDE1)

Riley Gaines is far more than just the rightful Women’s NCAA Swimming Champion. She has been the tip of the spear in fighting back against the absolute woke craziness that fuels the idea that men can participate in women’s sports.

Riley was wronged when the trophy was giving to the man masquerading as a female. The Left is used to victims of their agenda staying silent, but Riley has completely rocked their world.
https://frontlinepolicy.com/

John Waller is a Georgia native who has been impacting the Christian music industry for nearly 30 years.

His major label solo debut, The Blessing (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTE3fGh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL3dhdGNoP3Y9dFRaZGpYdHNPdVl8MHwwfDB8MTEwN3wwfDB8fDYzMjgxMHwx0) (2007), earned a Top 10 “Faces to Watch” nod by Billboard while his follow-up, While I’m Waiting (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTE4fGh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL3dhdGNoP3Y9aTZYNzFzWGFnVVl8MHwwfDB8MTEwN3wwfDB8fDYzMjgxMHwx0) (2009), included the poignant title track featured in the Fireproof film, the No. 1 independent film in 2008. The music video to the title track of his As for Me and My House (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTE5fGh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL3dhdGNoP3Y9ampSaU5MMUhLbnN8MHwwfDB8MTEwN3wwfDB8fDYzMjgxMHwx0)
(2011) has received over 5 million views on YouTube alone while the title track of Crazy Faith (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTIwfGh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL3dhdGNoP3Y9ci1iaHpmV1lNQUV8MHwwfDB8MTEwN3wwfDB8fDYzMjgxMHwx0) (2015) was featured in the US News, World Report-lauded film, War Room.

His most recent full album and Radiate Music debut, Explosions of Light (2019), sparked the Christian radio Top 40 favorite, “Awakening (aka The Coffee Song).” more recently, he released his first ever duet with his 16-year-old daughter, Sophee, entitled “what my father does” on Father’s Day. Though the song begins with an ethereal, piano-driven ambiance, it builds into a triumphant, orchestral anthem featuring inspiring harmonies from both Sophee and John, proclaiming “He shows me unfailing, faithful love; it’s what my Father does.”

John’s music is an inspiration, and he is the father of 10 children – living out the pro-family calling of this ministry. Moreover, his music’s positioning at the heart of some of the best-done, most-inspirational Christian films of this generation is meaningful for so many who have seen their marriages, prayer lives, and walks with God positively affected by his talent.

As we prayed about this year’s Gala, we believed that worship was an essential element to include, and we are so excited that John is joining us for this!

JOIN US TO HEAR JOHN WALLER’S INCREDIBLE, INSPIRING MUSIC. (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTIxfGh0dHBzOi8vd2ViLmNoYXJpdHllbmdpbmUubmV0L2dhbGFhdHRlbmRlZXwwfDB8MHwxMTA3fDB8MHx8NjMyODEwfDE1)

PURCHASE YOUR TICKETS TODAY! (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTIxfGh0dHBzOi8vd2ViLmNoYXJpdHllbmdpbmUubmV0L2dhbGFhdHRlbmRlZXwwfDB8MHwxMTA3fDB8MHx8NjMyODEwfDE1)

** Would you Consider Being a Sponsor?
------------------------------------------------------------
https://frontlinepolicy.com/

For us, our sponsors are far more important than just “event funders” or names we can add to the program. Our sponsors are partners – coming alongside this ministry as ambassadors and supporters to fuel Kingdom work!

Would you consider being a sponsor?

We have levels beginning at $1,250 and they go up to $25,000. Most sponsorships include the opportunity to fill your table with like-minded believers who would have interest in our work, varying numbers of VIP tickets, and other benefits.

This is one of the most important ways you can help our ministry!
To sponsor a table with a generous gift to Frontline Policy Action, CLICK HERE. (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTIyfGh0dHBzOi8vd2ViLmNoYXJpdHllbmdpbmUubmV0L3Nwb25zb3JhY3Rpb258MHwwfDB8MTEwN3wwfDB8fDYzMjgxMHwx0)
To sponsor a table with a generous gift to Frontline Policy Council, CLICK HERE. (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTIzfGh0dHBzOi8vd2ViLmNoYXJpdHllbmdpbmUubmV0L3Nwb25zb3Jjb3VuY2lsfDB8MHwwfDExMDd8MHwwfHw2MzI4MTB8MQ2)

Or, if you have questions, please email me at

cole@frontlinepolicy.com (mailto:cole@frontlinepolicy.com?subject=null&body=null) or give me a call at 330-510-0553 (tel:3305100553) .
https://frontlinepolicy.com/

** About the Venue and What to Expect
------------------------------------------------------------
https://frontlinepolicy.com/

This event is being held at Gas South Convention Center in Duluth, GA, and it is a truly spectacular venue. Recently remodeled, you will be very impressed with the facility.

We also will feed you a first-class meal, and a dessert reception will follow the event. You will leave having enjoyed the physical feeding.

But, our goal is also to feed you spiritually.

I firmly believe we are not doing our job if you do not leave this event encouraged, inspired, and fit to glorify God in the public square. And, I am confident that we will not fail in this endeavor.

This event is an opportunity for us to showcase what God is doing in this organization. We want it to be abundantly clear that Frontline has staying power, a big vision, and a firm commitment to its mission. We also want to be clear that Jesus Christ – and His commands to love God and love our neighbor – are at the heart of everything we do.

At our Gala, you will be surrounded by believers and conservatives just like you. Those in attendance will include successful business and community leaders, champions in our movement, pastors and pro-life advocates, and also key government officials.

We will take the opportunity to pray over these government officials at this event, and I believe we will have more leaders of impact on hand than any other event you’ll attend this year.

When we say our event is “Can’t Miss,” we do not say so because we think we are that great. We do say so, with confidence, however, because we believe God is doing something great. And, I believe He will move you during this event in a way that you will not want to miss.

JOIN US FOR THIS “CAN’T MISS” EVENT BY PURCHASING YOUR TICKETS TODAY! (http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_guid=NjM5NTMzfDY1NTA0MDE5fDF8bGVhbm5AZnJvbnRsaW5lcG9saWN5LmNvbXw2MjQ0MTI0fGh0dHBzOi8vZnBjZ2VvcmdpYS5jb20vZXZlbnQvZnJvbnRsaW5lLWdhbGEvfDB8MHwwfDExMDd8MHwwfHw2MzI4MTB8MQ2)
http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_

Map of Metro Atlanta

The Gas South Convention Center is located at6400 Sugarloaf Parkway, Duluth, Georgia 30097

Parking at Gas South

Parking for the Gas South Convention Center is available in Parking Deck 1. The Convention Center entrance is on level 3.

ValetParking is available for $35.
http://smartmailerclick.bisglobal.net/act_linkClick.aspx?sm_

Directions from South on I-85

Traveling South on I-85 take Exit 109 onto Sugarloaf Parkway, turn left onto Satellite Blvd NW to the Convention Center.

Directions from North on I-85

Traveling North on I-85 take Exit 108 onto Sugarloaf Parkway, turn left onto Satellite Blvd NW to the Convention Center.

** Would Would You Forward This Email to Friends and Family –
------------------------------------------------------------

Encouraging Them to Attend?

I appreciate your support, your prayers, and, yes, your willingness to read this email. 😊

I also hope that you personally will join us at the Gala as a sponsor or attendee.

What I also want to humbly ask is this: will you be an ambassador for our organization by forwarding this email and encouraging others to come to this event? Your help in this endeavor will expand our ministry in a big way, and it’s a great opportunity for you to involve other like-minded believers God has put in your path with the work He is doing in this ministry.

God Bless,

Cole Muzio

President, Frontline Policy

clean_body: You are humbly invited to join us for our 3rd annual Frontline Gala at the Gas South Convention Center on October 6th. This year’s event is themed “ONWARD” as we work to advance the Truth, achieve victory, and affect our culture for the glory of God. The Main Event will begin at 6:15pm and last until about 8:45pm, when we will provide a dessert reception for all who want to stick around, enjoy some sweets, and fellowship with some of our state’s most impactful conservative leaders. This dinner event is so important. Frontline is already the most impactful pro-life, pro-family force in the state. With the combined efforts of our two organizations, we pass legislation that save lives and protects your faith, your family, your business, your church, we win elections, and we are transforming the culture for His glory. To do what we do, it takes significant resources, and we are committed to expanding our efforts. We have an aggressive growth plan, and this event is the kickoff to building an even stronger Frontline. This is The Can’t-Miss Event of the Year featuring Georgia’s strongest conservative organization, a big vision for expansion, remarks from Riley Gaines, a performance from Christian music star John Waller, and more! CLICK HERE to join us by purchasing your ticket today! () ...OR, if you would like to be a table sponsor – where you could potentially host others or even have access to our 5pm VIP reception – please email me at cole@frontlinepolicy.com or give me a call at 330-510-0553 for more information. As we celebrate our Gala, we could not be more excited to have a speaker that I believe is one of those rare voices that uniquely speaks to a generational moment: Riley Gaines - Champion to Advocate An All-American swimmer at the University of Kentucky, Riley Gaines achieved her dream. She made it to the NCAA Championships to swim against the best female swimmers in the country. Unfortunately, one of her opponents was a man – a former male swimmer for the University of Pennsylvania who was now “identifying” as Lia Thomas and swimming for the women's team. Riley was forced to change in the same room as Lia and compete against the 6’4” man. Despite his physical advantages, Lia did not beat Riley outright – they tied – but he was given the trophy over her. This was wrong, and it happened right here in Atlanta where the Championships took place. Instead of allowing herself to be victimized by an agenda that erases women, Riley has spoken out. She has been before Congress, spoken at rallies, been all over the media, and ignited a movement. She has spoken truth with clarity, conviction, and reason, and she has shared her personal experience of how the Left’s agenda has harmed her – someone who worked tirelessly to achieve the pinnacle of her sport – in an irreparable way. PURCHASE TICKETS TODAY TO COME HEAR RILEY GAINES, ARGUABLY ONE OF THE MOST IMPORTANT VOICES IN OUR NATION RIGHT NOW! BUY TICKETS () Riley Gaines is far more than just the rightful Women’s NCAA Swimming Champion. She has been the tip of the spear in fighting back against the absolute woke craziness that fuels the idea that men can participate in women’s sports. Riley was wronged when the trophy was giving to the man masquerading as a female. The Left is used to victims of their agenda staying silent, but Riley has completely rocked their world. John Waller is a Georgia native who has been impacting the Christian music industry for nearly 30 years. His major label solo debut, The Blessing () (2007), earned a Top 10 “Faces to Watch” nod by Billboard while his follow-up, While I’m Waiting () (2009), included the poignant title track featured in the Fireproof film, the No. 1 independent film in 2008. The music video to the title track of his As for Me and My House () (2011) has received over 5 million views on YouTube alone while the title track of Crazy Faith () (2015) was featured in the US News, World Report-lauded film, War Room. His most recent full album and Radiate Music debut, Explosions of Light (2019), sparked the Christian radio Top 40 favorite, “Awakening (aka The Coffee Song).” more recently, he released his first ever duet with his 16-year-old daughter, Sophee, entitled “what my father does” on Father’s Day. Though the song begins with an ethereal, piano-driven ambiance, it builds into a triumphant, orchestral anthem featuring inspiring harmonies from both Sophee and John, proclaiming “He shows me unfailing, faithful love; it’s what my Father does.” John’s music is an inspiration, and he is the father of 10 children – living out the pro-family calling of this ministry. Moreover, his music’s positioning at the heart of some of the best-done, most-inspirational Christian films of this generation is meaningful for so many who have seen their marriages, prayer lives, and walks with God positively affected by his talent. As we prayed about this year’s Gala, we believed that worship was an essential element to include, and we are so excited that John is joining us for this! JOIN US TO HEAR JOHN WALLER’S INCREDIBLE, INSPIRING MUSIC. () PURCHASE YOUR TICKETS TODAY! () Would you Consider Being a Sponsor? For us, our sponsors are far more important than just “event funders” or names we can add to the program. Our sponsors are partners – coming alongside this ministry as ambassadors and supporters to fuel Kingdom work! Would you consider being a sponsor? We have levels beginning at $1,250 and they go up to $25,000. Most sponsorships include the opportunity to fill your table with like-minded believers who would have interest in our work, varying numbers of VIP tickets, and other benefits. This is one of the most important ways you can help our ministry! To sponsor a table with a generous gift to Frontline Policy Action, CLICK HERE. () To sponsor a table with a generous gift to Frontline Policy Council, CLICK HERE. () Or, if you have questions, please email me at cole@frontlinepolicy.com (mailto:cole@frontlinepolicy.com?subject=null&body=null) or give me a call at 330-510-0553 (tel:3305100553) . About the Venue and What to Expect This event is being held at Gas South Convention Center in Duluth, GA, and it is a truly spectacular venue. Recently remodeled, you will be very impressed with the facility. We also will feed you a first-class meal, and a dessert reception will follow the event. You will leave having enjoyed the physical feeding. But, our goal is also to feed you spiritually. I firmly believe we are not doing our job if you do not leave this event encouraged, inspired, and fit to glorify God in the public square. And, I am confident that we will not fail in this endeavor. This event is an opportunity for us to showcase what God is doing in this organization. We want it to be abundantly clear that Frontline has staying power, a big vision, and a firm commitment to its mission. We also want to be clear that Jesus Christ – and His commands to love God and love our neighbor – are at the heart of everything we do. At our Gala, you will be surrounded by believers and conservatives just like you. Those in attendance will include successful business and community leaders, champions in our movement, pastors and pro-life advocates, and also key government officials. We will take the opportunity to pray over these government officials at this event, and I believe we will have more leaders of impact on hand than any other event you’ll attend this year. When we say our event is “Can’t Miss,” we do not say so because we think we are that great. We do say so, with confidence, however, because we believe God is doing something great. And, I believe He will move you during this event in a way that you will not want to miss. JOIN US FOR THIS “CAN’T MISS” EVENT BY PURCHASING YOUR TICKETS TODAY! body:
Bumping this to the top of your inbox. I hope you'll enter to win a chance to meet me in Charleston!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_t=ezRrDDqdAoLPwDr3uU6pb_yRAm_BapqdnZgMg_6Cv191wMFjtdJ9oN8KFyDuK7hOCbk4xfh6oSVkAIvk-RuThmqOlmewVkWVYkFZvFKUYe8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_t=ezRrDDqdAoLPwDr3uU6pb_yRAm_BapqdnZgMg_6Cv191wMFjtdJ9oN8KFyDuK7hOCbk4xfh6oSVkAIvk-RuThmqOlmewVkWVYkFZvFKUYe8%3D)

|
Fellow American, bumping this to the top of your inbox.

Over the holiday weekend, I emailed you about a chance to win a trip to meet me in Charleston for dinner. _**[Have you entered?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_e=DcnW-bIXxab-yuEGzvqRqkVq1MbYJ0sOc1SDjSQPwl_aBdV_fOqtrGFf21sEuUVDuTZDUJxSlQRz-Pww_9MUHU_QaP7QUUMlZeRh-8oRcMYL3MiFBj_Xu5Pe7oeKlw6J85Tc1mDoQHgq7y2N-NOP2bTJE73fnALqMCnbxCuNjJONYpcGQSWm0D19JsR41QTjKbMAhYgc2qE5hZ0fFJ0WGDsFyfv-dLir6QxDspnoxL0nOvxJYXGk_6BVoBHstJlp3RuuVG1OVzqdwU2l5s9V8bIAx2Rvah49g6m70NcXa4z8fB8ln7BUJHajPsmn4sFX1i9kuLBnqpybpKRBkMabb4a_p_JtU9vVzYbz-2iHa0rFS1vs25obPqmkb5-JsNkpeWAZs-_J4Ctw6FsFVqFO7x-EvRtGoGG2kzdfXbY4pU4%3D)**_

I am looking forward to the opportunity to talk one-on-one with one of my best supporters ... I hope you're the winner, Fellow American!

**[This contest ends TOMORROW, so chip in $1 or more before 11:59 on 9/6 to be in the running.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_e=DcnW-bIXxab-yuEGzvqRqkVq1MbYJ0sOc1SDjSQPwl_aBdV_fOqtrGFf21sEuUVDuTZDUJxSlQRz-Pww_9MUHU_QaP7QUUMlZeRh-8oRcMYL3MiFBj_Xu5Pe7oeKlw6J85Tc1mDoQHgq7y2N-NOP2bTJE73fnALqMCnbxCuNjJONYpcGQSWm0D19JsR41QTjKbMAhYgc2qE5hZ0fFJ0WGDsFyfv-dLir6QxDspnoxL0nOvxJYXGk_6BVoBHstJlp3RuuVG1OVzqdwU2l5s9V8T1E4QF5og-Y9uiXp4mwU2cXSIjDjWnslyXqpiZNXDa4ChQ_f0_timJ0Zpve7n4uuNJO9YSALfVdaJp_1FPtgq9C8nOss740l2HiCZiTHwSQKxwn8pU0Y3uYMxOEL6jXL5IuVBYmIh_uu82sa1g_fOI%3D)**

Thanks for being on my team,

Vivek

Sent from my iPhone

* * *
**From:** Vivek Ramaswamy
**Date:** Sunday, September 3, 2023
**Subject:** Let's make dinner reservations

---
[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_e=DcnW-bIXxab-yuEGzvqRqkVq1MbYJ0sOc1SDjSQPwl_aBdV_fOqtrGFf21sEuUVDuTZDUJxSlQRz-Pww_9MUHU_QaP7QUUMlZeRh-8oRcMYL3MiFBj_Xu5Pe7oeKlw6J85Tc1mDoQHgq7y2N-NOP2bTJE73fnALqMCnbxCuNjJONYpcGQSWm0D19JsR41QTjKbMAhYgc2qE5hZ0fFJ0WGDsFyfv-dLir6QxDspnoxL0nOvxJYXGk_6BVoBHstJlp3RuuVG1OVzqdwU2l5s9V8SXXtLXt04IGosIhFQmIPAhJTlcko-dL-nFLPyGwb-KeYaji7F9bp1u_XYdCVx_jXzRGFILscWdOewyBjg_-Z9ThY0YEXb_JCWtgjINFcudXdJ1Id7NcY0DwxVmlHwkQ83sGAZBDEzk0VSZdLUMVk9U%3D)
Fellow American,

I've said this since day one: this campaign is built from the bottom up. It's built by a grassroots network of conservative patriots who want to see REAL change in America.

It's important for me to hear directly from top supporters like you, so I've asked our team to set up a special event - _**a chance to meet me for dinner in Charleston, South Carolina.**_

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_e=DcnW-bIXxab-yuEGzvqRqkVq1MbYJ0sOc1SDjSQPwl_aBdV_fOqtrGFf21sEuUVDuTZDUJxSlQRz-Pww_9MUHU_QaP7QUUMlZeRh-8oRcMYL3MiFBj_Xu5Pe7oeKlw6J85Tc1mDoQHgq7y2N-NOP2bTJE73fnALqMCnbxCuNjJONYpcGQSWm0D19JsR41QTjKbMAhYgc2qE5hZ0fFJ0WGDsFyfv-dLir6QxDspnoxL0nOvxJYXGk_6BVoBHstJlp3RuuVG1OVzqdwU2l5s9V8Z-Qn3DIiO3CnwGh-aSlbQXsWA82lRoOdHg5g2Gig72d7ToA43pfh4U7HEKLaZi8Q83juf0yf-wdCegO-HRLzaE2Q2C8oQo94M3eKnQMuBTPzpDgPUvYsrsn-RTrlg2FzleCENyZReuBQmnw3BMGXXA%3D)
I've been busy campaigning all over the country. Next time I'm in South Carolina, I'd like you to be my special guest at dinner.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more to automatically be entered to win a chance to have dinner with me?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_e=DcnW-bIXxab-yuEGzvqRqkVq1MbYJ0sOc1SDjSQPwl_aBdV_fOqtrGFf21sEuUVDuTZDUJxSlQRz-Pww_9MUHU_QaP7QUUMlZeRh-8oRcMYL3MiFBj_Xu5Pe7oeKlw6J85Tc1mDoQHgq7y2N-NOP2bTJE73fnALqMCnbxCuNjJONYpcGQSWm0D19JsR41QTjKbMAhYgc2qE5hZ0fFJ0WGDsFyfv-dLir6QxDspnoxL0nOvxJYXGk_6BVoBHstJlp3RuuVG1OVzqdwU2l5s9V8YhbdtHtrS_1XPwb-A5ao2XNHiMWuMmAIUa4l_gALmx0Z1d22b3lGLVIdw3GG2v1azhWjFaJQvNp1BtUBGRDaGrfcwXt6qbxmrt1zEIoIqkYNHFcRCCzxgULTmuSdLrl0quZiecjDWnKIYSneDlyoI0%3D)**

We'll take a look at both of our schedules to see what dates work best (I know we're both busy).

At dinner, we can discuss:
1. The top issues facing our country today AND solutions to fix them
2. How to win in states like Iowa, New Hampshire, AND South Carolina
3. What you'd like to see debated at the next GOP Presidential Debate
4. _**And MUCH MORE!**_

There's so much work to do before the second GOP Presidential Debate next month. By chipping in, you'll help me - once again - be center stage.

Thanks for being part of my team. _**I hope to meet you soon!**_

Thanks,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_e=DcnW-bIXxab-yuEGzvqRqkVq1MbYJ0sOc1SDjSQPwl_aBdV_fOqtrGFf21sEuUVDuTZDUJxSlQRz-Pww_9MUHU_QaP7QUUMlZeRh-8oRcMYL3MiFBj_Xu5Pe7oeKlw6J85Tc1mDoQHgq7y2N-NOP2bTJE73fnALqMCnbxCuNjJONYpcGQSWm0D19JsR41QTjKbMAhYgc2qE5hZ0fFJ0WGDsFyfv-dLir6QxDspnoxL0nOvxJYXGk_6BVoBHstJlp3RuuVG1OVzqdwU2l5s9V8Qzzb4G_p5d508o0WOkpnJoNkTznKQQwgLwYbYY3kg1WBfiyGpfCN1DWMstGqhm64oYFQWtcjPRPikPmZUvz3iIWgEbYJKwtPw7SdeAq1BEZiKSe9CtT5vkayrx894sOJ8f2DLBiH33Av_oHntbGaFQ%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. The contest ends on Wednesday, September 6th, **[so please chip in $1 or more before time is up!](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7765729359a14c349a745ae00c1a3781&_e=DcnW-bIXxab-yuEGzvqRqkVq1MbYJ0sOc1SDjSQPwl_aBdV_fOqtrGFf21sEuUVDuTZDUJxSlQRz-Pww_9MUHU_QaP7QUUMlZeRh-8oRcMYL3MiFBj_Xu5Pe7oeKlw6J85Tc1mDoQHgq7y2N-NOP2bTJE73fnALqMCnbxCuNjJONYpcGQSWm0D19JsR41QTjKbMAhYgc2qE5hZ0fFJ0WGDsFyfv-dLir6QxDspnoxL0nOvxJYXGk_6BVoBHstJlp3RuuVG1OVzqdwU2l5s9V8U908efPUWh1BDgdRcfr-6WluM_eNq0eTvlU270_o2ywkI487DX0VF37jyIYmnLJlM7E0nWsoZkhBgwVAxYtMoMo_Q6hDZknpttoqFiHsK4HBLzyTSPlzkOUcwYarSYijSjWhuKeLDC_HphH81wH8m8%3D)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Bumping this to the top of your inbox. I hope you'll enter to win a chance to meet me in Charleston! | | Fellow American, bumping this to the top of your inbox. Over the holiday weekend, I emailed you about a chance to win a trip to meet me in Charleston for dinner. I am looking forward to the opportunity to talk one-on-one with one of my best supporters ... I hope you're the winner, Fellow American! Thanks for being on my team, Vivek Sent from my iPhone From: Vivek Ramaswamy Date: Sunday, September 3, 2023 Subject: Let's make dinner reservations Fellow American, I've said this since day one: this campaign is built from the bottom up. It's built by a grassroots network of conservative patriots who want to see REAL change in America. It's important for me to hear directly from top supporters like you, so I've asked our team to set up a special event - a chance to meet me for dinner in Charleston, South Carolina. I've been busy campaigning all over the country. Next time I'm in South Carolina, I'd like you to be my special guest at dinner. We'll take a look at both of our schedules to see what dates work best (I know we're both busy). At dinner, we can discuss: 1. The top issues facing our country today AND solutions to fix them 2. How to win in states like Iowa, New Hampshire, AND South Carolina 3. What you'd like to see debated at the next GOP Presidential Debate 4. And MUCH MORE! There's so much work to do before the second GOP Presidential Debate next month. By chipping in, you'll help me - once again - be center stage. Thanks for being part of my team. I hope to meet you soon! Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. The contest ends on Wednesday, September 6th, | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: "It's not proper for [a woman] to be leading the family"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
As a woman who flew Apache helicopters in the Army (and was the only woman graduate in my Apache class), I won't let ignore this. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69258177/425561345/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230905_fr_MHoffense_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTM1NGZiMy0yZjRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dg7OEWYMfLny4_CM1B6LRt_7gdgjxD2gGZv8O15QbAc=)
---
"It’s not proper for my wife or any other man’s wife to be leading the family in certain areas that God has ordained for me." Those are the words of Mark Houck, the newest Republican to join the race for PA-01. And I gotta tell ya, they make me sick. This is the kind of backwards thinking that would take us back to a time when women couldn't open a credit card in their own name (which we couldn't do until 1974). Hell, it's why women still aren't paid the same as a man for doing the same job! **But this is what the Republican Party of 2023 has become – a reactionary group that wants to force us ALL into the roles _they_ think we should fulfill.** As a woman who flew Apache helicopters in the Army (and was the only woman graduate in my Apache class), I say to them, "Over my dead body." The freedoms that Houck and Brian Fitzpatrick are trying to take away from _all of us_ are the same ones I risked my life and fought for overseas. **That's why I'm fighting like hell to win this race, and why I'll fight like hell in the halls of Congress against anyone who would take those freedoms away.** **[But I need your help to get there. Will you pitch in your first donation of $5 to my campaign so we can beat these guys? name: Roland Gutierrez
subject: Ted Cruz & Greg Abbott’s ‘Operation Lone Star’ isn’t just cruel, it’s ineffective
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas

You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. Texas trooper working Operation Lone Star details ‘inhumane’ border policies on Rio Grande
Ted Cruz is lying to the people of Texas about what’s going on at the border.
Operation Lone Star has led to nothing but stunt after stunt from reckless and feeble-minded politicians who would rather torture people than solve our immigration problems.
We’ve spent billions of dollars of taxpayer money on Operation Lone Star – a failed stunt that started with stopping trucks along the border in search of fentanyl and migrants – but found no fentanyl and no migrants.
This failed stunt has cost Texans $4.5 billion – and it’s led to women and children drowning at the border.
It’s time for new leadership – that’s why I’m running to unseat Ted Cruz as our U.S. Senator. Will you pitch in $20 or more to help my campaign send him packing? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

body:

| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=0037a3bd9dd745318930caf48ad2a805&_e=nlswbTphZ81UJM4r3ZcMM8qFGcI9wFhQsyvGsF6auGan_g-mSjB6asT-NixOdDjfL4pYUyLe7PrQQd35rklXyastaKoRj_yFdNTLQxOvis-qqxN--MQ9l2DQHfHqklDG3w4lUoulxgKeKmYWPR9Ow_VkAQUgfsihlOfGpYi75pplR2NTXD383Tl0c9Q21K0R0I8SejnXBG2nAbKZrgxR3B8zPHhZDltz4jc5FGD0JB8c1u96ZcNCy7ItMgKU2RygXzZ0-_z-AF0_lYdbYp4_p_495VnP1DhSA5mp9LBikKhx0VOXzYThpyUspv1P24hzEtSQ3LnxXf3FnWcx9N2aWvD_SEbKurotOEw_XfFSKdDROwehnlayoy7SV_foPreSLUSPgsD9adCFGdY9geA0e3CMR0jaiGbepZQh1NG2CD7b6U809NYEXheQA8qqEGa6UyIhNvJcc5vjeomkuTQeXjzW3rhk49sYOnBaRpu3H1k%3D)

Friend,
---

---

**Official 2023 Most Important Issues Survey**
---
__Input Requested by:__ **Congressman Bryan Steil (WI-01)** Invitation Active for: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**[<< SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSES NOW >>](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=0037a3bd9dd745318930caf48ad2a805&_e=nlswbTphZ81UJM4r3ZcMM8qFGcI9wFhQsyvGsF6auGan_g-mSjB6asT-NixOdDjfL4pYUyLe7PrQQd35rklXyastaKoRj_yFdNTLQxOvis-qqxN--MQ9l2DQHfHqklDG3w4lUoulxgKeKmYWPR9Ow_VkAQUgfsihlOfGpYi75pplR2NTXD383Tl0c9Q21K0R0I8SejnXBG2nAbKZrgxR3B8zPHhZDltz4jc5FGD0JB8c1u96ZcNCy7ItMgKU2RygXzZ0-_z-AF0_lYdbYp4_p_495VnP1DhSA5mp9LBikKhx0VOXzYThpyUspv1P24hzEtSQ3LnxXf3FnWcx9N2aWoAAQVZJft6NG9_dYraphEexKXu1RA6-alVNZN0Jd5UsCldZ6wX-sHhu0jlPUagZzarBzvgHyMyAXE1ZwUMtyEZJxR-xpW9Aceh6EA1_SmA9lwDC8ciJYsZ6Wn3UgTliwpJ6SPEG7SuWeA3mCkG9DxQ%3D)**

This [**SURVEY**](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=0037a3bd9dd745318930caf48ad2a805&_e=nlswbTphZ81UJM4r3ZcMM8qFGcI9wFhQsyvGsF6auGan_g-mSjB6asT-NixOdDjfL4pYUyLe7PrQQd35rklXyastaKoRj_yFdNTLQxOvis-qqxN--MQ9l2DQHfHqklDG3w4lUoulxgKeKmYWPR9Ow_VkAQUgfsihlOfGpYi75pplR2NTXD383Tl0c9Q21K0R0I8SejnXBG2nAbKZrgxR3B8zPHhZDltz4jc5FGD0JB8c1u96ZcNCy7ItMgKU2RygXzZ0-_z-AF0_lYdbYp4_p_495VnP1DhSA5mp9LBikKhx0VOXzYThpyUspv1P24hzEtSQ3LnxXf3FnWcx9N2aWrWp15KYF5LjlId8BXh1OSyuPwdxzoGZj-AyNqoLqojdrV_ereTfXPCcPsNF15paw5J2tsqxwDIDI-fQezX6mwmMlq3Jizff5l1g_k764is0-CCdPAGjhh-X_B4xhhUC72ljpSau8jQLHofdaj52Lr0%3D) will only take a minute to complete and your responses will help us coordinate our agenda for both the rest of this year and the start of 2024.
---
The issues that **YOU** care about most are the issues that we care about most, Friend.
---
**Please take a minute to complete our[**Most Important Issues Survey**](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=0037a3bd9dd745318930caf48ad2a805&_e=nlswbTphZ81UJM4r3ZcMM8qFGcI9wFhQsyvGsF6auGan_g-mSjB6asT-NixOdDjfL4pYUyLe7PrQQd35rklXyastaKoRj_yFdNTLQxOvis-qqxN--MQ9l2DQHfHqklDG3w4lUoulxgKeKmYWPR9Ow_VkAQUgfsihlOfGpYi75pplR2NTXD383Tl0c9Q21K0R0I8SejnXBG2nAbKZrgxR3B8zPHhZDltz4jc5FGD0JB8c1u96ZcNCy7ItMgKU2RygXzZ0-_z-AF0_lYdbYp4_p_495VnP1DhSA5mp9LBikKhx0VOXzYThpyUspv1P24hzEtSQ3LnxXf3FnWcx9N2aWsRzHNjZJXUwBnbmKK09_8fdH42j_ZsA6hy6iq3MaiBH8_p0hZT6Oafj_ovXX2tYCZgKF_4bGA5rDd1TqUHCHN1AXh5B9h1GvhFMQDtUUlN-jeMgr7okALYnTm-DLU2V8chPFkplX_iMgDruEGGBK9Q%3D) so we know which issues to focus on most once the House is back in session.**
---
**[_< < RESPOND TO THE SURVEY HERE >>_ ](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=0037a3bd9dd745318930caf48ad2a805&_e=nlswbTphZ81UJM4r3ZcMM8qFGcI9wFhQsyvGsF6auGan_g-mSjB6asT-NixOdDjfL4pYUyLe7PrQQd35rklXyastaKoRj_yFdNTLQxOvis-qqxN--MQ9l2DQHfHqklDG3w4lUoulxgKeKmYWPR9Ow_VkAQUgfsihlOfGpYi75pplR2NTXD383Tl0c9Q21K0R0I8SejnXBG2nAbKZrgxR3B8zPHhZDltz4jc5FGD0JB8c1u96ZcNCy7ItMgKU2RygXzZ0-_z-AF0_lYdbYp4_p_495VnP1DhSA5mp9LBikKhx0VOXzYThpyUspv1P24hzEtSQ3LnxXf3FnWcx9N2aWnwXlyBmCzdrQ2LbIJql4yTpKY_46ZEU2VFxcbdJkrVSicBsbbcuBpRGR_FbCvVyYF04OGVA6z-eMQ5E1qzTJA6PbjoEGxgPMi4o06ul2yXiqvAhH_evaZu5t5oq8Wizlw5TT-D9qt14IkOW90XFti8%3D)**
---
Thank you,

subject: Binkley Builds Momentum
body:
| | | | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e2fb719396&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
Binkley for President 2024 achieves another donor goal. Ryan receives more media coverage. The Heartland event approaches.
---
|
---
|
#### **Campaign Milestones**
---
| The good news continues! We surpassed **55,000 donors** and received **many more donations** over Labor Day Weekend! We've met the donor threshold for the second GOP debate later this month. The final hurdle is to reach 3% in national and early state polling (IA & NH). We continue to focus on media outreach to win the hearts of Americans with Ryan's message of unity and freedom.
---
| |
---
### Timothy Bruce Interview
Ryan met with Timothy Bruce, a popular Christian influencer with over one million followers on Instagram and TikTok. They talked about loving your neighbor and valuing fellowship above politics. Stay tuned for more videos of their conversation.
[_Watch a clip_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e118efd44f&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=ad86a93a2b&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Close Up Interview
Ryan appeared on WMUR9's Close Up segment this weekend in New Hampshire. He shared his vision for American renewal with host Andy Sexton. [_Watch the interview_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=3a860b59fc&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| _**Coming Up...**_
---
| |
---
### Fox and Friends
Ryan returns to Iowa this week for a special event with Fox & Friends at the historic Machine Shed Restaurant. Tune in to watch the show on Friday from 6am-7am ET!
---
| |
---
### Fighting for the Heartland
Please join us at Fighting for the Heartland, an online event on September 7th at 4:00 PM CT. Learn why farmers across the Midwest are opposing the controversial CO2 pipelines.
[_Register here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=7f573dce58&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
---
| **How Can I Help?** • _**LIKE AND COMMENT**_ on all social media posts
• A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!
• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow
• Lastly, _**DONATE & SHARE**_ the link with everyone you know!
---
|
---
| **We are asking anyone who sees this message to take one moment to donate and send the link to 10 new people to reach our new goal. BE THE CHANGE that allows Ryan's message to reach the nation!**
---
|
---
|
---
| [Contribute Today!](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=0a118e9f24&e=c1403f41d3 "Contribute Today!")
---
| _Coming up: Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=3f2641c41b&e=c1403f41d3) to stay up to date with events._

Now, you never want to miss a goal, but we can absolutely make up the ground we lost with a strong effort this month. **[So will you rush a quick $5 or $10 donation to John’s campaign to help get us back on track to defeat Ken Buck?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e84183a28df04c20b48860a20e48adca&_e=8WoPktWAxnNe5pA8_uf0yPUGD7tuwOVsb7CrTwy83ZjcJKB4qpvbMPsMokaJziaYuRZZuYQ8q9fP4dnRLW4zP56o_p8Mdsv_e_dr4bu9c7_yBRbwVzzv_hTO82ZtmkVX_oqBJuoC_kPcVVD4PRPCEJCqEVUWcrnjpN-8GbDoCXTipycM3ZdkGjfIz-3CqaHmZEQ6Rh22UaPyO0wPu3qGjtg8H4JuW1vAgn7xPtiQvvVj-1unQeu_I35AOMd_yNCmO9sbNBonwXoBS-gUTn8G9NlHlFRufuVwBvEMudaTUu67OF5rBDnw44b2wLyc1wP5wenyeUOc74GYputlGZcUS6rjTgkhZDgRkqa0QEWWmU3lZOrKOBFkliD_Wr6W4li9tKGpD6Q3slS2-M4P3Zi-uw%3D%3D)** We need to consistently hit our fundraising benchmarks in order to win this race. name: Team Kent
subject: Invitation: Gig Harbor and Alexandria VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Supporter,
There are two receptions for Joe Kent next week.
On Tuesday, September 12, Jim and Marlyn Jensen are hosting a reception at their estate in Gig Harbor, WA. The event commences at 6 PM.
You may RSVP to this email address and purchase tickets at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/GigHarbor](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/LvXOBJDF4W763CzYOOUxfSPg/ONWxxUPAiC6uwfVwbBdnPg).
On Wednesday, September 13th, Jesse and Caroline Binnall are hosting a reception for Joe Kent in their home in Alexandria, VA from 5:30 PM to 7:30 PM.
You can obtain tickets at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/DC](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/SmQCIPnuBdQfgq8qwWGeEA/ONWxxUPAiC6uwfVwbBdnPg).
Invitations for both events are attached.
Joe hopes you can make it. Please email us back if you have any questions.
Thank you!
Team Kent

Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

name: CaucusRoom
subject: What's Going on in Wyoming?
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-ajlduht-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
**I Thought You Were a****Sanctuary**** City** **[Texas sent a 12th bus filled with migrants to Los Angele](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-y/)s**, which arrived on Monday morning, nearly a week after city leaders voted to pursue legal action against the Lone Star State. **Five Things to Do** Five action items **[Conservatives should focus on](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-j/)** to better their communities and county. Here are **[Supreme Court Elections](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-t/)** to watch in critical **[swing states.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-i/)** **What's Going on in Wyoming?** A **[city in Wyoming has been overrun with an unprecedented homeless population](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-d/) **that's destroyed a vacant motel, and has left hundreds of pounds of feces across the area. **Joe Claims He Doesn't Have a Home ** Biden approached reporters after leaving Mass at St. Edmond Roman Catholic Church and, unprompted**,[revealed his weekend trip was not for vacation purposes.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-h/) **_What on earth is he talking about?_

**DEI Training** A "horrified" hospital employee at Kaiser Permanente**[leaked a sex change training for diversity, equity, and inclusion](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-k/), **which promoted the idea that a 3-year-old can be transgender. [_**Let**_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-u/)**[ _'s _](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-p/)[have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-x/)! **😆
* Having a **[bad day](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-m/)**?
* That's **[really short](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-c/).**
* **[Yikes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* I can't** [unsee it.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-a/)**

**Countdown to the 2nd Republican Primary Debate!** [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajlduht-trhiujldw-e/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-ajlduht-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-ajlduht-trhiujldw-w/)
---

Peter,

As we look toward the busy fall season, our campaign is garnering serious momentum at a crucial time.

George recently received the endorsement of the Santa Clarita Valley Democratic Club. This early endorsement -- along with day-one endorsements from all of the state Democratic representatives in the district -- is a sure sign that CA-27 is coming together behind this campaign.

Not only are local community members banding together behind George, others in California are signaling their key early support as well. George has recently received endorsements from Reps. Adam Schiff, Eric Swalwell, and Zoe Lofgren.

**These supporters -- across the Santa Clarita Valley, Antelope Valley, and California -- all agree: George is the candidate who will best represent CA-27.**

So right now, we must build upon this energy and build up our grassroots team. _We can defeat GOP Rep. Mike Garcia, but it will take all of us._

[**Will you join our endorsers and solidify your support for George with a $3 donation right now? clean_body: | = Peter, As we look toward the busy fall season, our campaign is garnering serious momentum at a crucial time. George recently received the endorsement of the Santa Clarita Valley Democratic Club. This early endorsement -- along with day-one endorsements from all of the state Democratic representatives in the district -- is a sure sign that CA-27 is coming together behind this campaign. Not only are local community members banding together behind George, others in California are signaling their key early support as well. George has recently received endorsements from Reps. Adam Schiff, Eric Swalwell, and Zoe Lofgren. These supporters -- across the Santa Clarita Valley, Antelope Valley, and California -- all agree: George is the candidate who will best represent CA-27. So right now, we must build upon this energy and build up our grassroots team. We can defeat GOP Rep. clean_body: Set our agenda for September!| | | | | Patriot, It’s often said that after Labor Day, the presidential election truly kicks into high-gear. Luckily, our campaign is in the greatest position we could ask for. President Trump has an insurmountable lead in the Republican primary. Our primary opponents are burning through special interest cash and their support among voters has completely collapsed. Polls also show that Independent and even Democrat voters believe President Trump is the subject of baseless, vicious witch hunts. Now, to ensure we kick off September as strong as possible and build upon our incredible momentum, President Trump wants YOUR help outlining our priorities for the NEW month. | | SEPTEMBER PRIORITIES SURVEY PARTICIPANT: dpwillis67@gmail.com STATUS: {PENDING} DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT | Thank you, Team Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

Peter,
I wasn’t elected to Congress to serve myself, a political party, or any D.C. Insiders – I was elected to represent and serve my constituents right here in Texas.

That’s why polls published by the media and special interest groups aren’t very helpful to me – I can’t be sure just who’s taking them, and I simply can’t rely on their results to gauge the hearts and minds of my constituents.

So, I was hoping you might be able to help, Peter.
---

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Take the Official Survey Peter, I wasn’t elected to Congress to serve myself, a political party, or any D.C. Insiders – I was elected to represent and serve my constituents right here in Texas. That’s why polls published by the media and special interest groups aren’t very helpful to me – I can’t be sure just who’s taking them, and I simply can’t rely on their results to gauge the hearts and minds of my constituents. So, I was hoping you might be able to help, Peter. | Will you please take my Special Edition Issues Survey to help shape my team's focus before we head into the 3rd quarter of 2023? >> TAKE THE SURVEY Your participation is greatly appreciated. It shouldn’t take more than a minute or two. | Thank you, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger Williams Research Team 10 N. Caddo St, PMB #174, Cleburne, TX 76031

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I am asking you to personally endorse my reelection.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I didn’t come to Congress to be silent. I came to Congress to be a voice for you.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)
Friends -
I am someone who has survived war and experienced injustice firsthand, who is alive today because I was welcomed into this country as a refugee.
28 years ago I arrived in America as a young refugee. I would never in my wildest dreams have imagined that I would have the opportunity to represent the community that welcomed me with open arms in Congress.
I never imagined that I would have the privilege to directly impact policy in ways that would make our world, our democracy and our economy better for working families like mine. I get to wake up every day and fight for little girls like me dreaming of a safer future.
When I got to Congress, my colleagues and the DC pundits told me that I was destined to fail. They said the first Somali, refugee, Muslim, Hijabi-wearing and only African-born person in Congress couldn’t lead our movement in an institution with rules not created for us. They said I would never succeed in creating change.
But we did not back down. We fought hard for our ideas. We forced climate action to the top of the agenda. We empowered Medicare to finally negotiate prescription drug prices. We made justice our priority.
But this work is far from over, and the insiders and special interests who never wanted me in Congress are going to come back with more money and resources than ever before to try to take me down in 2024.
**[So I am asking you to stand with me and our movement today. Will you add your name to personally endorse my reelection?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230905-personal-endorse/?source=em230905-1-t2&refcode2=513.791427.JlCipN&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230905-personal-endorse/?source=em230905-1-t2&refcode2=513.791427.JlCipN&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)**
When I was first elected to Congress in 2018, our ideas were called radical.
* Medicare for All
* A Green New Deal
* Raising the Minimum Wage
* Canceling Student Loans
* Banning Assault Weapons

Together, our progressive movement made these ideas mainstream. We demanded an economy that works for the many, not the few. All of us — and especially young people — deserve a country that lives up to her promise of justice for all.
There’s no doubt that these ideas have put a constant target on me from Republicans and their corporate allies. The DC insiders and special interests that thrive on the status quo have come after me nonstop. Every election, they recruit another challenger who will fall in line with their agenda, and their super PACs pump my district full of dark money to try to silence all of us.
They are already preparing to do it again in 2024. But I didn’t come to Congress to be silent. I came to Congress to be a voice for you. For working families. For little girls like me. And for those who have felt ignored or silenced for too long.
Today, I need you to add your voice to mine as we prepare for the fights ahead.
**[Please add your name to personally endorse my reelection. I need as many people as possible to stand with me in this campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230905-personal-endorse/?source=em230905-1-t2&refcode2=513.791427.JlCipN&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)**
It may seem like a small action, but your voice is powerful. It’s a way to say that you are with our progressive movement for the fights ahead.
Our movement’s greatest strength is our collective power. Together, we will secure real change and a just future.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230905-personal-endorse/?source=em230905-1-t2&refcode2=513.791427.JlCipN&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)
---
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230905-personal-endorse/?source=em230905-1-t2&refcode2=513.791427.JlCipN&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=513_791427_JlCipN&akid=513%2E791427%2EJlCipN)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033
