subject: What issues are affecting you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2]
Hi Peter,
>From climate change to health care, public safety to the rising cost of living, our country faces many pressing challenges. As a grassroots-driven campaign, hearing from you helps us not only understand what everyday voters are dealing with but also what you most want to see prioritized in Congress.
There is no shortage of issues that we need to tackle, but the ones most important to us, are the ones that matter most to you.
Take a few minutes to take our Congressional Priorities Survey today >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2]
Before being elected to the Arizona Legislature, Raquel worked for over a decade as a community organizer. She spent her time knocking on doors, meeting with people, hearing so many stories and concerns. And that’s what this campaign is all about – centering our community’s stories.
Hearing about the most pressing issues in your life helps us run a better campaign. Take our priorities survey today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2]
Muchas gracias,
Team Terán
TAKE OUR SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4C4E77696A625A5652652F576F4D62474D376C2B695668544D5978694E734B664B416A563573384753593277514D51464A37496B6B386E55686B466A674755/editor_images/RT%20Bio%20Picture.png] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_subheader]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States

name: COURIER
subject: An update on No Labels
body:
The “centrist” front group has been generating headlines recently.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)
Peter,
We recently emailed you about the rise of the dark-money funded political group, No Labels, and their deceptive messaging tactics. Since then, the organization has continued to make waves in mainstream media coverage of the 2024 election. Check it out ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230905?refcode=em20230905&amount=5&refcode2=1516_120351_mJX5c9&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)
No Labels wants you to believe that they're a bipartisan, third-party alternative, but if you follow the money, the facts suggest otherwise, Peter.
While No Labels hasn't made its finances public, **a recent analysis from Mother Jones found that its backers skewed heavily in favor of Republicans. One donor even provided a "big chunk" of cash to Donald Trump.**
Peter, the mainstream media might be afraid to call out No Labels, but COURIER isn't. Whether it's standing up to Fox News or correcting the record about No Labels, our work to expose misinformation and provide trustworthy reporting during the 2024 presidential campaign is more important than ever.
**[You can read more of the truth about No Labels below, but if you don't have the time to read and still want to make a difference, can you pitch in $5 to support our local, reliable journalism?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230905?refcode=em20230905&amount=5&refcode2=1516_120351_mJX5c9&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **COURIER** [info@e.couriernewsroom.com]
Date: Fri, Aug 18, 2023 at 11:12 AM
Subject: Legitimate third party or right-wing front group?
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
**The "No Labels" party is not what it claims to be, Peter.**
They’ve been a hot topic lately as Senator Joe Manchin of West Virginia considers a third party presidential bid. And while they present themselves as a legitimate, centrist option — the Goldilocks party that’s not too hot and not too cold, but just right — the truth is much darker.
[**We'll get into the details below, but if you don't have time and want to make a donation to support reliable, fact-based journalism that isn't afraid to challenge misinformation directly, you can pitch in $5 here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230905?refcode=em20230905&amount=5&refcode2=1516_120351_mJX5c9&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230905?refcode=em20230905&amount=5&refcode2=1516_120351_mJX5c9&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)**
Here are three key facts that explain why No Labels is **_not_** a centrist party, why **_no_** third party can win the White House, and who's _**really**_ behind these efforts.
**First, the group's basic premise doesn't comport with reality.** They claim that Trump and Biden represent equally extreme ends of the political spectrum, ignoring the fact that Trump openly sought the end of American democracy and is now promising his base "retribution" over the election he falsely claims was stolen. An equivalent extreme simply does not exist on the American left.
**Second, the Electoral College makes a third party victory virtually impossible.** In 1912, 1992, 2000, and 2016, third party candidates siphoned enough votes to tip the scales in favor of one of the major party candidates.
And in 2024, Trump’s core base will support him no matter what — a third party candidate would only serve to siphon traditionally conservative voters concerned with the state of our democracy away from President Biden.
**Third, No Labels is a dark money group financed by far-right donors.** Although they've repeatedly refused to disclose their major donors, Politico, Mother Jones, and the Lincoln Project have reported that they include:
* **Harlan Crow** , the right-wing billionaire who has lavished Justice Clarence Thomas with gifts and free vacations.
* **Michael Smith** , a fossil fuel billionaire who has backed a Mitch McConnell super PAC and Virginia’s Republican governor Glenn Youngkin.
* **Allan Keen** , a Florida real estate mogul and longtime Republican donor who spent at least $135,000 to elect Trump in 2020.

These donors and others have spent huge sums to launder their talking points through a purportedly “centrist” organization, but a little digging reveals exactly what No Labels really is: just another cog in the right-wing disinformation machine.
**Courier was founded to call this kind of misinformation out and provide fact-based reporting to communities in battleground states across the country. And _none_ of our work is locked behind a paywall — which means we count exclusively on donors like you to help us accomplish our mission.**
[**So if you want to support our network of newsrooms across the country, will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can afford today? As the 2024 election approaches, our work is going to get busier, and your donations will be critical to helping us keep it up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230905?refcode=em20230905&amount=5&refcode2=1516_120351_mJX5c9&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230905?refcode=em20230905&amount=5&refcode2=1516_120351_mJX5c9&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1516&t=2&refcode2=1516_120351_mJX5c9&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1516%2E120351%2EmJX5c9)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Hung Cao
subject: Fire Tim Kaine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=29c2c1b77e7d4ca2b882549f76f2bdef&_e=9jS_LHppEnL2L1aZAOMarvZvGe_SyuIU-rMOrGSypgsxYk0ymW3Et4ucnKhr-vwo6P-FwNSvWl21cqJXHqJ1XzS3FJTbLGqZjMWTx49kaKHtrhXbivKqInOMymutKuQtNDFrDBGTRTICXkvxw-gLKxq9R4Hwoyab93cOOYjxlX1rP8vscigEhkAlKgIQu3PpiPFPT-EMb-IItVcwQ6-3hjqQN8cYTQUojOBvUF1PlX_F3xq8YujdVXfjG41sJYSgKCIB_Kbci-f_NP_Q_FESYTQ9ALDOrIsjIu1lU077G975Ny4ZpqZchnMTBtAA6y2b5K9UrVmZ6islFaeG3WAMZhlUDMU2iIaP3E2nIvTQyTY%3D)
---
Peter, Tim Kaine said that Donald Trump should be disqualified from the election. Let’s get to the heart of this matter. It doesn’t matter whether or not you like Donald Trump. This has much deeper implications. Disqualifying a candidate because the opposite side concocts a bunch of charges opens up Pandora’s box where we can indict a political opponent and keep them from running for office. I have seen this in third world countries around the globe. It never ends well. This is why, regardless of who is in the Oval Office, we need a strong legislative branch for checks and balances. We need fighters who will fight for us, not career politicians protecting the Washington DC machine. **[It’s time for Virginia to have a Senator who will fight for us with the same values of God, family, and country.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=29c2c1b77e7d4ca2b882549f76f2bdef&_e=9jS_LHppEnL2L1aZAOMarvZvGe_SyuIU-rMOrGSypgsxYk0ymW3Et4ucnKhr-vwo6P-FwNSvWl21cqJXHqJ1XzS3FJTbLGqZjMWTx49kaKHtrhXbivKqInOMymutKuQtNDFrDBGTRTICXkvxw-gLKxq9R4Hwoyab93cOOYjxlX1rP8vscigEhkAlKgIQu3PpiPFPT-EMb-IItVcwQ6-3ho3MaekBUooyFpi5x4mLzwW52Y0ph3d2R1vyMJ3cD1pFmx7k9JyFDaCNM2bhmlzTGlCslkAsQz6R66PA8wLTBDNL9uMxK_KwPUBmYBT7gu5evDpbLwLvommbWVX5b7ZJhCP7nlrmgVGkT-P55ara3ic%3D)** I will never stop fighting for us, because I know what it’s like to wake up one day without a country or a flag to stand over. That will NEVER happen on my watch.
---
[**FIRE TIM KAINE**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=29c2c1b77e7d4ca2b882549f76f2bdef&_e=9jS_LHppEnL2L1aZAOMarvZvGe_SyuIU-rMOrGSypgsxYk0ymW3Et4ucnKhr-vwo6P-FwNSvWl21cqJXHqJ1XzS3FJTbLGqZjMWTx49kaKHtrhXbivKqInOMymutKuQtNDFrDBGTRTICXkvxw-gLKxq9R4Hwoyab93cOOYjxlX1rP8vscigEhkAlKgIQu3PpiPFPT-EMb-IItVcwQ6-3huvS7N58EIegXE0QAdyRmmHxwQOEJ_UEKzModVDsVCOL175iPHt6ELJEogLPVRijdXS6Z6q6nTB1NEBDtxQ2yqFKFNbYGYQcH-W4FXzwdRK-4JC4nKfUtmTtap9uGqMwCADKKv-UJuQHA8pZOaVTroE%3D)
---
In Liberty,
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=29c2c1b77e7d4ca2b882549f76f2bdef&_e=9jS_LHppEnL2L1aZAOMarvZvGe_SyuIU-rMOrGSypgsxYk0ymW3Et4ucnKhr-vwo6P-FwNSvWl21cqJXHqJ1XzS3FJTbLGqZjMWTx49kaKHtrhXbivKqInOMymutKuQtNDFrDBGTRTICXkvxw-gLKxq9R4Hwoyab93cOOYjxlX1rP8vscigEhkAlKgIQu3PpiPFPT-EMb-IItVcwQ6-3hlrBH99vAnSHAPk5w9GAFRKQwwskIAN7YmDvrsz03bxrBdGdER2kAwBbwuRPWBJTuCtWN_qfs7UtXNti8y6HWCcVn9ybE7JdZRNxtkeGrLhxVztF7ZyDtrBJqqrdSeh8Mew6wURJtXeGOi8_6APxVjw%3D)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: What an "FEC Deadline" means
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This is the most important month of the campaign so far. Not exaggerating.
#

Peter, hope you had a good Labor Day weekend.
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution ahead of this month’s FEC deadline. Please give me a chance to explain why that request is so important.
The FEC requires us to file a quarterly report — once every three months. September is one of those months, so when it ends we're legally required to report not just how much money we've raised, but how many donations we've received.
Here's why that deadline is so important:
**1.** Because everyone — our allies and our opponents, the talking heads, the party bosses — will be watching to see what we report to the FEC after this deadline.
**2.** Because a bad report is an opportunity for our opponents. It could cause early attack ads to start coming our way from Kyrsten Sinema, the GOP, Kari Lake, even Blake Masters and his MAGA pals.
**3.** Because a good report shows the strength of our campaign. Important figures who can help us out are waiting in the wings to endorse, and if we put up a big number we can convince them to join us.
**This is the most important month of the campaign so far. Not exaggerating.** And we need every single person reading this to know and understand that. So please, to start this FEC deadline month off strong:
[**Can I count on you to use this link and contribute $3 to my campaign today? $3 might not sound like the kind of money that can win a campaign. But you’re not making that donation alone. Thousands of people will join you. We just need you to take that first step.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230905-2-30&t=1&akid=1134%2E734936%2EABwcZ-)
If $3 doesn't feel right today, or if you can do more, just choose an amount below.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-sept23.OJUjMA&refcode=em230905-2-30&t=20&akid=1134%2E734936%2EABwcZ-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-sept23.R355ly&refcode=em230905-2-30&t=21&akid=1134%2E734936%2EABwcZ-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-sept23.YPi0nf&refcode=em230905-2-30&t=22&akid=1134%2E734936%2EABwcZ-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-sept23.GEIAVR&refcode=em230905-2-30&t=23&akid=1134%2E734936%2EABwcZ-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-sept23.6P_dy0&refcode=em230905-2-30&t=24&akid=1134%2E734936%2EABwcZ-)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&refcode=em230905-2-30&t=25&akid=1134%2E734936%2EABwcZ-)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in. This means a lot.
-Ruben

They've helped place our nation's _first_ Black woman justice on our Supreme Court, ushered in progressive policies like the Respect for Marriage Act and the Inflation Reduction Act, and fought to ease the burden of working Americans by fighting for student loan forgiveness and lower health care costs.
Attorney General Letitia James knows that the push for progress must come from _every_ level of government – especially from the top. **That's why she's proud to ENDORSE the Biden-Harris administration for re-election, and she wants _you_ to join her.**

name: Bob Casey
subject: I'm a lifelong Pennsylvanian
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=557%2E552475%2EmAGdF2)
Peter, I'm a lifelong Pennsylvanian.
From growing up in Scranton, to coaching eighth-grade basketball in Philadelphia, to my wife, Terese, and I raising our four daughters in the same town where I grew up — Pennsylvania is my home.
That's why I'm a tireless advocate for Pennsylvania's hardworking families in the U.S. Senate. Because I know how hard Pennsylvanians work to provide for their kids, save for their families' futures, and give back to their communities. They deserve a Senator who works just as hard to represent their voices in Washington.
But here's the reality: national Republicans are coming for this seat in hopes of regaining Senate control. These are the same folks who want to make cuts to Social Security, which nearly 3 million Pennsylvanians rely on to get by.
_The people of our state can't afford a Republican Senate majority._
**[Peter, I'm running for re-election to keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in the U.S. Senate, but I won't be able to win without your support. Will you donate $5 or any amount now to help defend this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230905-1?refcode=em20230905-1&refcode2=557_552475_mAGdF2&akid=557%2E552475%2EmAGdF2)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230905-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230905-1&refcode2=557_552475_mAGdF2&akid=557%2E552475%2EmAGdF2)**
I'm no stranger to a hard fight, and I'm grateful for your support as we build this campaign.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=557%2E552475%2EmAGdF2)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=557%2E552475%2EmAGdF2)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

body:
Friend, we need you

| [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=b126d035b7ac4ee29cecb6f81d0b0ac0&_e=DgDrGHugcihTfuTpujCcc9JUybzDamb0MSlSmYBA6Hsz34Fku1B8jUM3ulm7MrWrDGwZC64x6h6yEo8tPq6gneKEKZGcAwD9bX3Ir8jHueSfxX0NwRGc37haKStVY69NQ3U4plpUx05F7dR1HP5KwoET9PDt4G75qIO-RH0l34y81umGxqfwR3i4f3OU51x0HEGhQwtsPCxZCtKVjEA3T9jTDBFYKhbzg5PWPuvo04988TcU96VmZoL8R6_Fm4N426iI9p_RcqnWbaL5T-2Uf27AE6OQT5bQdAesNYdq5PH_GHMs1wyu8q9b0PFlVeAKxUlBCHKvgKuOyT1r8WNHEdg1YVqJzbNC6IOkJ2e6dCmeUXSCQVuACDzw2GIn0sCH9zcJmNnwlTJIr_hidjkO1cBFOc16gU27axYJExUng6Cj0iHQn2O-Uo5Z24oYU5kV0RC1Oe72ls0nGAOF1Tnpwe09SVAUsIIyJfmEY51sXt1S_c1S1ZGfq8ge1QLF_r9OBq-Uhaf-BiQm0NMaFSvbpQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

name: VoteVets
subject: Acting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We wanted to bring you back to Tuberville’s blockade on Military promotions today.
#
Derek, we wanted to bring you back to Tuberville’s blockade on Military promotions today.
And we wanted to explain something — we want you to understand what the man appointed to be the next Commandant of the Marine Corps, General Eric Smith, can and can’t do.
Right now, the Marine Corps is undergoing a major, post-conflict restructuring. Everything is on the table, from grand strategy down to the size of an infantry battalion.
General Smith can speculate on what changes the Marines might need.
But General Smith cannot issue the orders. He cannot make the changes. He cannot shape the force in the way he needs to in order to address the threats and challenges that the Marine Corps is tasked with addressing.
In short, the Marine Corps is frozen. And with more than 300 promotions on hold, including the heads of the Army, Navy, and soon the Air Force, that freeze is affecting every service.
Tommy Tuberville and the GOP are doing untold damage to our Armed Forces.
This has gone on for too long already. VoteVets plans to continue taking the fight to Tuberville and the GOP. We never stopped. But we need to know that you’re still with us.
[**So please, if you can, chip in $3 and help us keep hammering away at the GOP on these promotions. We won’t stop until they do.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sept23.AXrwBB&refcode=em230905-1-30&t=1&akid=15737%2E3013755%2E_3Khu2)**

Tommy Tuberville and the GOP are doing untold damage to our Armed Forces. This has gone on for too long already. VoteVets plans to continue taking the fight to Tuberville and the GOP. We never stopped. But we need to know that you’re still with us. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Primary Day is 6️⃣ months away!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
With six months to go before Super Tuesday, we need to keep growing our grassroots movement every day between now and then.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29377%2E3422442%2ErsFws3)
**Derek, t oday marks just six months until our competitive primary election! [Can you rush a $6 contribution today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230905-1?amount=6&refcode=EMAL05_1_SIX_20230905_V1_F&refcode2=29377_3422442_rsFws3&akid=29377%2E3422442%2ErsFws3)**
Thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you, Katie started this campaign off in a strong position. But with only six months to go before the California primary, we need to increase our grassroots momentum every day between now and then.
Here’s what could slow us down: **Katie is the only candidate in the race who isn’t taking money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists** , which means she relies on grassroots donations to power her campaign (our average donation this month is just $22)!
[**Can we count on you to pitch in $6 to help Katie maintain her momentum and keep building this grassroots campaign over the next six months?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230905-1?amount=6&refcode=EMAL05_1_SIX_20230905_V1_F&refcode2=29377_3422442_rsFws3&akid=29377%2E3422442%2ErsFws3)
[Donate $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230905-1?amount=6&refcode=EMAL05_1_SIX_20230905_V1_F&refcode2=29377_3422442_rsFws3&akid=29377%2E3422442%2ErsFws3)
Unfortunately, funding a campaign without giant checks from special interests isn’t easy, but Katie never takes the easy way out. And as a single working mom, she’s committed to representing _**all**_ of California, not just the executives in nice suits who can afford to write big checks. That approach is why so many people are excited to support Katie.
We’re polling ahead of our opponents, but California is one of the most expensive states to run a statewide campaign in, so it’s crucial that we keep hitting each and every one of our fundraising goals if things are going to stay that way.
[**With the primary just six months away, we can’t afford to start falling behind now. So if you can, please pitch in $6 or more to help us keep building this movement and elect Katie as California’s next U.S. Senator!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230905-1?amount=6&refcode=EMAL05_1_SIX_20230905_V1_F&refcode2=29377_3422442_rsFws3&akid=29377%2E3422442%2ErsFws3)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230905-1?amount=6&refcode=EMAL05_1_SIX_20230905_V1_F&refcode2=29377_3422442_rsFws3&akid=29377%2E3422442%2ErsFws3)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL05_1_SIX_20230905_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=29377_3422442_rsFws3&akid=29377%2E3422442%2ErsFws3)**

Katie Porter for Senate

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, I’m looking at our August numbers and I have some bad news.

**We missed our August end-of-month goal by $5,163.** Meeting our monthly goals is crucial if we want to take down the Democrats in 2024.

**Our Democrat opponents are fundraising MACHINES.** They could raise similar amounts of money to Socialist Democrats like John Fetterman, Val Demings, and Beto O’Rourke.

To put it simply, they are puppets for the far-left Democrats. They want to turn Florida into New York or California.

The good news is we’ve extended our end-of-month deadline to tonight at midnight to help match the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. We won’t let them ruin Florida. We’ll stand up to Chuck Schumer and KEEP FLORIDA RED!

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Peter,

Welcome back to our Team Liz weekly update. I hope you had a great Labor Day weekend!

This weekend we attended the AFL-CIO Union Strong Night at Citi Field! Liz and her husband are diehard Mets fans, and while they only nearly lost, good times (and union-made beer) was had by all. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69260905/425571187/1758262425?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230905_ST_Newsletter_0_CST_Carissa_na_na_Newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJlYjJiYTYtM2U0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ORJb6c48_fmOwuLmhs6LuYn9joeYqgRiPlaXu-IjUcM=) ICYMI: Last week we were featured in the _New York Times_! We sat down with their team to talk about the stakes of this general and primary election. If you haven't already, you can read the article by . = This week we also brought on our class of fall interns! body:
The rematch is on. Don’t sit this one out.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69261503/425573406/-1632984841?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230905_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFjYmM1OS00MDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSBzOi0gExB4HMeI26NcgwQZQYKQ37DStmeLRgSTolA=) **Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $3 donation between Will’s campaign and Mark Takano to help him launch with strength? Will can win this thing, so please donate now. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69261504/425573407/-1632984841?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230905_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFjYmM1OS00MDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSBzOi0gExB4HMeI26NcgwQZQYKQ37DStmeLRgSTolA=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO SUPPORT LGBTQ CHAMPIONS WILL ROLLINS AND MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69261505/425573408/-1632984841?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230905_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFjYmM1OS00MDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSBzOi0gExB4HMeI26NcgwQZQYKQ37DStmeLRgSTolA=)
---
Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:
1. **We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.
2. **Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.
3. **GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!
4. **Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

[**Please split a $3 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Mark Takano today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! We need lots of Democrats to step up right out of the gate. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69261506/425573409/-1632984841?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230905_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFjYmM1OS00MDRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSBzOi0gExB4HMeI26NcgwQZQYKQ37DStmeLRgSTolA=)

clean_body: The rematch is on. Don’t sit this one out. | = Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House. Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent. = | = Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race: 1. We need candidates like Will in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department. 2. Retaking the House runs through CA-41. After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress. 3. GOP super PACs. Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat! 4. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go. Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage. The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and Mark Takano will go through immediately: = = = Thanks, Barbara Boxer Former U.S. Senator, California | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.
And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $15 between Serve America and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=ztjpoCsUCCIIPptbfulr4aI25FYIcrYHLMW60YyjHZbyv6taiq8ULwPBhDWYn8n0WULeb1S684qKMN254zlnbeGIxvBTGDqSJW28n2%2BwsDoNDOMkf7dpoJMBXsu8sWpWDTKzf39OzzLYzybE6I7vhUp6Bywr%2FFYvjz4A3pQhw65IE2FcJo4fMzRWBpRJ%2FWyIeeR72m94P12yraCW3oHJhya6fys%2Bz3g8HBuagisF29hK25kP08TXTfUxQlLQlQqzea%2ByAgXHQyQhxgny8ho9%2BY7pPxggFCKJzuEkFDAze1MH%2Fn5esyfVy56VdEqdGzmOT9hOP9vD2yEe9c%2FwtHXhzAnURrg%2Ba%2BT1eRctGCCCtTLnSNO5qkU7CsQ2yGH2ApZMHu%2BcdiZcHJ2%2FWB%2Fv03md5khI0EigFxNyDQeZKSq0KZE%3D .
Paid for by Serve America PAC
Serve America PAC
PO Box 2013
Salem, MA 01970
United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A $27,000 salary vs. a $27 million salary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We can’t count on billionaire CEOs to support workers out of the goodness of their hearts. We need to demand real change.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=44%2E4032634%2EcMU1sP)
---
| We’ve got to keep raising our voices and get the PRO Act through Congress to strengthen workers' rights. So please add your name if you agree: It’s time to pass the PRO Act immediately.

| [**ADD MY NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-support-pro-act/?source=EMZ16J_LAB_E_20230905_V1S1_AK_F15&t=8&akid=44%2E4032634%2EcMU1sP)
---

If you enjoyed your long weekend, thank the labor movement.
And if you spent some of your time enjoying a movie or TV show, thank the working people who create the stories we love.
This Labor Day, I joined a Greater Boston Labor Council rally with SAG-AFTRA — a union that’s on strike right now, along with the Writers Guild of America. These artists, creators, writers, and storytellers are raising their voices and striking in order to earn the pay they deserve from the studios they work with. Because it’s way too hard for way too many of them to make ends meet. Nearly 90% of SAG-AFTRA members are scraping by on less than $27,000 a year — while Disney CEO Bob Iger took home a whopping $27 million last year. _That’s a little over $519,000 a week._
These workers are joining a renaissance of strikes and union organizing drives we’ve seen lately — nurses, teachers, tech workers, baristas, retail workers, and more. I’m inspired by these brave union members putting their livelihoods on the line to fight for each other and to fight for families across the country. Every union victory builds momentum for more wins and puts power in the hands of working people, where it belongs.
Understand, this strike is about pay — but it is about so much more.
This fight is about whether the giant corporations can use AI to steal the work of writers and actors.
This fight is about the risk that every working person may face in the next few years, that some corporate CEO will decide to boost profits by stealing their work and not paying for it.
This fight is about the future of work.
And in this fight, CEOs and corporations have lots of money. CEOs and corporations have lots of influence. And they’re fighting back hard.
So we need to pass the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which would crack down on union-busting, make it easier to organize a union, force more employers to the bargaining table, and strengthen the right to walk out of the workplace and onto the picket line.
**This would be the strongest pro-worker law in decades.**
[**We’ve got to keep raising our voices and get the PRO Act on the books to make it easier to form a union. So please add your name if you agree: It’s time to strengthen workers’ rights by passing the PRO Act immediately.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-support-pro-act/?source=EMZ16J_LAB_E_20230905_V1S1_AK_F15&t=9&akid=44%2E4032634%2EcMU1sP)
[**ADD MY NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-support-pro-act/?source=EMZ16J_LAB_E_20230905_V1S1_AK_F15&t=10&akid=44%2E4032634%2EcMU1sP)
---
We can’t count on billionaire CEOs to support workers out of the goodness of their hearts. We need to demand real change — from picket lines to ballot boxes to the halls of Congress.
I’m staying in this fight all the way. And when we fight side by side, we make each other stronger.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/435?t=14&akid=44%2E4032634%2EcMU1sP)
---

name: Fair Fight
subject: ICYMI: Trump’s campaign attempted to harass and intimidate poll workers. We’re working to ensure it doesn’t happen again.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We work to recruit and advocate for poll workers as they dedicate their time to helping voters make their voices heard. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69261890/425574895/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230905_f_pollworkers_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA4MDA3OS00MzRjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_BEFBifk0AeHH9rk8hfaGSig2spV0Lm2qYMjpKT9_0I=&emci=dba8e971-434c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ba080079-434c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Poll workers are the beating heart of our democracy. They get to the polls the earliest and leave the latest, working long shifts and completing extensive training — all to ensure that our elections run smoothly. It’s often thankless work. Here in Georgia, the municipal election cycle is in full swing. That means right now, Fair Fight is recruiting poll workers and loudly advocating for the resources they need to run accessible and safe elections as they dedicate their time to helping voters make their voices heard. Protecting poll workers is all the more important right now, as last month, two Georgia poll workers testified about Donald Trump’s campaign’s efforts to harass and intimidate them during the 2020 election cycle. In the face of extremists’ attempts to subvert our elections and undermine the important job that poll workers do, Fair Fight remains committed to advocating for them — and defending them from issues that may arise. clean_body: We work to recruit and advocate for poll workers as they dedicate their time to helping voters make their voices heard. | | | Poll workers are the beating heart of our democracy. They get to the polls the earliest and leave the latest, working long shifts and completing extensive training — all to ensure that our elections run smoothly. It’s often thankless work. Here in Georgia, the municipal election cycle is in full swing. That means right now, Fair Fight is recruiting poll workers and loudly advocating for the resources they need to run accessible and safe elections as they dedicate their time to helping voters make their voices heard. subject: The stories I hear along the way

body:
We have made progress in lowering costs, but there is more to do.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69261899/425574962/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230905-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTA3MzNkZGEtNDM0Yy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I27FV03T7VQ5gANXi0ONKNdE40BSy-L8BZFCyaIKfyA=)
---
| Peter,

_**$1,500 is how much, on average, a senior on Medicare who needs insulin will save annually because of the $35 cap on insulin passed in the Inflation Reduction Act.**_ Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, further savings are on the way as drugs are subject to Medicare price talks.

And yet, for some, the savings are even greater. Last weekend, a woman approached me in Culpeper County to tell me how my vote had changed her life and retirement. She said that in the past, she had paid as much as $1,000 per month to buy her prescribed insulin. Now, she pays $35 per month for the same medication.

That is why I do this job. I fiercely believe in enacting change that improves the quality of life for the people I serve. I know it’s just one step in making healthcare accessible and affordable, but to the 6,000 people on Medicare in my district who require insulin to survive, it’s a significant breakthrough. _**And, as more drug prices fall thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, more Virginians will spend less on life-saving medication.**_

We have made progress in lowering costs, but there is more to do. Meanwhile, national Republicans are already plotting ways to attack us, afraid of what this extremely popular drug plan could do to Republicans’ chances in 2024. Republicans’ attacks have no basis in reality, but we have to respond all the same to defend these life-saving price cuts.

clean_body: We have made progress in lowering costs, but there is more to do. | = | Peter, $1,500 is how much, on average, a senior on Medicare who needs insulin will save annually because of the $35 cap on insulin passed in the Inflation Reduction Act. Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, further savings are on the way as drugs are subject to Medicare price talks. And yet, for some, the savings are even greater. Last weekend, a woman approached me in Culpeper County to tell me how my vote had changed her life and retirement. She said that in the past, she had paid as much as $1,000 per month to buy her prescribed insulin. Now, she pays $35 per month for the same medication. That is why I do this job. I fiercely believe in enacting change that improves the quality of life for the people I serve. I know it’s just one step in making healthcare accessible and affordable, but to the 6,000 people on Medicare in my district who require insulin to survive, it’s a significant breakthrough. And, as more drug prices fall thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, more Virginians will spend less on life-saving medication. We have made progress in lowering costs, but there is more to do. Meanwhile, national Republicans are already plotting ways to attack us, afraid of what this extremely popular drug plan could do to Republicans’ chances in 2024. Republicans’ attacks have no basis in reality, but we have to respond all the same to defend these life-saving price cuts. = = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. body:
Here's the headline I read this morning. |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter - when Joe Biden and Congress approved **_unlimited debt spending_** for the next two years **_without any serious budget cuts_**, I was the only candidate in the CA-47 race who came out against it.

Now here's the headline I'm reading today: **"U.S. deficit explodes."**

The government is now projecting this year's budget deficit to _double_ from last year to nearly $2 trillion.

This isn't sustainable, Peter. I'm running for Congress to help fix it, but I need you standing with me to get it done.
---
| [STAND WITH ME](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=78e30fb7f9&e=86e91e802d "STAND WITH ME")
---
| The government's interest payments on the federal debt are skyrocketing. Even worse, out-of-control national debt drives up interest rates on everyday Americans like you and me.

The career politicians may not be serious about solving this crisis, but I am. **_I'm running to be a relentless advocate for cutting wasteful spending, balancing the budget, and reducing our debt._**

The time for procrastination is over. Our future is at stake.

This won't be an easy fight. **That's why I need to know if the people of Orange County are standing with me on this. **
[**_Can you add your name to our list of supporters so I know we're in this fight together?_**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=88c6010db8&e=86e91e802d)
---

---
| Conservatives can win the tough battles ahead and turn our country's spending crisis around ... but only if we're standing together.

Thank you,

Max

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Peter, the stakes here are huge. This could be the biggest environmental showdown this year
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9917642&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDEyMzg5NwS2&spReportId=MTgyMDEyMzg5NwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9917642&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDEyMzg5NwS2&spReportId=MTgyMDEyMzg5NwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9917642&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTgyMDEyMzg5NwS2&spReportId=MTgyMDEyMzg5NwS2

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Holy Smokes! This Blew Me Away... In A Good Way
body:
New Sheridan.Church Launch This past Labor Day WKND, we opened up the NEW Sheridan.ChurchTulsa Campus! It was absolutely incredible. The presence an
| | |
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.491.1.f2dce360d09c24ceae4ddedfcf4ef1a0)
---
## New Sheridan.Church Launch
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.492.1.85e0c72cfa548181d9f02bfbc5ce92b4)
---
This past Labor Day WKND, we opened up the NEW [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.493.1.4027ab0b995225e9ea869e5cc5de497f)Tulsa Campus!
It was absolutely incredible. The **presence** and **power** of God was strong.
Also, attendance was **WILD**. Every chair in the building was utilized and I was actually blown away for a Labor Day WKND service.
I preached a message that if you missed, I believe will bless you.
Do you ever wonder how to pray prayers that actually produce results?
In this message, I show the **keys to effective and powerful prayer**.
Watch [Acts Pt. 19](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.494.1.ef20e1a7aead6129040f1bf16d12eb80) here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/Eq9aPdNkvB4?si=VzCBJMqPIXQnM5-c](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.495.1.17ee5998d726730765eae2076111afd3)
I want to thank all of our generous supports who helped us complete Phase 1 of turning a club into a church.
Now we are on to Phase 2, which includes **kids rooms, youth room, lobby and restrooms**.
This phase will cost us around $120,000.
I know that where God guides, He provides.
Please pray about partnering with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.496.1.91f064fb7db38f7fe3e1d81cccaf2a80) to complete this miraculous project of taking a tavern and turning it into a tabernacle.
You can give at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.497.1.0c4c1fd9ef01b7393661fa207135dcc2)
| | [ Help Turn A Club Into A Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.498.1.b0eb55411c82096e997da61940f319e9)
---
---
## IGNITE 2023 | Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.499.1.93a5ee2c037c0f98cdfc670f79ba9303)
---
We are less than 10 days away from [Sheridan.Church's](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.500.1.71b6bc07e79ffe630bba6f54a93ef64c) annual conference in Tulsa, OK called [IGNITE 2023](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.501.1.cbece9765ea0e2714f7e9c9164f45ac7)!
[IGNITE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.502.1.a9192469b01e0a03a7f55cf47ab6d4db) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.503.1.0bd185d772f025d4a4bcff74eec5123f) is a 4 days of _powerful worship_ , _dynamic speakers_ and a _community of believers on fire for God_.
**Dates** : September 10-13
**Speakers** :
-Lara Trump
-Kash Patel
-Dr. Randy Caldwell
-Bishop Darrell Hines
-David Ring
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.504.1.3a7199fe12d17ea7d634c94873cd3cf4) | 7901 E 41st Tulsa, OK 74145
**Cost** : FREE
**MUST RSVP to attend!**
**Seating** : LIMITED
**RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/ignite23](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.505.1.8033d1ebf9d5556925883a731cb48afc)
After the service at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.506.1.71569048bec9e31b9eb58fbc0de5004c) on Sunday, September 10, **Lara Trump** & **Kash Patel** will host a dinner event that you are invited to.
Get your ticket to have dinner with Lara Trump & Kash Patel here: [www.sheridan.church/ignite23](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.507.1.5a0b0ba023319920acb050a205d4abd3)
| | [ RSVP: IGNITE 2023 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.508.1.4ca64ae6c5466fd1290b6fd4767bcb31)
---
---
## Special Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan In October
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.509.1.231a684c8f6411f8348a7bf9299f34a3)
---
I have always been a _major_ sports fan.
Recently, I watched a documentary on the great **New York Mets** baseball player **Darryl Strawberry**.
I knew of **Darryl Strawberry's** tremendous career and his unfortunate downfall to drugs later in his career.
What I did not know was how God restored him and called Darryl to the ministry.
Shortly after learning this, I began following **Darryl Strawberry** and his ministry and have been amazed at the preacher he is.
This is why I am excited to invite you to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.510.1.f6b2436e0bb80ed980290f4024238e11) Tulsa on **Sunday, October 8** to hear **Darryl Strawberry** preach the Gospel!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.511.1.32c737e683df1468a675b9242a9d3199), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.512.1.6fcd372c25ee870bea66027ae81c0848), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.513.1.e5d7fa143b697eaef5e77c11f0f1d98e), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.514.1.f316a84b962a55bf123d691dc368d12d), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.515.1.e7403372919b5a0dd1348556410e3747), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1205477.516.1.c0a7dce6b2c86b58cfbb569a22aac823)).

body:
